Õż¦ÕżÜµĢ░ńö¤õ║¦ÕŖøń│╗ń╗¤Õ┤®µ║āńÜäÕÄ¤ÕøĀÕÅ¬µ£ēõĖĆõĖ¬ŃĆé

Õ«āõ╗¼µś»õĖ║"ÕźĮµŚźÕŁÉ"Ķ«ŠĶ«ĪńÜäŃĆé

ńŖČµĆüÕźĮńÜäµŚČÕĆÖ’╝īõĮĀµ£ēµŚČķŚ┤µ£ēń▓ŠÕŖøń╗┤µŖżń│╗ń╗¤’╝ÜµŁŻńĪ«ÕĮÆµĪŻń¼öĶ«░ŃĆüµø┤µ¢░ķĪ╣ńø«ńŖČµĆüŃĆüÕżäńÉåµöČõ╗Čń«▒ŃĆüµĢ┤ńÉåµēĆµ£ēµ¢░ĶŠōÕģźńÜäÕåģÕ«╣ŃĆé

õĮåńŖČµĆüõĖŹÕźĮńÜäµŚČÕĆÖ’╝īń│╗ń╗¤Õ░▒ÕÅśµłÉõ║åµä¦ń¢ÜńÜäµØźµ║É’╝īĶĆīõĖŹµś»ÕĖ«õĮĀµÅÉµĢłńÜäÕĘźÕģĘŃĆéµöČõ╗Čń«▒ÕøøÕż®µ▓ĪÕżäńÉåõ║å’╝īń¼öĶ«░õ╣▒ÕĪ×Õ£©ÕÉäń¦Źµ¢ćõ╗ČÕż╣ķćī’╝īķĪ╣ńø«ńŖČµĆüÕćĀÕæ©ķāĮµ▓Īµø┤µ¢░ŃĆé

õĮĀÕ╝ĆÕ¦ŗµöŠÕ╝āõĮ┐ńö©Ķ┐ÖõĖ¬ń│╗ń╗¤’╝īÕøĀõĖ║ń╗┤µŖżÕ«āµČłĶĆŚńÜäń▓ŠÕŖøµ»öÕ«āÕĖ”µØźńÜäõŠ┐Õł®Ķ┐śÕżÜŃĆé

ĶĆīĶ┐ÖõĖ¬ Obsidian õĖ¬õ║║µōŹõĮ£ń│╗ń╗¤’╝īĶ«ŠĶ«ĪķĆ╗ĶŠæÕ«īÕģ©õĖŹÕÉīŃĆé

Õ«āõĖŹµś»õĖ║"ÕźĮµŚźÕŁÉ"Ķ«ŠĶ«ĪńÜäŃĆé

Õ«āµś»õĖ║"ÕØÅµŚźÕŁÉ"ĶĆīńö¤ńÜäŃĆé

ń│╗ń╗¤Ķ”üµ▒éõĮĀÕ«Üµ£¤µø┤µ¢░µēŹĶāĮõ┐ØµīüÕćåńĪ«ŃĆéķĪ╣ńø«ńŖČµĆüĶ”üµēŗÕŖ©µø┤µ¢░’╝īõ╗¬ĶĪ©ńøśĶ”üµēŗÕŖ©ÕłĘµ¢░’╝īµĀćńŁŠĶ”üµēŗÕŖ©µĘ╗ÕŖĀŃĆéõĖĆµŚ”ńö¤µ┤╗Õ┐ÖńóīĶĄĘµØź’╝īń╗┤µŖżÕ░▒ĶĘ¤õĖŹõĖŖ’╝īń│╗ń╗¤õ╣¤ÕÅśÕŠŚõĖŹÕÅ»ķØĀŃĆéõĖŹÕÅ»ķØĀńÜäń│╗ń╗¤’╝īµ£Ćń╗łń╗ōµ×£Õ░▒µś»Ķó½µöŠÕ╝āŃĆé

õ║║õ╗¼õĖĆÕ╝ĆÕ¦ŗńö©ń«ĆÕŹĢńÜäń╗ōµ×ä’╝īńäČÕÉÄµ»Åµ¼ĪķüćÕł░ÕĮōÕēŹń╗ōµ×äÕżäńÉåõĖŹõ║åńÜäķŚ«ķóś’╝īÕ░▒ÕŠĆõĖŖÕŖĀÕżŹµØéÕ║”ŃĆéÕŹŖÕ╣┤ÕÉÄ’╝īÕ░▒ÕŠŚÕł░õĖĆõĖ¬ÕĘ┤µ┤øÕģŗÕ╝ÅńÜäµ×Čµ×ä’╝īÕ»╝Ķł¬ķ£ĆĶ”ü20ÕłåķÆ¤’╝īĶ┐śÕŠŚń┐╗Ķć¬ÕĘ▒ÕåÖńÜä"õĮ┐ńö©µ¢ćµĪŻ"µēŹĶāĮńÉåĶ¦ŻŃĆé

õ┐ØķÖ®Õ║ōÕŁśµöŠõ║åõ┐Īµü»’╝īõĮåõĖŹõ╝ÜµÄ©ńÉåŃĆéõĮĀµŹĢµŹēõ║åńüĄµä¤’╝īÕŹ┤ÕåŹõ╣¤µēŠõĖŹÕł░Õ«āŃĆéõĮĀĶ«░õ║åõ╝ÜĶ««ń¼öĶ«░’╝īõĮåķ£ĆĶ”üńÜäµŚČÕĆÖµ░ĖĶ┐£µā│õĖŹĶĄĘµØźŃĆéĶ┐ÖõĖ¬ń│╗ń╗¤ÕÅ¬µś»õĖ¬µĪŻµĪłÕ║ō’╝īõĖŹµś»µÖ║ĶāĮÕŖ®µēŗŃĆé

ÕżŹµØéÕ║”ÕŠŚÕł░õ║åµÄ¦ÕłČŌĆöŌĆöµ×Čµ×äµ£ēÕø║Õ«ÜµĢ░ķćÅńÜäń╗äõ╗Č’╝īµ»ÅõĖ¬ń╗äõ╗Čµ£ēµśÄńĪ«ńÜäĶüīĶ┤Ż’╝īµ▓Īµ£ēõ╗╗õĮĢń╗äõ╗ČÕŖ¤ĶāĮķćŹÕÅĀŃĆé

õĖēÕ▒éµ×Čµ×ä

ń¼¼õĖĆÕ▒é’╝ÜÕŁśÕé©Õ▒é

õĖēÕ▒éÕÉłõĮō’╝īµēŹµś»ń£¤µŁŻĶ┐ÉĶĮ¼ńÜäń│╗ń╗¤ŃĆé

00 - CAPTURE µś»ÕøĀõĖ║µŹĢµŹēÕÆīÕżäńÉåµś»õĖżõ╗ČõĖŹÕÉīńÜäõ║ŗŃĆéõĮĀõ╗ź"µĆØń╗┤ńÜäķĆ¤Õ║”"µŹĢµŹē’╝īõ╗ź"õĖōµ│©ńÜäķĆ¤Õ║”"ÕżäńÉåŃĆéCAPTURE µ¢ćõ╗ČÕż╣µŚĀÕĘ«Õł½Õ£░ÕÉĖµöČõĖĆÕłć’╝īĶ┐ÖµĀĘõĖŹõ╝ÜÕøĀõĖ║ÕżäńÉåÕż¬µģóĶĆīõĖóÕż▒õ╗╗õĮĢõĖ£Ķź┐ŃĆé

01 - ACTIVE ÕÅ¬µöŠÕĮōÕēŹµ┤╗ńØĆńÜäõĖ£Ķź┐ŌĆöŌĆöõĮĀÕ£©ÕüÜńÜäķĪ╣ńø«ŃĆüõĮĀĶ┤¤Ķ┤ŻńÜäńö¤µ┤╗ķóåÕ¤¤ŃĆüµ»ÅµŚźń¼öĶ«░ŃĆéµ▓Īµ£ēÕÄåÕÅ▓Ķ«░ÕĮĢ’╝īµ▓Īµ£ēĶ┐£µ£¤ńø«µĀć’╝īÕÅ¬µ£ē"ńÄ░Õ£©Ķ┐øĶĪīµŚČ"ŃĆé

.weui-label { display: block; width: 105px; overflow-wrap: break-word; hyphens: auto; } .weui-input { width: 100%; border: 0px; outline: 0px; appearance: none; background-color: transparent; font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit; color: inherit; height: 1.41176em; line-height: 1.41176; } .weui-input::-webkit-inner-spin-button, .weui-input::-webkit-outer-spin-button { appearance: none; margin: 0px; } .weui-input:focus:not(:placeholder-shown) + .weui-btn_input-clear { display: inline; } .weui-textarea { display: block; border: 0px; resize: none; background: transparent; width: 100%; color: inherit; font-size: 1em; font-family: inherit; line-height: inherit; height: 80px; outline: 0px; } .weui-textarea-counter { color: var(--weui-FG-2); text-align: right; font-size: 14px; } .weui-cell_warn, .weui-cell_warn .weui-textarea-counter { color: var(--weui-RED); } .weui-cell_warn .weui-icon-warn { display: inline-block; } .weui-cell_disabled .weui-input:disabled, .weui-cell_disabled .weui-textarea:disabled, .weui-cell_readonly .weui-input:disabled, .weui-cell_readonly .weui-textarea:disabled { opacity: 1; -webkit-text-fill-color: var(--weui-FG-1); } .weui-cell_disabled .weui-input[disabled], .weui-cell_disabled .weui-input[readonly], .weui-cell_disabled .weui-textarea[disabled], .weui-cell_disabled .weui-textarea[readonly], .weui-cell_readonly .weui-input[disabled], .weui-cell_readonly .weui-input[readonly], .weui-cell_readonly .weui-textarea[disabled], .weui-cell_readonly .weui-textarea[readonly] { color: var(--weui-FG-1); } .weui-btn_input-clear { display: none; padding-left: 8px; } .weui-btn_input-clear [class*="weui-icon-"] { width: 18px; } .weui-cells_form .weui-cell_disabled:active, .weui-cells_form .weui-cells_form .weui-icon-warn { display: none; } .weui-cells_form input, .weui-cells_form label[for], .weui-cells_form textarea { -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); } .weui-form-preview { position: relative; background-color: var(--weui-BG-2); } .weui-form-preview::before { top: 0px; border-top: 1px solid var(--weui-FG-3); transform-origin: 0px 0px; transform: scaleY(0.5); } .weui-form-preview::after, .weui-form-preview::before { content: " "; position: absolute; left: 0px; right: 0px; height: 1px; color: var(--weui-FG-3); } .weui-form-preview::after { bottom: 0px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--weui-FG-3); transform-origin: 0px 100%; transform: scaleY(0.5); } .weui-form-preview__hd { position: relative; padding: 16px; text-align: right; line-height: 2.5em; } .weui-form-preview__hd::after { content: " "; position: absolute; bottom: 0px; right: 0px; height: 1px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--weui-FG-3); color: var(--weui-FG-3); transform-origin: 0px 100%; transform: scaleY(0.5); left: 16px; } .weui-form-preview__hd .weui-form-preview__value { font-style: normal; font-size: 1.6em; } .weui-form-preview__bd { padding: 16px; font-size: 0.9em; text-align: right; color: var(--weui-FG-1); line-height: 2; } .weui-form-preview__ft { position: relative; line-height: 50px; display: flex; } .weui-form-preview__ft::before { content: " "; position: absolute; padding-left: 0px; } .weui-cell_vcode { padding-top: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; } .weui-vcode-btn, .weui-vcode-img { margin-left: 5px; height: 56px; vertical-align: middle; } .weui-vcode-btn { display: inline-block; padding: 0px 0.6em 0px 0.7em; line-height: 56px; font-size: 17px; color: var(--weui-LINK); position: relative; } .weui-vcode-btn::after { content: " "; position: absolute; left: 0px; top: 0px; width: 1px; bottom: 0px; border-left: 1px solid var(--weui-FG-3); color: var(--weui-FG-3); transform-origin: 0px 0px; transform: scaleX(0.5); } button.weui-vcode-btn { background-color: transparent; border: 0px; outline: 0px; } .weui-vcode-btn:active { color: var(--weui-LINK-ACTIVE); } .weui-gallery { display: none; position: fixed; inset: 0px; background-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); z-index: 1000; } .weui-gallery__img, .weui-gallery__opr { position: absolute; left: env(safe-area-inset-left); right: env(safe-area-inset-right); } .weui-gallery__img { top: env(safe-area-inset-top); bottom: calc(60px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom)); width: 100%; background: 50% center / contain no-repeat; } .weui-gallery__img:last-child { bottom: env(safe-area-inset-bottom); } .weui-gallery__opr { position: absolute; bottom: 0px; background-color: rgb(13, 13, 13); color: var(--weui-WHITE); line-height: 60px; text-align: center; } .weui-gallery__del { display: block; padding-bottom: env(safe-area-inset-bottom); } .weui-gallery__del:active { opacity: 0.5; } .weui-cell_switch { padding-top: 12px; padding-bottom: 12px; } .weui-cell_switch.weui-cell_disabled, .weui-cell_switch.weui-cell_readonly { color: var(--weui-FG-3); } .weui-switch { appearance: none; } .weui-switch, .weui-switch-cp__box { vertical-align: bottom; position: relative; width: 52px; height: 32px; background-color: var(--weui-FG-3); border: 0px; padding: 2px; outline: 0px; border-radius: 16px; box-sizing: border-box; transition: background-color 0.1s, border 0.1s; } .weui-switch-cp__box::after, .weui-switch::after { content: " "; position: absolute; top: 2px; left: 2px; width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 15px; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06) 0px 2px 3px 0px; transition: transform 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0.4, 0.25, 1.35), -webkit-transform 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0.4, 0.25, 1.35); } .weui-switch-cp__input:checked + .weui-switch-cp__box, .weui-switch-cp__input[aria-checked="true"] + .weui-switch-cp__box, .weui-switch:checked { background-color: var(--weui-BRAND); } .weui-switch-cp__input:checked + .weui-switch-cp__box::after, .weui-switch-cp__input[aria-checked="true"] + .weui-switch-cp__box::after, .weui-switch:checked::after { transform: translateX(20px); } .weui-slider { padding: 15px 18px; user-select: none; } .weui-slider__inner { position: relative; height: 2px; background-color: var(--weui-FG-3); } .weui-slider__track { height: 100%; background-color: var(--weui-BRAND); width: 0px; } .weui-slider__handler { position: absolute; left: 0px; top: 50%; width: 28px; height: 28px; margin-left: -14px; margin-top: -14px; border-radius: 50%; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); box-shadow: 0 0 4px var(--weui-FG-3); } .weui-slider-box { display: flex; -webkit-box-align: center; align-items: center; } .weui-slider-box .weui-slider { -webkit-box-flex: 1; flex: 1 1 0%; } .weui-slider-box__value { margin-left: 0.5em; min-width: 24px; color: var(--weui-FG-1); text-align: center; font-size: 14px; } ------MultipartBoundary--V18AwZf64LE7N6VrRgtlEfW3yXxemougSebeeIpMw0---- Content-Type: text/css Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary Content-Location: https://res.wx.qq.com/mmbizappmsg/zh_CN/htmledition/js/assets/tencent_portfolio_light.mpfd2pou0c499fc6.css @charset "utf-8"; :root { --articleFontsize: 17px; } h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 { font-weight: 400; font-size: 16px; } * { margin: 0px; padding: 0px; } a { color: rgb(87, 107, 149); text-decoration: none; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); -webkit-user-drag: none; } html { text-size-adjust: 100%; } body { line-height: 1.6; letter-spacing: 0.034em; overflow-wrap: break-word; hyphens: auto; } @font-face { font-family: "PingFang SC"; src: local("PingFang SC"); unicode-range: U+0-1F232, U+1F234, U+1F6A8, U+1F250, U+1F237-1F239, U+1F23B-1F24F, U+1F251-FFFFF; } body.wx_wap_page { font-family: "PingFang SC", system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Helvetica Neue", "Hiragino Sans GB", "Microsoft YaHei UI", "Microsoft YaHei", Arial, sans-serif; } .rich_media_content { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9); font-size: var(--articleFontsize); overflow: hidden; text-align: justify; } .rich_media_content * { max-width: 100% !important; box-sizing: border-box !important; overflow-wrap: break-word !important; } .rich_media_content p { clear: both; min-height: 1em; } .rich_media_content em { font-style: italic; } .rich_media_content fieldset { min-width: 0px; } body { text-underline-position: under; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; text-underline-offset: 0.1em; } @supports (-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch) { body { text-underline-position: from-font; } } .wxw-img { vertical-align: bottom; } blockquote { padding-left: 10px; border-left: 3px solid rgb(219, 219, 219); color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); font-size: 15px; padding-top: 4px; margin: 1em 0px; text-indent: 0px; } .blockquote_info { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); margin-top: 1.17647em; overflow-wrap: break-word; hyphens: auto; } .blockquote_article { display: block; } .code-snippet, .code-snippet__fix, .code-snippet *, .code-snippet__fix * { max-width: 1000% !important; } .code-snippet { margin: 10px 0px; display: block; overflow-x: auto; font-size: 14px; padding: 1em 1em 1em 3em; color: rgb(51, 51, 51); position: relative; background-color: rgb(250, 250, 250); border: 1px solid rgb(240, 240, 240); border-radius: 2px; counter-reset: line 0; white-space: normal; } .code-snippet code { text-align: left; font-size: 14px; display: block; white-space: pre-wrap; position: relative; font-family: Consolas, "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Courier, monospace; } .code-snippet code::before { position: absolute; min-width: 1.5em; text-align: right; left: -2.5em; counter-increment: line 1; content: counter(line); display: inline; margin-right: 12px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15); } .code-snippet_nowrap code { white-space: pre; display: flex; } .code-snippet__fix { font-size: 14px; margin: 10px 0px; color: rgb(51, 51, 51); position: relative; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.03); border: 1px solid rgb(240, 240, 240); border-radius: 2px; display: flex; line-height: 26px; } .code-snippet__fix pre { overflow-x: auto; padding: 1em 1em 1em 0px; white-space: normal; flex: 1 1 0%; } .code-snippet__fix code { text-align: left; font-size: 14px; white-space: pre; display: flex; position: relative; font-family: Consolas, "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Courier, monospace; } .code-snippet__fix .code-snippet__line-index { counter-reset: line 0; flex-shrink: 0; height: 100%; padding: 1em; list-style-type: none; } .code-snippet__fix .code-snippet__line-index li { list-style-type: none; text-align: right; } .code-snippet__fix .code-snippet__line-index li::before { min-width: 1.5em; text-align: right; left: -2.5em; counter-increment: line 1; content: counter(line); display: inline; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15); } .code-snippet__comment, .code-snippet__quote { color: rgb(175, 175, 175); font-style: italic; } .code-snippet__keyword, .code-snippet__selector-tag, .code-snippet__subst { color: rgb(202, 125, 55); } .code-snippet__number, .code-snippet__literal, .code-snippet__variable, .code-snippet__template-variable, .code-snippet__tag .code-snippet__attr { color: rgb(14, 156, 229); } .code-snippet__string, .code-snippet__doctag, .code-snippet__title, .code-snippet__section, .code-snippet__selector-id { color: rgb(221, 17, 68); } .code-snippet__subst { font-weight: 400; } .code-snippet__type, .code-snippet__class .code-snippet__title { color: rgb(14, 156, 229); } .code-snippet__tag, .code-snippet__name, .code-snippet__attribute { color: rgb(14, 156, 229); font-weight: 400; } .code-snippet__regexp, .code-snippet__link { color: rgb(202, 125, 55); } .code-snippet__symbol, .code-snippet__bullet { color: rgb(221, 17, 68); } .code-snippet__built_in, .code-snippet__builtin-name { color: rgb(202, 125, 55); } .code-snippet__meta { color: rgb(175, 175, 175); } .code-snippet__deletion { background: rgb(255, 221, 221); } .code-snippet__addition { background: rgb(221, 255, 221); } .code-snippet__emphasis { font-style: italic; } .code-snippet__strong { font-weight: 700; } .autoTypeSetting > p { margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0.5em; } .autoTypeSetting24 > p { margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 24px; } .autoTypeSetting24psection > p { margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 24px; } .autoTypeSetting24psection > section { margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 24px; } .rich_media_content form { display: none !important; } a { color: var(--weui-LINK); } .rich_media_title { color: var(--new-title-color); } .rich_media_content { color: var(--new-content-color); } blockquote { color: var(--weui-FG-1); } .blockquote_info { color: var(--weui-FG-2); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) blockquote { border-color: rgb(64, 64, 64); } body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) .code-snippet { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); } body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) .code-snippet code::before { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); } body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) .code-snippet__fix { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); } body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) .code-snippet__fix .code-snippet__line-index li::before { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); } } .radius_avatar { display: inline-block; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); padding: 3px; border-radius: 50%; overflow: hidden; vertical-align: middle; } .radius_avatar img { display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; border-radius: 50%; background-color: rgb(238, 238, 238); } body { color: var(--weui-FG-0); } body.mm_appmsg { box-sizing: border-box; background-color: var(--appmsgExtra-BG); padding-bottom: calc(env(safe-area-inset-bottom) + var(--appmsgPageBottomGap)); } body.mm_appmsg .rich_media_extra_discuss { padding-bottom: 0px; } body.mm_appmsg .rich_media_extra_discuss.rich_media_extra_discuss_loading, body.mm_appmsg .rich_media_extra_discuss.rich_media_extra_discuss_initial { background-color: var(--weui-BG-2); } body.mm_appmsg .rich_media_extra_discuss:not(.rich_media_extra_discuss_empty) { background-color: var(--weui-BG-2); } body.mm_appmsg.wx_wap_page_primary { background-color: var(--weui-BG-2); } body.mm_appmsg.wx_wap_page_primary .rich_media_area_extra { background-color: var(--appmsgExtra-BG); } body.rich_media_bottom_bar:not(.page_share_img) { padding-bottom: calc(55px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom)); } body.rich_media_bottom_bar:not(.page_share_img).mm_appmsg { padding-bottom: calc(var(--appmsgPageBottomGap) + 55px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom)); transition: padding-bottom 0.3s; } .appmsg_skin_default .rich_media_area_primary { background: var(--weui-BG-2); } .appmsg_skin_default .rich_media_area_primary .weui-loadmore_line:not(.weui-loadmore_default) .weui-loadmore__tips { background: var(--weui-BG-2); } .rich_media_area_primary { padding: calc(var(--richMediaAreaPrimaryPaddingTop) + env(safe-area-inset-top)) calc(var(--appmsgPageGap) + env(safe-area-inset-right)) 0 calc(var(--appmsgPageGap) + env(safe-area-inset-left)); } .fullscreen-padding .rich_media_area_primary { padding: calc(var(--richMediaAreaPrimaryPaddingTop) + var(--normal-top-insets)) calc(var(--appmsgPageGap) + env(safe-area-inset-right)) 0 calc(var(--appmsgPageGap) + env(safe-area-inset-left)); } .rich_media_area_primary.voice { padding-top: 66px; } body.fullscreen-padding::before { position: fixed; content: ""; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100vw; height: var(--normal-top-insets); background: var(--weui-BG-2); z-index: 500; } body.fullscreen-padding.fullscreen-padding__border::after { position: fixed; content: ""; top: var(--normal-top-insets); left: 0px; width: 100vw; height: var(--padding-border-height, 1px); transform: scaleY(0.3); transform-origin: center top; background: var(--weui-FG-3); z-index: 501; } .rich_media_title { font-size: 22px; line-height: 1.4; margin-bottom: 14px; font-weight: 500; } .js_title_inner { white-space: pre-wrap; } @supports (-webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch) { .rich_media_title { font-weight: 500; } } body.windows-title-bold .rich_media_title { font-weight: 700; } .rich_media_meta_list { margin-bottom: 22px; line-height: 20px; font-size: 0px; overflow-wrap: break-word; hyphens: auto; } .rich_media_meta_list em { font-style: normal; } .rich_media_meta_list .weui-wa-hotarea::after { min-height: 100%; min-width: 100%; padding: 5px 4px; } .rich_media_meta_list .rich_media_meta_padding .rich_media_meta:last-child { padding-right: 40px; } .rich_media_meta { display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; margin: 0px 10px 10px 0px; font-size: 15px; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); } .rich_media_meta.icon_appmsg_tag { margin-right: 4px; } .rich_media_meta.appmsg_title_tag { margin-right: 8px; overflow: visible; } .rich_media_meta.meta_tag_text { margin-right: 0px; } .rich_media_meta_primary { display: block; margin-bottom: 10px; font-size: 15px; } .meta_enterprise_tag img { width: 30px; display: block; position: relative; margin-top: -3px; border: 0px; height: 30px !important; } .rich_media_meta_link { color: var(--weui-LINK); } .rich_media_meta_text { color: var(--weui-FG-2); } .rich_media_meta_text.rich_media_meta_split { padding-left: 10px; } .rich_media_meta_text.rich_media_meta_split::before { position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 0px; margin-top: -6px; content: " "; display: block; border-left: 1px solid var(--weui-FG-1); width: 200%; height: 130%; box-sizing: border-box; transform: scale(0.5); transform-origin: 0px 0px; } .rich_media_meta_text.article_modify_tag, .rich_media_meta_nickname { position: relative; } .rich_media_meta_ting::before { display: inline-block; vertical-align: top; font-size: 10px; width: 2em; height: 2em; mask-position: 50% 50%; mask-repeat: no-repeat; mask-size: 100%; background-color: currentcolor; content: ""; margin-right: 2px; .wx-root[data-weui-theme="dark"], body[data-weui-theme="dark"] { --weui-BTN-ACTIVE-MASK: rgba(255, 255, 255, .2); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .wx-root:not([data-weui-theme="light"]), body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) { --weui-BTN-ACTIVE-MASK: rgba(255, 255, 255, .2); } } .wx-root, body { --weui-BTN-DEFAULT-ACTIVE-BG: #e6e6e6; } .wx-root[data-weui-theme="dark"], body[data-weui-theme="dark"] { --weui-BTN-DEFAULT-ACTIVE-BG: rgba(255, 255, 255, .126); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .wx-root:not([data-weui-theme="light"]), body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) { --weui-BTN-DEFAULT-ACTIVE-BG: rgba(255, 255, 255, .126); } } .wx-root, body { --weui-DIALOG-LINE-COLOR: rgba(0, 0, 0, .1); } .wx-root[data-weui-theme="dark"], body[data-weui-theme="dark"] { --weui-DIALOG-LINE-COLOR: rgba(255, 255, 255, .1); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .wx-root:not([data-weui-theme="light"]), body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) { --weui-DIALOG-LINE-COLOR: rgba(255, 255, 255, .1); } } .weui-primary-loading { font-size: 16px; display: inline-flex; position: relative; width: 1em; height: 1em; vertical-align: middle; color: rgb(96, 96, 96); animation: 1s steps(60) 0s infinite normal none running circleLoading; } .weui-primary-loading__dot { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 50%; margin-left: -0.04375em; width: 0.0875em; height: 0.0875em; border-top-right-radius: 100%; border-bottom-right-radius: 100%; background: currentcolor; } .weui-primary-loading::before, .weui-primary-loading::after { content: ""; display: block; width: 0.5em; height: 1em; box-sizing: border-box; border: 0.0875em solid; } .weui-primary-loading::before { border-right-width: 0px; border-top-left-radius: 1em; border-bottom-left-radius: 1em; mask-image: linear-gradient(rgb(0, 0, 0) 8%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3) 95%); } .weui-primary-loading::after { border-left-width: 0px; border-top-right-radius: 1em; border-bottom-right-radius: 1em; mask-image: linear-gradient(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 8%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3) 95%); } .weui-primary-loading__dot { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 50%; margin-left: -0.04375em; width: 0.0875em; height: 0.0875em; border-top-right-radius: 0.0875em; border-bottom-right-radius: 0.0875em; background: currentcolor; } @keyframes circleLoading { 0% { transform: rotate3d(0, 0, 1, 0deg); } 100% { transform: rotate3d(0, 0, 1, 360deg); } } .weui-primary-loading_brand { color: var(--weui-BRAND); } .weui-primary-loading_transparent { color: rgb(237, 237, 237); } mp-common-search, mppoi, qqmusic, redpacketcover, mpvoice, mp-wxaproduct, mpcps, mp-qa, mplive, mpproduct, .video_iframe { pointer-events: auto; } .ct_geography_loc_card { background-color: rgb(247, 247, 247); border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 8px; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; } .location_title { font-size: 17px; line-height: 1.3; padding: 0px 4px; } .location_detail { font-size: 14px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); line-height: 1.3; padding: 4px 4px 12px; } .line-clamp1 { overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .location_img_wrp { width: 100%; padding-top: 37.88%; border-radius: 2px; overflow: hidden; background-size: 200%; background-position: center center; } .location_img { width: 100%; height: 100px; object-fit: cover; transform-origin: center center; transform: scale(2); } .ct_geography_loc_tip { text-align: center; padding: 0px 5px; margin: 16px auto; } .ct_geography_loc_tip::before { content: ""; display: inline-block; position: relative; top: -2px; vertical-align: middle; width: 20px; height: 20px; margin-right: 4px; background-size: cover; background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf8,%3Csvg } .wx-edui-video_account_name { color: var(--weui-FG-0); margin: 0px 2px 0px 6px; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; max-width: calc(100% - 40px); } .mpsubscribe { display: inline-block; min-width: calc(4em + 24px); } wx-open-subscribe-dialog { z-index: 5000; } .subsc_btn { font-size: inherit; display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 0px; margin: 0px; color: rgb(87, 107, 149); } .icon_subsc { display: flex; width: 20px; height: 20px; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-right: 4px; box-sizing: border-box; border-radius: 100%; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 0px 0px 3px; } .icon_subsc::before { content: ""; display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; width: 14px; height: 14px; mask: url("data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf8,%3Csvg no-repeat; background-color: currentcolor; } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .subsc_btn { color: rgb(125, 144, 169); } .icon_subsc { box-shadow: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1) 0px 0px 3px; } } .qa__card { background-color: rgb(247, 247, 247); border-radius: 8px; display: block; line-height: 1.4; margin: 16px 0px; text-align: left; color: rgb(51, 51, 51); } .qa__card .icon_praise_gray { width: 20px; height: 20px; background-size: 14.5px 14.5px; background-position: center center; background-color: currentcolor; mask-repeat: no-repeat; mask-position: 50% 50%; mask-size: cover; 2.678-.07 3.255.781zM7.6 10.838a.6.6 0 0 0-.6.6v7.645a.6.6 0 1 0 1.2 0v-7.645a.6.6 0 0 0-.6-.6z'/%3E%3C/svg%3E"); } .qa__card .weui-loadmore { width: 123px; margin-top: 20px; } .qa__card .weui-loadmore_dot .weui-loadmore__tips { padding: 0px 20px; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .qa__card .weui-half-screen-dialog__title { font-size: 17px; font-weight: 500; } .qa__card .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__side { left: 0px; } .qa__card .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__main + .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__side { right: 0px; } .qa__card_write .emotion_tool { padding-top: 16px; } .qa__card_write .weui-half-screen-dialog { background-color: rgb(247, 247, 247); } .qa__card_write .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd { border-radius: 12px 12px 0px 0px; } .qa__card_write .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd, .qa__card_write .qa__modal-reply { background-color: var(--weui-BG-2); } .qa__card_write .weui-half-screen-dialog__bd { padding-top: 0px; } .qa__card_write .weui-half-screen-dialog__bd .qa__modal-reply { padding-top: 4px; overflow-x: hidden; } .qa__card_write .weui-loadmore_dot .weui-loadmore__tips { background-color: rgb(247, 247, 247); } .qa__card-deleted { text-align: center; line-height: 95px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); font-size: 14px; display: block; } .qa__card-hd { padding: 20px 20px 16px; position: relative; display: block; } .qa__card-hd::after { content: ""; position: absolute; left: 20px; right: 20px; bottom: 0px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); transform: scaleY(0.5); transform-origin: left bottom; } .qa__card-hd:last-child { padding-bottom: 20px; } .qa__card-hd:last-child::after { display: none; } .qa__list:last-child { padding-bottom: 8px; } .qa__list-answer { color: rgb(87, 107, 149); text-align: center; display: block; padding: 16px 0px; font-size: 14px; } .qa__list-answer_desc { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); } .qa__hd-notice { display: block; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); line-height: 16px; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 8px; } .qa__hd-question { display: block; font-size: 17px; line-height: 22px; font-weight: 500; } .qa__list-hd { display: block; font-size: 14px; padding: 16px 20px 6px; overflow: hidden; } .qa__list-hd-title { display: block; float: left; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); } .qa__list-hd-desc { display: block; float: right; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); } .qa__list-hd-action { display: block; float: right; color: rgb(87, 107, 149); } .qa__list { display: block; } .qa__list-item { padding: 10px 20px; display: flex; align-items: flex-start; font-size: 15px; position: relative; } .qa__list-item:last-child { padding-bottom: 12px; } .qa__item-avatar { width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 2px; overflow: hidden; margin-right: 8px; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 3px; } .qa__item-avatar img { width: 100%; height: 100%; } .qa__item-info { display: flex; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 4px; } .qa__item-nickname { font-size: 14px; line-height: 1; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); flex: 1 1 0%; } .qa__item-bd { flex: 1 1 0%; overflow: hidden; } .qa__item-action { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; line-height: 20px; font-size: 14px; } .qa__action { display: flex; align-items: center; color: rgb(87, 107, 149); padding: 0px 8px; position: relative; } .qa__action i:not(:last-child) { margin-right: 4px; } .qa__action:last-child { padding-right: 0px; } .qa__action:last-child::after { display: none; } .qa__action::after { content: ""; display: block; height: 12px; border-right: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); position: absolute; 255, 255); font-size: 16px; } .account_info { padding: 0px 0px 20px; } .account_info .flex_bd { padding-left: 0.85em; } .radius_avatar.account_avatar { width: 28px; height: 28px; padding: 0px; } .wx-root[data-weui-theme="dark"], body[data-weui-theme="dark"] { --APPMSGCARD-BG: #1E1E1E; } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .wx-root:not([data-weui-theme="light"]), .original_primary_desc { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); font-size: 14px; padding-top: 4px; width: auto; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; overflow-wrap: normal; } .original_page { background-color: transparent; } .account_info { -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); outline: 0px; padding-bottom: 16px; font-size: 16px; } opacity: 0.9; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; color: var(--weui-FG-0); } .share_media { padding-bottom: 30px; } .live-icon { font-size: 20px; color: rgb(255, 97, 70); vertical-align: bottom; position: relative; height: 1em; width: 1em; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; overflow: hidden; } .live-icon-scale { transform: scale(0.25); position: absolute; height: 4em; width: 4em; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; } .live-icon-inner { position: absolute; width: 1.84em; height: 1.84em; background: currentcolor; border-radius: 50%; animation: 2.3s linear 0s infinite normal none running live-icon-inner; } @keyframes live-icon-inner { 0% { animation-timing-function: ease-in; } 23% { width: 1.9em; height: 1.9em; animation-timing-function: ease-out; } 43% { width: 0px; height: 0px; animation-timing-function: linear; } 55% { width: 0px; height: 0px; animation-timing-function: ease-in; } 74% { width: 2em; height: 2em; animation-timing-function: ease-out; } } .live-icon-outer { border-radius: 50%; box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; position: absolute; width: 1.84em; height: 1.84em; animation: 2.3s linear 0s infinite normal none running live-icon-outer; } @keyframes live-icon-outer { 0% { width: 1.84em; height: 1.84em; border-width: 0px; animation-timing-function: ease-out; } 22% { width: 2.2em; height: 2.2em; border-width: 0px; animation-timing-function: ease-out; } 50% { width: 2.8em; height: 2.8em; border-width: 1.4em; animation-timing-function: ease-in; } 72% { width: 2.2em; height: 2.2em; border-width: 0px; animation-timing-function: ease-in; } 100% { width: 1.84em; height: 1.84em; border-width: 0px; } } .live-icon-wrapper { border-radius: 50%; box-sizing: border-box; border: 0.3em solid; position: absolute; width: 3.4em; height: 3.4em; animation: 2.3s ease 0s infinite normal none running live-icon-wrapper; } @keyframes live-icon-wrapper { 0% { animation-timing-function: ease-in; } 23.9% { width: 2.05em; height: 2.05em; opacity: 1; } 24%, 74% { opacity: 0; } 74.1% { width: 2.05em; height: 2.05em; opacity: 1; } 100% { animation-timing-function: ease-out; } } .wxw_wechannel_card { margin: 16px auto; font-size: 14px; text-align: left; line-height: 1.4; letter-spacing: normal; overflow: hidden; width: 66.5%; .wxw_wechannel_avatar.wxw_wechannel_avatar { width: 20px; border-radius: 50%; margin-right: 8px; height: 20px !important; } .wxw_wechannel_nickname { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9); font-weight: 500; width: auto; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; overflow-wrap: normal; line-height: 1.2; } .wxw_wechannel_desc { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9); width: auto; overflow: hidden; max-height: 88vw; background-position: 50% 0px; background-size: cover; } .wxw_wechannel_img_navs { padding: 12px 12px 0px; text-align: center; margin-bottom: -4px; } .wxw_wechannel_img_nav { display: inline-block; vertical-align: top; width: 6px; height: 6px; margin: 0px 4px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } .wxw_wechannel_img_nav.wxw_wechannel_img_nav_current { background: rgb(250, 157, 59); } .wxw_wechannel_video_context { position: relative; } .wxw_wechannel_video_context .weui-play-btn { width: 52px; height: 52px; } .wxw_wechannel_card_live { width: auto; max-width: none; } .wxw_wechannel_card_live .wxw_wechannel_card_bd .wxw_wechannel_live_desc { overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; display: block; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9); } .wxw_wechannel_live_nickname { width: auto; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; overflow-wrap: normal; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 500; } .wxw_wechannel_live_desc { margin-top: 2px; overflow-wrap: break-word; hyphens: auto; } .wxw_wechannel_live_tips { margin-top: 16px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); line-height: 1.4; font-size: 14px; } .wxw_wechannel_live_hd .wxw_wechannel_live_avatar { width: 4.4em; border-radius: 100%; margin-right: 10px; font-size: 10px; height: 4.4em !important; } .wxw_wechannel_live_ft .wxw_wechannel_live_btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; letter-spacing: 1px; } .wxw_wechannel_live_btn { background: rgb(255, 97, 70); } .wxw_wechannel_live_btn .icon_wxw_wechannel_live { .wxw_wechannel_live_btn.wx_tap_highlight_active::after { content: ""; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } .wxw_wechannel_card_topic { width: auto; max-width: none; } .wxw_wechannel_card_topic .wxw_wechannel_card_ft { padding-left: 16px; padding-right: 16px; } .wxw_wechannel_card_topic 0.5); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; } .wxw_wechannel_topic_name { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9); font-size: 17px; font-weight: 500; } .wxw_wechannel_topic_tips { margin-top: 16px; color: rgba(0, 0, .wxw_wechannel_topic_tips + .wxw_wechannel_topic_tips { margin-top: 4px; } .wxw_wechannel_topic_hd .wxw_wechannel_topic_avatar { width: 2em; border-radius: 100%; margin-right: 8px; font-size: 10px; .wx_search_highlight { animation: 2s ease-in-out 0.15s 1 normal none running searchHighlight; } @-webkit-keyframes searchHighlight { 0% { background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); } 30% { background-color: rgba(7, 193, 96, 0.3); } 70% { background-color: rgba(7, 193, 96, 0.3); } 100% { background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); } } @keyframes searchHighlight { 0% { background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); } 30% { background-color: rgba(7, 193, 96, 0.3); } 70% { background-color: rgba(7, 193, 96, 0.3); } 100% { background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); } } .icon_appmsg_tag { display: inline-block; vertical-align: rgba(9, 187, 7, 0.08); font-size: 12px; border-radius: 0.95em / 50%; } .icon_appmsg_tag.default { border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); background-color: transparent; .weui-icon-read.weui-icon-read { width: 6px; height: 8px; mask-size: cover; mask-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg width='6' height='8' viewBox='0 0 6 8' fill='none' fill-opacity='0.3'/%3E%3C/svg%3E"); margin: 0px 0px 2px 4px; color: var(--weui-FG); } .article-tag__list { font-size: 0px; margin: 0px; padding: 24px 0px 0px; border-radius: 0px; background-color: var(--weui-BG-2); user-select: none; } .article-tag__list:empty { margin: 0px; display: none; } .article-tag__list.single-tag__wrp { padding: 14px 16px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } .article-tag__list.single-tag__wrp .article-tag-card__title { line-height: 20px; display: inline-block; } .article-tag__list.single-tag__wrp .article-tag__item-wrp { display: inline-block; } .article-tag__list.single-tag__wrp .article-tag-card__left { margin-right: 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .article-tag__list.single-tag__wrp .article-tag-card__right { font-size: 15px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); line-height: 20px; padding-right: 14px; flex-shrink: 0; position: relative; } .article-tag__list.single-tag__wrp .article-tag-card__right::after { content: ""; position: absolute; right: 0px; display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; font-size: 10px; width: 1em; height: 2em; background-size: cover; background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf8,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='10' height='20' viewBox='0 0 10 20'%3E %3Cpath fill-opacity='.3' fill-rule='evenodd' d='M2.045 5.484l.884-.884 4.816 4.816a.83.83 0 0 1 0 1.177l-4.816 4.816-.884-.884 4.52-4.52-4.52-4.521z'/%3E%3C/svg%3E"); } .article-tag__list .article-tag__item { display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; line-height: 14px; color: rgb(87, 107, 149); } .article-tag__list .article-tag__item:last-child { margin-right: 0px; } .article-tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; } .article-tag__item-wrp { margin: 8px 12px 0px 0px; gap: 4px; position: relative; display: flex; } .article-tag__item-wrp.weui-wa-hotarea::after { min-height: 100%; padding: 3px 6px; } .article-tag__item-wrp:last-child { margin-right: 0px; } .article-tag__item-wrp.no-active .article-tag__item { background: transparent; } .article-tag__item-num { display: inline-block; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); border-radius: 8px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 14px; } .article-tag-card__title { font-size: 15px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); line-height: 20px; } .article-tag__error-tips { background: rgb(76, 76, 76); border-radius: 8px; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9); padding: 12px 16px; font-size: 17px; position: fixed; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); top: 45%; left: 50%; z-index: 3; } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) .article-tag__list.single-tag__wrp .article-tag-card__right { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); } body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) .article-tag__list.single-tag__wrp .article-tag-card__right::after { background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf8,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='10' height='20' viewBox='0 0 10 20'%3E %3Cpath fill='%23FFFFFF' fill-opacity='.3' fill-rule='evenodd' d='M2.045 5.484l.884-.884 4.816 4.816a.83.83 0 0 1 0 1.177l-4.816 4.816-.884-.884 4.52-4.52-4.52-4.521z'/%3E%3C/svg%3E"); } body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) .article-tag__list .article-tag__item { color: rgb(125, 144, 169); } body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) .article-tag__error-tips { background: rgb(64, 64, 64); } body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) .article-tag-card__title { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); } body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) .article-tag__item-num { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); } } .read-more__area { margin: 30px 0px; } .read-more__desc { margin-bottom: 10px; } .read-more__article__extra { font-size: 14px; color: var(--weui-FG-1); } .read-more__article__item { margin-bottom: 10px; } :root { --sab: env(safe-area-inset-bottom); } .rich_media_wrp { position: relative; } @font-face { font-family: WeChatSansStd-Medium; src: format("truetype"); } .pay button { min-width: 184px; box-sizing: border-box; min-height: 48px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background-color: rgb(250, 157, 59); color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-size: 17px; border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: none; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 500; position: relative; outline: 0px; width: auto; font-family: -apple-system-font, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Helvetica Neue", "PingFang SC", "Hiragino Sans GB", "Microsoft YaHei UI", "Microsoft YaHei", Arial, sans-serif; overflow: hidden; user-select: none; white-space: nowrap; } .pay button .price { font-family: WeChatSansStd-Medium; } .pay button > div { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .pay button > div .weui-primary-loading { margin-top: 0px; } .pay .weui-btn_primary { background-color: rgb(250, 157, 59); } .pay .weui-btn_primary:not(.weui-btn_disabled):active { background-color: rgb(250, 157, 59); } .pay .weui-btn_primary:not(.weui-btn_disabled):active::before { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 0px; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } .pay button:not(.btn_disabled):active::after { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 0px; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } .pay button.btn_disabled { background-color: rgb(242, 242, 242); color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18); } .pay_new button { background-color: rgb(7, 193, 96); font-size: 14px; min-height: 40px; font-weight: 700; } .pay_new .pay__notice-btn-lg, .pay_new .pay__notice-btn-lg button { font-size: 17px; } .pay_new .price { font-family: WeChatSansSS-Medium; font-weight: 500; } .pay_new .pay__icon-wecoin { margin-right: 0.17em; margin-top: -2px; } .pay_new .weui-btn_primary { background-color: rgb(7, 193, 96); } .pay_new .weui-btn_primary:not(.weui-btn_disabled):active { background-color: rgb(7, 193, 96); } .pay__mask { position: absolute; width: 100%; left: 0px; bottom: 0px; text-align: center; } .pay__notice { padding: 16px; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; border-top: .5px solid var(--weui-FG-3); position: fixed; bottom: 0px; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%); background-color: var(--weui-BG-3); z-index: 500; transition: 0.3s; } .pay__notice button.btn_disabled { background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .pay__notice .weui-btn { padding: 0px 16px; min-width: 0px; } .pay__notice_largeFont .pay__intro-content { display: block; margin-right: 12px; } .pay__notice_largeFont .pay__intro-content .pay__notice-title, .pay__notice_largeFont .pay__intro-content .pay__notice-desc { font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 12px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); } .pay__notice_largeFont .pay__intro-content .pay__notice-title { white-space: nowrap; } .pay__notice_largeFont .pay__intro-content .pay__notice-title::after { content: "’╝ī"; } .pay__notice_new { transition: none; background-color: var(--weui-BG-2); } .pay__notice_new .pay__intro-content { flex-flow: row; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: center; } .pay__notice_new .pay__intro-content .pay__notice-title, .pay__notice_new .pay__intro-content .pay__notice-desc { font-size: 14px; color: var(--weui-FG-1); margin-top: 0px; } .pay__notice_new .pay__intro-content .pay__notice-title { white-space: nowrap; } .pay__notice_new .pay__intro-content .pay__notice-title::after { content: "’╝ī"; } .pay__notice_new .pay__intro-content .pay__notice-title.empty-after-content::after { content: ""; } .pay__notice_new .pay__intro-content .pay__notice-desc { white-space: normal; } .pay__notice_new .weui-btn { padding: 5px 8px; min-height: 36px; } .pay__notice_show { visibility: visible; opacity: 1; } .pay__notice-intro { display: flex; padding-top: 8px; max-width: 677px; align-items: center; } .pay__intro-content { flex: 1 1 0%; font-size: 14px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: center; } .pay__intro-content .pay__notice-desc { font-size: 12px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); line-height: 20px; margin-top: 3px; } .pay__notice-title { line-height: 24px; font-size: 17px; } .pay__notice-main { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); padding-right: 30px; font-size: 17px; display: flex; align-items: center; height: 54px; } .pay__notice-close { position: absolute; right: 0px; top: 0px; padding: 16px; font-size: 0px; } .pay__notice-close::before { content: ""; display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; width: 24px; height: 24px; background-size: cover; background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf8,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' xmlns:xlink='http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink' width='24' height='24' viewBox='0 0 24 24'%3E %3Cdefs%3E %3Cpath id='c4adbcb4-e5f6-47ae-8835-e10a689c1c34-a' d='M8 6.943L1.807.75.75 1.807 6.943 8 .75 14.193l1.057 1.057L8 9.057l6.193 6.193 1.057-1.057L9.057 8l6.193-6.193L14.193.75z'/%3E %3C/defs%3E %3Cuse fill-opacity='.9' fill-rule='evenodd' opacity='.3' transform='translate(4 4)' xlink:href='%23c4adbcb4-e5f6-47ae-8835-e10a689c1c34-a'/%3E%3C/svg%3E"); } .pay__worth { appearance: none; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); outline: 0px; background-color: transparent; border: 0px; display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; padding: 0px; font-size: 15px; line-height: 2.13333; color: rgb(87, 107, 149); } .pay__worth::before { content: ""; display: inline-block; margin-top: -0.25em; vertical-align: middle; width: 20px; height: 20px; background-size: cover; background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf8,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='20' height='20' viewBox='0 0 20 20'%3E %3Cg fill='none' fill-rule='evenodd'%3E %3Cpath d='M0 .pay__worth-desc { color: rgb(87, 107, 149); font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px; } .pay__desc { font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px; margin-top: 12px; text-align: center; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); margin-bottom: -8px; } .pay__notice-qrcode { display: none; position: absolute; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%); bottom: 70px; width: 218px; padding: 40px 0px; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(51, 51, 51); box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) 0px 1px 9px; border-radius: 4px; text-align: center; z-index: 100; } .pay__qrcode-wrp { height: 124px; } .pay__qrcode-wrp img { width: 124px; } .pay__qrcode-title { margin-top: 20px; font-size: 14px; } .pay__static { position: relative; z-index: 10; text-align: center; padding-bottom: 48px; margin-bottom: -23px; } .pay__static h3 { padding-top: 40px; font-size: 17px; margin-bottom: 4px; font-weight: 500; } .pay__static p { font-size: 14px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); } .pay__static button { margin-top: 32px; outline: none; } .pay__static button:active { outline: none; } .pay__static .pay__notice-qrcode_bottom { top: 120px; bottom: auto; } .pay__mask_static { margin-top: -120px; height: 120px; position: relative; background: linear-gradient(rgba(255, 255, 255, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); pointer-events: none; } @media screen and (min-width: 677px) { .pay__notice-intro { max-width: 677px; margin: 0px auto; box-sizing: border-box; position: relative; } } .reward_area + .pay__detail-wrp { margin-top: 12px !important; padding-top: 0px !important; } .reward_qrcode_area + .pay__detail-wrp { margin-top: 12px !important; padding-top: 0px !important; } .pay__main + .pay__detail-wrp { margin-bottom: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; margin-top: 20px !important; padding-top: 0px !important; } .pay__head-notice { font-size: 14px; padding-top: 12px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); line-height: 20px; } .pay__preview-tips { color: var(--weui-FG-2); margin-top: 12px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px; } .pay__gift { background-color: rgb(247, 247, 247); border-radius: 4px; padding: 20px; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 16px; user-select: none; } .pay__gift-hd { display: flex; align-items: center; } .pay__gift-sender-avatar { font-size: 0px; width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 2.8px; overflow: hidden; margin-right: 8px; } .pay__gift-sender-avatar img { width: 100%; height: 100%; } .pay__gift-sender-name { margin-right: 8px; font-weight: 500; } .pay__gift-bd { margin-top: 8px; line-height: 19.6px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); } .pay__gift-send { position: fixed; left: 12px; right: 12px; background-color: rgb(243, 243, 243); padding: 16px; display: flex; align-items: center; z-index: 1000; border-radius: 8px; user-select: none; bottom: -64px; opacity: 0; transition: bottom 0.3s, opacity 0.3s; } .pay__gift-send_static { position: static; opacity: 1; transition: none; margin: 16px 0px 32px; } @media (min-width: 375px) { .pay__gift-send_static { width: 344px; box-sizing: border-box; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; } } .pay__gift-send.show { opacity: 1; bottom: calc(8px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom)); } .pay__gift-send-content { flex: 1 1 0%; } .pay__gift-send-title { font-size: 17px; } .pay__gift-send-desc { font-size: 12px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); } .pay__gift-send-btn { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); padding: 0px 12px; border-radius: 3px; background-color: rgb(220, 189, 126); font-weight: 500; line-height: 32px; font-size: 16px; margin-left: 12px; text-align: center; overflow: hidden; position: relative; user-select: none; } .pay__gift-send-btn:active::after { content: ""; width: 100%; height: 100%; position: absolute; left: 0px; top: 0px; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } .pay__icon-wecoin { display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; width: 16px; height: 16px; mask: 50% 50% / cover no-repeat; background-color: currentcolor; margin-right: 0.26em; } .pay__wecoin { display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center; padding-top: 20px; } .pay__wecoin-title { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 24px; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 500; } .pay__wecoin-title .pay__icon-wecoin { width: 24px; color: rgb(7, 193, 96); height: 24px; margin-bottom: 16px; } .pay__wecoin-content { display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; height: 44px; } .pay__wecoin-content .pay__icon-wecoin { width: 30px; height: 30px; color: rgb(7, 193, 96); margin-right: 4px; } .pay__wecoin-content .price { font-size: 40px; font-family: WeChatSansStd-Medium; } .pay__wecoin-tips { margin-top: 12px; margin-bottom: -8px; font-size: 14px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); } .pay__wecoin-term { font-size: 14px; color: rgb(170, 170, 170); margin-bottom: 16px; } .pay__wecoin-term .weui-icon-checked { margin-right: 0.2em; margin-bottom: 1px; width: 1.07em !important; height: 1.07em !important; } .pay__wecoin-content-price { margin-top: -16px; } .pay__bottom-modal .weui-half-screen-dialog__ft { padding-bottom: 16px; } .pay__bottom-modal .weui-half-screen-dialog__attachment-area a { font-size: 14px; } .pay__wecoin-entry { background-color: rgb(247, 247, 247); display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0px 8px; font-size: 15px; height: 1.6em; border-radius: 0.8em; } .pay__wecoin-entry .pay__icon-wecoin { width: 15px; height: 15px; color: rgb(7, 193, 96); margin-bottom: 1px; } .pay__wecoin-entry .price { font-size: 15px; font-family: WeChatSansStd-Medium; } .pay__wecoin-entry::after { content: ""; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; width: 0.53em; height: 1.06em; mask: url("data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf8,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='8' height='16' viewBox='0 0 8 16'%3E %3Cpath fill-opacity='.5' fill-rule='evenodd' d='M1.636 4.387l.707-.707 3.853 .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd { height: 64px; } .pay__bottom-modal .wx_bottom_modal .weui-half-screen-dialog__bd { overflow: hidden; padding-top: 4px; } .pay__bottom-modal .weui-icon-btn { background: transparent; } .pay__bottom-modal .weui-half-screen-dialog__attachment-wrp { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-top: 24px; } .pay__bottom-modal .weui-half-screen-dialog__attachment-wrp .weui-half-screen-dialog__attachment-link { color: rgb(87, 107, 149); padding: 0px 12px; line-height: 20px; font-size: 14px; position: relative; } .pay__wecoin-edu { font-size: 17px; } .pay__wecoin-edu-title { font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 24px; } .pay__edu-modal .weui-half-screen-dialog { background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .pay__edu-modal .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd { height: 64px; } .pay__edu-modal .weui-half-screen-dialog__bd { text-align: center; padding-top: 40px; font-size: 17px; padding-bottom: 32px; } .pay__edu-modal .pay__wecoin-edu-title { text-align: center; font-size: 17px; margin-bottom: 32px; font-weight: 400; } .pay__edu-modal .pay__wecoin-edu-pic { width: 264px; height: 197px; background-size: cover; background-image: url("https://res.wx.qq.com/t/fed_upload/808a5349-b428-492e-95ad-6bbff0fda93b/1.png"); position: relative; margin: 0px auto; } .pay__edu-modal .pay__wecoin-edu-avatar { position: absolute; width: 45px; height: 45px; left: 12px; top: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); justify-content: center; } .pay__edu-modal .pay__wecoin-edu-avatar img { width: 100%; } .pay__edu-modal .pay__wecoin-edu-nic { font-size: 15px; position: absolute; top: 24px; left: 65px; max-width: 180px; overflow: hidden; white-space: nowrap; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .pay__wecoin-edu-desc { margin-bottom: 8px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); } .pay__wecoin-edu-desc span { font-weight: 500; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); } .pay__wecoin-edu-modal .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd { height: 64px; } .pay__wecoin-edu-modal .pay__wecoin-edu-link { display: block; margin-bottom: -40px; position: relative; top: 16px; } .pay__topic-tips { text-align: center; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.55); user-select: none; } .pay__topic { margin: 32px 0px; padding: 0px 16px; border-radius: 8px; background-color: rgb(250, 250, 250); text-align: left; font-size: 14px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); user-select: none; } .pay__topic-hd { padding: 20px 0px 16px; position: relative; } .pay__topic-hd::after { content: ""; position: absolute; left: 0px; right: 0px; bottom: 0px; transform: scaleY(0.5); border-top: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06); } .pay__topic-main { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; } .pay__topic-main-wrp { flex: 1 1 0%; overflow: hidden; margin-right: 16px; } .pay__topic-title { font-weight: 500; font-size: 17px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9); line-height: 20px; overflow: hidden; white-space: nowrap; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .pay__topic-meta { margin-top: 4px; line-height: 18px; } .pay__topic-bd { padding: 20px 0px 24px; position: relative; } .pay__topic-list { list-style: none; margin-top: 16px; } .pay__topic-list li { margin-bottom: 8px; line-height: 20px; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden; } .pay__topic-list li:last-child { margin-bottom: 0px; } .pay__topic-notice { width: 100%; overflow: hidden; } .pay__topic-notice .pay__notice-intro { overflow: hidden; } .pay__topic-notice .pay__notice-desc { margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 4px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); font-size: 14px; letter-spacing: 0px; } .pay__topic-notice button { min-width: auto; } .pay__topic-notice .pay__intro-content { margin-right: 16px; overflow: hidden; } .pay__topic-notice .pay__notice-title { max-width: 100%; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .pay__topic { background-color: rgb(30, 30, 30); color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); } .pay__topic-hd::after { border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); } .pay__topic-tips { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); } .pay__topic-title { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); } .pay__intro-content .pay__notice-desc { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); } .pay__edu-modal .weui-half-screen-dialog { background-color: rgb(44, 44, 44); } .pay__edu-modal .pay__wecoin-edu-pic { height: 201px; background-image: url("https://res.wx.qq.com/t/fed_upload/91903f31-6a3c-4bca-915a-52b953d4b83e/intro.png"); } .pay__bottom-modal .weui-half-screen-dialog__attachment-link { color: rgb(125, 144, 169); } .pay__wecoin-edu-desc { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); } .pay__wecoin-edu-desc span { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); } .pay__wecoin-entry { background-color: rgb(32, 32, 32); } .pay__wecoin-entry::after { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); } .pay__gift { background-color: rgb(32, 32, 32); } .pay__gift-bd { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); } .pay__gift-send { background-color: rgb(42, 42, 42); color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); } .pay__gift-send-desc { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); } .pay button, .pay .weui-btn_primary { background-color: rgb(199, 125, 47); color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); } .pay .weui-btn_primary:not(.weui-btn_disabled):active { background-color: rgb(199, 125, 47); } .pay_new button, .pay_new .weui-btn_primary { background-color: rgb(7, 193, 96); color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .pay_new .weui-btn_primary:not(.weui-btn_disabled):active { background-color: rgb(7, 193, 96); } .unpay__tag { background-color: rgb(199, 125, 47); color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .pay__tag { background-color: rgba(149, 92, 33, 0.35); color: rgb(250, 157, 59); } .pay__summary, .pay__empty-notice { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); } .pay__mask_static { background: linear-gradient(rgba(25, 25, 25, 0), rgb(25, 25, 25)); } .pay button.btn_disabled, .pay .pay__notice button.btn_disabled { background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2); } .pay button:not(.btn_disabled):active { position: relative; } .pay button:not(.btn_disabled):active::after { content: ""; display: block; position: absolute; inset: 0px; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } .pay__head-notice, .pay__preview-tips { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); } .pay__notice_largeFont .pay__intro-content .pay__notice-title, .pay__notice_largeFont .pay__intro-content .pay__notice-desc, .pay__wecoin-tips { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); } } .appmsg_search_card { display: block; margin: 16px 0px; padding: 12px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.4; } .appmsg_search_card.wx_tap_highlight_active .appmsg_search_keywords_area { background: rgb(247, 247, 247); } .appmsg_search_card .appmsg_search_hd { align-items: center; } .appmsg_search_card .appmsg_search_hd .weui-flex__item { min-width: 0px; } .appmsg_search_card .appmsg_search_bd { display: block; padding-top: 12px; } .appmsg_search_card .appmsg_search_avatar { display: block; width: 20px; margin-right: 4px; border-radius: 50%; } img.appmsg_search_card .appmsg_search_avatar { height: 20px !important; } .appmsg_search_card .appmsg_search_nickname_wrp { display: flex; white-space: nowrap; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); } .appmsg_search_card .appmsg_search_nickname { display: block; width: auto; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; overflow-wrap: normal; font-weight: 700; } .appmsg_search_card .appmsg_search_keywords_area { background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 4px; text-align: center; padding: 10px 20px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .appmsg_search_card .appmsg_search_keywords_area .weui-icon-search { margin-right: 4px; font-size: 10px; width: 2em; height: 2em; } .appmsg_search_card .appmsg_search_keywords_list { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9); width: auto; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; overflow-wrap: normal; display: block; font-size: 0px; } .appmsg_search_card .appmsg_search_keywords { display: inline; font-size: 14px; } .appmsg_search_card .appmsg_search_keywords::before { content: " | "; position: relative; top: -1px; } .appmsg_search_card .appmsg_search_keywords:first-child::before { display: none; } @media screen and (max-width: 320px) { .appmsg_search_card .appmsg_search_keywords_area { padding-left: 14px; padding-right: 14px; } } @supports (-apple-color-filter: initial) { .appmsg_search_card .appmsg_search_nickname { font-weight: 500; } } .rich_split_tips { margin: 20px 0px; min-height: 24px; } .rich_media_tool_tips { margin-bottom: 8px; } .rich_media_tool { overflow: hidden; } .rich_media_tool .meta_primary { float: left; margin-right: 10px; } .rich_media_tool .meta_primary.article_modify_tag { margin-bottom: 0px; float: none; color: rgb(188, 188, 188); font-size: 14px; } .rich_media_tool .meta_extra { float: right; margin-left: 10px; } .rich_media_tool .meta_praise { text-align: right; } .meta_praise { -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); outline: 0px; min-width: 3.5em; } .meta_praise .praise_num { display: inline-block; vertical-align: top; } .icon_praise_gray { background: 0px 0px / 100% no-repeat transparent; width: 13px; height: 13px; vertical-align: middle; display: inline-block; } .icon_praise_gray.praised, .praised .icon_praise_gray { background-position: 0px -18px; } .sns_opr_btn { display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; font-family: inherit; appearance: none; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); user-select: none; outline: 0px; background: transparent; border: 0px; padding: 0px; color: var(--weui-LINK); margin-top: -0.2em; } .sns_opr_btn::before { content: ""; display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; font-size: 24px; width: 1em; height: 1em; margin-top: -0.1em; mask-repeat: no-repeat; mask-position: 50% 50%; mask-size: cover; background-color: currentcolor; } .sns_opr_btn[disabled] { color: var(--weui-FG-3); } .sns_opr_btn.sns_opr_btn_break { white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: break-word; hyphens: auto; line-height: 1.4; max-width: 100%; margin-top: 0px; } .sns_opr_btn.sns_opr_btn_break::before { display: block; margin: 0px auto 2px; } .sns_opr_btn.sns_opr_btn_break .sns_opr_gap { display: inline-block; vertical-align: top; max-width: 100%; margin-left: 0px; min-width: 2.1em; } .sns_opr_btn.sns_opr_btn_break .sns_opr_gap:empty { display: none; } .sns_opr_btn.sns_opr_btn_break.sns_praise_btn::before { top: 0px; } .sns_opr_gap { margin-left: 4px; } .sns_opr_gap:empty { fill-opacity='0.9'/%3E%3C/svg%3E%0A"); } .hide-mark { display: none; } .rich_media_tool_area { margin-top: 32px; padding-bottom: 20px; } .rich_media_tool { font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.4; overflow: visible; letter-spacing: 0px; } .rich_media_tool .rich_media_info { flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 20px; } .rich_media_tool .rich_media_info.rich_media_bottom { margin-bottom: 0px; } .rich_media_tool .rich_media_info:empty { display: none; } .rich_media_tool .media_tool_meta { float: none; flex-shrink: 0; max-width: 100%; } .rich_media_tool .meta_primary { margin-right: 12px; } .rich_media_tool .meta_primary:last-child { margin-right: 0px; } .rich_media_tool .meta_extra { color: rgb(87, 107, 149); margin-left: 12px; } .rich_media_tool .meta_extra:first-child { margin-left: 0px; } .rich_media_tool .meta_praise { min-width: 0px; color: rgb(87, 107, 149); } .rich_media_tool .sns_opr_area { justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; } .rich_media_tool .sns_opr_area .media_tool_meta { display: inline-flex; vertical-align: top; white-space: nowrap; } .rich_media_tool .sns_opr_area .meta_primary:not(:last-child) { margin-right: 32px; } .rich_media_tool .sns_opr_area .meta_extra:not(:first-child) { margin-left: 32px; } .rich_media_tool .sns_opr_area_smart .sns_opr_btn { color: var(--weui-LINK); } .rich_media_tool .sns_opr_area_smart.sns_opr_area_smart_abtest .sns_opr_btn { color: var(--weui-FG-0); } .rich_media_tool .sns_opr_area_smart.sns_opr_area_smart_abtest .like_btn_liked { color: var(--weui-YELLOW); } .rich_media_tool .sns_opr_area_smart.sns_opr_area_smart_abtest .praised .sns_opr_btn { color: var(--weui-RED); } .rich_media_tool .sns_opr_area_smart .sns_opr_area_primary { min-width: 0px; } .rich_media_tool .sns_opr_area_smart .sns_opr_area_extra { flex-shrink: 0; } .rich_media_tool .sns_opr_area_smart .meta_primary:not(:last-child) { margin-right: 22px; } .rich_media_tool .sns_opr_area_smart .meta_extra:not(:first-child) { margin-left: 22px; } .rich_media_tool .sns_opr_area_smart .sns_opr_btn::before { font-size: 2em; } .icon_praise_gray { background-image: word-break: normal; } .pic_haokan { width: 76%; height: auto; } .like_num { font-size: 15px; margin-left: 0.2em; } .like_btn_liked { color: rgb(255, 195, 0); } .like_comment_wrp { font-size: 17px; padding-top: 12px; margin-bottom: 7px; position: relative; z-index: 1; } .like_comment_wrp .like_comment_tail { width: 10px; height: 10px; transform: matrix(0.71, 0.71, -0.71, 0.71, 0, 0); position: absolute; top: 7px; right: 10px; border-radius: 1px; background-color: rgb(247, 247, 247); } .like_comment_inner { background-color: rgb(247, 247, 247); border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; padding: content: " "; display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; font-size: 10px; height: 2em; width: 1em; margin-left: 4px; margin-top: -0.2em; mask: url("data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf8,%3Csvg .like_comment_tips > i { margin-top: -0.2em; } .like_comment_tips > i.weui-icon-success { width: 2em; height: 2em; margin-right: 8px; } .like_comment_bd { -webkit-box-flex: 1; flex: 1 1 0%; line-height: 1.6; } .like_comment_ft { padding-left: 16px; } .like_comment_btn { display: none; outline: 0px; appearance: none; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); border-width: 0px; background-color: transparent; font-size: 17px; color: rgb(255, 195, 0); } .like_comment_btn[disabled="disabled"] { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); } .like_comment_textarea { height: 1.6em; caret-color: rgb(26, 173, 25); } .like_comment_textarea::-webkit-input-placeholder { color: rgb(178, 178, 178); } .like_comment_extra_info > button { margin-top: 24px; } .like_comment_extra_tips { font-size: 15px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); line-height: 1.4; margin: 16px 0px; } .like_comment_pic { display: block; width: 263px; margin: 0px auto; } .like_comment_primary_wrp { font-size: 16px; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); position: fixed; inset: 16px 0px 0px; z-index: 51; border-top-left-radius: 12px; border-top-right-radius: 12px; } .fullscreen-padding .like_comment_primary_wrp { top: calc(16px + var(--normal-top-insets)); } .like_comment_primary_wrp .like_comment_textarea_wrp { margin-top: 16px; padding-top: 14px; position: relative; } .like_comment_primary_wrp .like_comment_textarea_wrp::after { color: var(--weui-FG-3); content: " "; position: absolute; left: 0px; top: 0px; right: 0px; height: 1px; border-top: 1px solid var(--weui-FG-3); transform-origin: 0px 0px; transform: scaleY(0.3); } .like_comment_primary_wrp .like_comment_textarea { height: 102px; } .like_comment_primary_wrp .like_comment_counter { font-size: 14px; margin-top: 8px; color: var(--weui-FG-1); } .like_comment_primary_wrp .like_comment_counter_warn { color: var(--weui-RED); } .like_comment_primary_inner { padding: 0px 24px; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 12px 12px 0px 0px; overflow: hidden; } .like_comment_primary_hd { display: flex; align-items: center; font-size: 8px; height: 8em; } .like_comment_primary_title { -webkit-box-flex: 1; flex: 1 1 0%; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; padding: 0px 16px; text-align: center; color: var(--weui-FG-0); } .like_comment_primary_cancel { outline: 0px; appearance: none; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); border-width: 0px; background-color: transparent; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9); font-size: 0px; } .like_comment_primary_cancel:active { color: rgba(134, 134, 134, 0.95); } .like_comment_primary_btn { outline: 0px; appearance: none; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); border-width: 0px; background-color: rgb(255, 195, 0); font-size: 16px; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); padding: 0px 12px; line-height: 2; font-weight: 700; border-radius: 6px; white-space: nowrap; } .like_comment_primary_btn[disabled] { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2); background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); } .like_comment_primary_btn:not([disabled]):active { background: rgb(230, 176, 0); } .authorize-main_header .like_comment_primary_wrp.like_comment_primary_wrp .like_comment_primary_inner, .reward_area_carry_whisper .like_comment_primary_wrp.like_comment_primary_wrp .like_comment_primary_inner { padding: 0px 16px; } .authorize-main_header .like_comment_primary_bd, .reward_area_carry_whisper .like_comment_primary_bd { padding: 0px 8px; } .authorize-main_header .like_comment_primary_btn[disabled], .reward_area_carry_whisper .like_comment_primary_btn[disabled] { background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); } .authorize-main_header .like_comment_primary_btn, .reward_area_carry_whisper .like_comment_primary_btn { background-color: rgb(7, 193, 96); } .authorize-main_header .like_comment_primary_btn:not([disabled]):active, .reward_area_carry_whisper .like_comment_primary_btn:not([disabled]):active { background-color: rgb(6, 173, 86); } .authorize-main_header .like_comment_primary_hd_side, .reward_area_carry_whisper .like_comment_primary_hd_side { display: flex; justify-content: flex-start; left: -5px; } .authorize-main_header .like_comment_primary_title + .like_comment_primary_hd_side, .reward_area_carry_whisper .like_comment_primary_title + .like_comment_primary_hd_side { justify-content: flex-end; right: auto; left: auto; } .like_comment_primary_hd_side { position: relative; left: -8px; width: 64px; } .like_comment_primary_title + .like_comment_primary_hd_side { left: auto; right: -8px; } .like_comment_primary_bd { margin-top: 8px; position: relative; } .like_comment_media_title { font-size: 14px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); line-height: 1.4; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; } .like_comment_primary_mask { position: fixed; z-index: 50; inset: 0px; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2); } @media screen and (device-aspect-ratio: 0.666667 / 1), screen and (device-aspect-ratio: 0.56338 / 1) { .like_comment_primary_wrp .like_comment_textarea { height: 90px; } } .pages_skin_pc .meta_like { position: relative; } .pages_skin_pc .like_comment_wrp { width: auto; min-width: 285px; position: absolute; right: -13px; z-index: 50; margin: 0px; top: 100%; padding-top: 10px; } .pages_skin_pc .like_comment_wrp .like_comment_tail { top: 5px; right: 20px; } .pages_skin_pc .like_comment_wrp::after { content: ""; position: absolute; height: 12px; top: 11px; left: 8px; right: 8px; background-color: var(--weui-BG-5); } .pages_skin_pc .like_comment_wrp .like_comment_tail, .pages_skin_pc .like_comment_inner { background-color: var(--weui-BG-5); box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15) 0px 0px 8px; border: 1px solid var(--weui-FG-4); } .pages_skin_pc .like_comment_tips { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: var(--weui-FG-0); font-size: 14px; } .pages_skin_pc .like_comment_tips > i { top: 0px; margin-top: 0px; } .pages_skin_pc .like_comment_share_link { margin-left: 16px; } .pages_skin_pc .like_comment_pos_up { top: auto; bottom: 100%; padding-bottom: 10px; } .pages_skin_pc .like_comment_pos_up::before { top: auto; transform: matrix(0.71, 0.71, -0.71, 0.71, 0, 0); bottom: 5px; } .pages_skin_pc .like_comment_pos_up::after { top: auto; bottom: 11px; } .pages_skin_pc .like_comment_pos_center { right: 12px; transform: translate(50%); } .pages_skin_pc .like_comment_pos_center::before { right: 50%; margin-right: -6px; } .pages_skin_pc .like_comment_primary_wrp.like_comment_primary_wrp { background-color: transparent; top: 0px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .pages_skin_pc .like_comment_primary_wrp.like_comment_primary_wrp .weui-btn { width: 108px; line-height: 1; border-radius: 4px; font-weight: 400; font-size: 14px; margin: 0px 8px; } .pages_skin_pc .like_comment_primary_wrp.like_comment_primary_wrp .weui-btn + .weui-btn { margin-top: 0px; } .pages_skin_pc .like_comment_primary_wrp.like_comment_primary_wrp .weui-btn[disabled]::before, .pages_skin_pc .like_comment_primary_wrp.like_comment_primary_wrp .weui-btn.weui-btn_disabled::before, .pages_skin_pc .like_comment_primary_wrp.like_comment_primary_wrp .weui-btn.weui-btn_loading::before { display: none; } .pages_skin_pc .like_comment_primary_wrp.like_comment_primary_wrp .weui-btn.weui-btn_default { color: var(--weui-BRAND); background-color: var(--weui-FG-6); } .pages_skin_pc .like_comment_primary_inner { width: 360px; box-sizing: border-box; padding: 24px 32px; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15) 0px 0px 10px 3px; } .pages_skin_pc .like_comment_primary_title { font-size: 14px; } .pages_skin_pc .like_comment_primary_hd { height: auto; } .pages_skin_pc .like_comment_primary_bd { margin-top: 24px; } .pages_skin_pc .like_comment_primary_ft { display: flex; justify-content: center; margin-top: 36px; } .pages_skin_pc .like_comment_textarea { position: relative; z-index: 1; height: auto; min-height: 102px; max-height: 300px; line-height: 1.4; overflow: auto; -webkit-user-modify: read-write-plaintext-only; top: 3px; margin-left: -32px; margin-right: -32px; padding-left: 32px; padding-right: 32px; } .pages_skin_pc .like_comment_textarea::before { content: attr(placeholder); position: absolute; top: -2px; left: 32px; right: 0px; color: var(--weui-FG-2); } .pages_skin_pc .like_comment_textarea:not([placeholder])::before { display: none; } .pages_skin_pc .like_comment_textarea:not(:empty) { top: 0px; } .pages_skin_pc .like_comment_textarea:not(:empty)::before { top: 0px; } .pages_skin_pc .like_cancel_alert .weui-mask { background: transparent; } .wx_at_link { padding: 0px 4px; } .wx_network_msg_wrp { position: sticky; z-index: 1; top: 40px; margin-top: 40px; padding-bottom: calc(40px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom)); } .wx_network_msg_wrp:empty { display: none; } .wx_network_msg { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: var(--weui-FG-2); font-size: 14px; } .appmsg_share_notice { font-size: 16px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); position: relative; padding: 1.25em 0px; margin-bottom: 1.75em; } .appmsg_share_notice::before { .weui-icon-success-no-circle, .weui-icon-success-no-circle-thin { color: rgb(7, 193, 96); } .weui-icon-waiting-circle { color: var(--weui-BLUE); } .weui-icon-circle { color: rgb(178, 178, 178); } .weui-icon-download { color: rgb(7, 193, 96); } .weui-icon-info-circle { color: rgb(178, 178, 178); } .weui-icon-safe-success { color: rgb(7, 193, 96); } .weui-icon-safe-warn { color: var(--weui-YELLOW); } .weui-icon-cancel { color: rgb(230, 67, 64); } .weui-icon-search { color: var(--weui-FG-1); } .weui-icon-clear { color: rgb(178, 178, 178); } .weui-icon-clear:active { color: var(--weui-FG-1); } .weui-icon-delete.weui-icon_gallery-delete { color: var(--weui-WHITE); } .weui-icon-arrow.weui-icon-arrow, .weui-icon-arrow.weui-icon-arrow-bold, .weui-icon-arrow.weui-icon-back-arrow, .weui-icon-arrow.weui-icon-back-arrow-thin, .weui-icon-arrow-bold.weui-icon-arrow, .weui-icon-arrow-bold.weui-icon-arrow-bold, .weui-icon-back-arrow-thin.weui-icon-back-arrow, .weui-icon-back-arrow-thin.weui-icon-back-arrow-thin { width: 1.2em; } .weui-icon-arrow, .weui-icon-arrow-bold { color: rgb(178, 178, 178); } .weui-icon-back-arrow, .weui-icon-back-arrow-thin, .weui-icon-back, .weui-icon-back-circle { color: rgb(0, 0, 0); } .weui-icon_msg.weui-icon_msg { width: 6.4em; height: 6.4em; } .weui-icon_msg.weui-icon_msg.weui-icon-warn { color: rgb(230, 67, 64); } .weui-icon_msg.weui-icon_msg.weui-icon-info-circle { color: var(--weui-BLUE); } .weui-icon_msg-primary.weui-icon_msg-primary { width: 6.4em; height: 6.4em; } .weui-icon_msg-primary.weui-icon_msg-primary.weui-icon-warn { color: var(--weui-YELLOW); } .weui-flex { display: flex; } .weui-flex__item { flex: 1 1 0%; min-width: 0px; } .weui-media-box { padding: 16px; position: relative; } .weui-media-box::before { color: rgb(229, 229, 229); content: " "; position: absolute; top: 0px; right: 0px; height: 1px; border-top: 1px solid rgb(229, 229, 229); transform-origin: 0px 0px; transform: scaleY(0.3); left: 16px; } .weui-media-box:first-child::before { display: none; } a.weui-media-box { color: rgb(0, 0, 0); -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); } a.weui-media-box:active { background-color: rgb(236, 236, 236); } .weui-media-box__title { display: block; font-weight: 400; font-size: 17px; line-height: 1.4; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); width: auto; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; overflow-wrap: break-word; hyphens: auto; } .weui-media-box__desc { color: rgb(178, 178, 178); font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.4; padding-top: 4px; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; overflow-wrap: break-word; hyphens: auto; } .weui-media-box__info { display: block; margin-top: 16px; padding-bottom: 4px; font-size: 13px; color: rgb(178, 178, 178); line-height: 1em; list-style: none; overflow: hidden; } .weui-media-box__info__meta { float: left; padding-right: 1em; } .weui-media-box__info__meta_extra { padding-left: 1em; border-left: 1px solid rgb(178, 178, 178); } .weui-media-box_appmsg { display: flex; align-items: center; } .weui-media-box_appmsg .weui-media-box__hd { margin-right: 16px; width: 60px; height: 60px; line-height: 60px; text-align: center; } .weui-media-box_appmsg .weui-media-box__thumb { width: 100%; max-height: 100%; vertical-align: top; } .weui-media-box_appmsg .weui-media-box__bd { flex: 1 1 0%; min-width: 0px; } .weui-media-box_small-appmsg { padding: 0px; } .weui-media-box_small-appmsg .weui-cells { margin-top: 0px; } .weui-media-box_small-appmsg .weui-cells::before { display: none; } .weui-link { color: rgb(88, 108, 148); -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); } .weui-link:visited { color: rgb(88, 108, 148); } .weui-link:active { opacity: 0.5; } .weui-btn { position: relative; display: block; min-width: 184px; max-width: 280px; width: fit-content; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; padding: 12px 24px; box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: 500; font-size: 17px; text-align: center; text-decoration: none; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); line-height: 1.41176; border-radius: 8px; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); cursor: default; user-select: none; } .weui-btn:active::before { content: ""; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; background-color: var(--weui-BTN-ACTIVE-MASK); border-radius: 8px; } .weui-btn:active.weui-btn_loading::before, .weui-btn:active.weui-btn_disabled::before, .weui-btn:active[disabled]::before { display: none; } .weui-btn__inner { overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; overflow-wrap: break-word; hyphens: auto; } .weui-btn_block { width: auto; } .weui-btn_inline { display: inline-block; } .weui-btn_default { color: var(--weui-FG-0); background-color: var(--weui-FG-5); } .weui-btn_default:not(.weui-btn_disabled):visited { color: var(--weui-FG-0); } .weui-btn_primary { background-color: var(--weui-BRAND); } .weui-btn_primary:not(.weui-btn_disabled):visited { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .weui-btn_warn { background-color: var(--weui-RED-100); } .weui-btn_warn:not(.weui-btn_disabled):visited { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .weui-btn_overlay.weui-btn_primary { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9); background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .weui-btn_overlay.weui-btn_primary:not(.weui-btn_disabled):visited { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9); } .weui-btn_overlay.weui-btn_default { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); background-color: rgba(247, 247, 247, 0.3); } .weui-btn_overlay.weui-btn_default:not(.weui-btn_disabled):visited { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .weui-btn_overlay.weui-btn_warn { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); background-color: var(--weui-RED-100); } .weui-btn_overlay.weui-btn_warn:not(.weui-btn_disabled):visited { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .weui-btn_overlay.weui-btn_disabled, .weui-btn_overlay[disabled] { color: rgba(247, 247, 247, 0.3); background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); } .weui-btn_disabled, .weui-btn[disabled] { color: var(--weui-FG-4); background-color: var(--weui-FG-5); } .weui-btn_loading .weui-mask-loading { font-size: 20px; margin: -0.2em 4px 0px 0px; color: currentcolor; } .weui-btn_loading .weui-mask-loading.weui-mask-loading_only { margin-right: 0px; } .weui-btn_loading.weui-btn_default .weui-mask-loading {
