height: 24px; } .refuted_appmsg_card .refuted_appmsg_card__bottom_desc { color: rgb(20, 133, 238); width: auto; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; overflow-wrap: normal; } .refuted_appmsg_card.video_rumor .refuted_appmsg_card__stamp { width: 60px; height: 60px; right: 36px; top: 38px; z-index: 3; } .refuted_appmsg_card .refuted_appmsg_card__stamp { font-size: 17px; color: var(--weui-ORANGERED); width: 64px; height: 64px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 97, 70, 0.16); border-radius: 50%; right: 24px; top: 24px; position: absolute; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; box-sizing: border-box; white-space: nowrap; } .refuted_appmsg_card .refuted_appmsg_card__stamp.hide { display: none; } .refuted_appmsg_card .refuted_appmsg_card__stamp_inner { width: 60px; height: 60px; box-sizing: border-box; border: 3px solid rgba(255, 97, 70, 0.54); border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; transform: rotate(-15deg); } .video_rumor .refuted_appmsg_card__desc { text-align: center; } body.rumor_middle_page { padding-bottom: 0px !important; background-color: var(--weui-BG-2) !important; min-height: auto !important; } body.rumor_middle_page .rich_media_area_primary { padding-top: var(--richMediaAreaPrimaryPaddingTop); padding-left: 16px; padding-right: 16px; padding-bottom: 20px; } body.rumor_middle_page .bottom_bar_wrp, body.rumor_middle_page .refuted_appmsg_card, body.rumor_middle_page #content_bottom_area, body.rumor_middle_page #js_temp_bottom_area, body.rumor_middle_page .bottom_bar_padding_mask, body.rumor_middle_page .rich_media_area_extra { display: none !important; } body.rumor_middle_page .rich_media_meta_list { visibility: hidden; height: 0px; margin-bottom: 18px; } .wx_video_context { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); position: relative; background-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); border-radius: 4px; } .wx_video_thumb, .wx_video_thumb_primary { position: absolute; left: 0px; width: 100%; top: 0px; height: 100% !important; } .wx_video_thumb_primary { background-size: cover; border-radius: 4px; background-position: 50% 50%; background-repeat: no-repeat; } .wx_video_play_btn { z-index: 2; position: absolute; left: 50%; top: calc(50% - 12px); transform: translate(-50%, -50%); font-size: 0px; border-width: 0px; background-color: transparent; padding: 0px; outline: 0px; text-align: center; width: 40px; height: 40px; background-size: cover; background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf8,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='32' height='32' viewBox='0 0 32 32'%3E %3Cg fill='none' fill-rule='evenodd'%3E %3Ccircle cx='16' cy='16' r='16' fill='%23000' fill-opacity='.15'/%3E %3Cpath fill='%23FFF' fill-rule='nonzero' d='M16 0c8.837 0 16 7.163 16 16s-7.163 16-16 16S0 24.837 0 16 7.163 0 16 0zm0 1C7.716 1 1 7.716 1 16c0 8.284 6.716 15 15 15 8.284 0 15-6.716 15-15 0-8.284-6.716-15-15-15zm-3.2 9.179a.8.8 0 0 1 .397.105l8.787 0, 0.5); } .wx_video_loading { z-index: 2; position: absolute; inset: 0px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .wx_video_loading .weui-primary-loading { font-size: 40px; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .wx_video_loading .weui-primary-loading::before, .wx_video_loading .weui-primary-loading::after { opacity: 1; border-width: 0.0875em; } .wx_video_loading .weui-primary-loading::before { border-right: 0px; } .wx_video_loading .weui-primary-loading::after { border-left: 0px; } .wx_video_loading .weui-primary-loading__dot { margin-left: -0.04375em; width: 0.0875em; height: 0.0875em; border-top-right-radius: 0.0875em; border-bottom-right-radius: 0.0875em; } .place_audio_area { min-height: 100px; background-color: rgb(253, 253, 253); display: block; margin: 16px 0px; } .place_music_area { min-height: 68px; background-color: rgb(253, 253, 253); display: block; margin: 17px 0px 16px; } .global_plain_btn { display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; padding: 0px 1em; line-height: 2; font-size: 14px; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); border-radius: 5px; } .global_plain_btn.primary { color: rgb(26, 173, 25); border: 1px solid; } .global_plain_btn.primary:active { color: rgba(26, 173, 25, 0.6); } .original_panel_tips { font-size: 12px; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); line-height: 20px; font-weight: 400; vertical-align: 2px; padding: 0px 4px; border-radius: 2px; display: inline-block; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2); } .original_panel_tips2 { font-size: 12px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); line-height: 20px; font-weight: 400; vertical-align: 2px; padding: 0px 4px; border-radius: 2px; display: inline-block; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); } .rich_media_title_ios { font-weight: 700; } .rich_media_content:not(.old_list_style) .list-paddingleft-1, .rich_media_content:not(.old_list_style) .list-paddingleft-2, .rich_media_content:not(.old_list_style) .list-paddingleft-3 { padding-left: 2.2em; } .rich_media_content:not(.old_list_style) .list-paddingleft-1 .list-paddingleft-2, .rich_media_content:not(.old_list_style) .list-paddingleft-2 .list-paddingleft-2, .rich_media_content:not(.old_list_style) .list-paddingleft-3 .list-paddingleft-2 { padding-left: 30px; } .rich_media_content:not(.old_list_style) .list-paddingleft-1 { padding-left: 1.2em; } .rich_media_content:not(.old_list_style) .list-paddingleft-3 { padding-left: 3.2em; } .rich_media_content:not(.old_list_style).fix_apple_default_style .list-paddingleft-1 { padding-left: 1.6em; } .rich_media_content:not(.old_list_style) > .extra-list-padding-level1.extra-list-padding-level1 { padding-left: 2.2em; } .rich_media_content:not(.old_list_style) > .extra-list-padding-level2.extra-list-padding-level2 { padding-left: 3.2em; } .rich_media_content.old_list_style ol, .rich_media_content.old_list_style ul { list-style-position: inside; text-align: left; } .rich_media_content.old_list_style ol li *, .rich_media_content.old_list_style ul li * { display: inline; } .rich_media_content.old_list_style .list-paddingleft-1, .rich_media_content.old_list_style .list-paddingleft-2, .rich_media_content.old_list_style .list-paddingleft-3 { padding-left: 0px; } .rich_media_content.old_list_style .list-paddingleft-1 .list-paddingleft-1, .rich_media_content.old_list_style .list-paddingleft-2 .list-paddingleft-2, .rich_media_content.old_list_style .list-paddingleft-3 .list-paddingleft-3 { padding-left: 1.2em; } .related_container .function_mod_index { position: relative; } .pages_skin_pc .related_container .function_mod_index::after { color: var(--weui-FG-3); content: " "; position: absolute; bottom: 0px; .weui-dialog__bd:first-child { font-weight: 400; } .pages_skin_pc .weui-dialog__ft { justify-content: center; padding-bottom: 30px; } .pages_skin_pc .weui-dialog__ft::after { display: none; } .pages_skin_pc .weui-dialog__btn { flex: 0 0 auto; width: 108px; line-height: 1; margin: 0px 8px; padding: 8px 24px; border-radius: 4px; box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: 400; font-size: 14px; text-align: center; text-decoration: none; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .pages_skin_pc .weui-dialog__btn::after { display: none; } .pages_skin_pc .weui-dialog__btn::before { position: absolute; top: body[data-weui-theme="dark"] .tips_global_primary.tips_global_primary { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); } .selectTdClass { background-color: rgb(237, 245, 250) !important; } table.noBorderTable td, table.noBorderTable th, table.noBorderTable caption { border: 1px dashed rgb(221, 221, 221) !important; } table { margin-bottom: 10px; border-collapse: collapse; display: table; width: 100% !important; } td, th { overflow-wrap: break-word; word-break: break-all; hyphens: auto; padding: 5px 10px; border: 1px solid rgb(221, 221, 221); } caption { border-width: 1px 1px 0px; border-style: dashed dashed none; border-color: rgb(221, 221, 221) rgb(221, 221, 221) currentcolor; border-image: none; padding: 3px; text-align: center; } th { border-top: 2px solid rgb(187, 187, 187); background: rgb(247, 247, 247); } .ue-table-interlace-color-single { background-color: rgb(252, 252, 252); } .ue-table-interlace-color-double { background-color: rgb(247, 250, 255); } td p { margin: 0px; padding: 0px; } .res_iframe { display: block; width: 100%; background-color: transparent; border: 0px; } .shopcard_iframe { margin: 14px 0px; height: 95px; } .vote_area { display: block; position: relative; margin: 14px 0px; white-space: normal !important; } .vote_iframe { display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; background-color: transparent; border: 0px; } form { display: none !important; } @media screen and (min-width: 0’┐Į) and (min-resolution: 72dpi) { .rich_media_content table { table-layout: fixed !important; } .rich_media_content td, .rich_media_content th { width: auto !important; } } .tc { text-align: center; } .tl { text-align: left; } .tr { text-align: right; } .tips_global { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); } .article_extend_area { padding: 30px 0px 0px; } .article_extend_area .hot_tag { position: relative; } .article_extend_area .hot_tag::after { content: " "; display: inline-block; height: 6px; width: 6px; border-width: 1px 1px 0px 0px; border-color: currentcolor; border-style: solid; transform: matrix(0.71, 0.71, -0.71, 0.71, 0, 0); position: absolute; top: 50%; margin-top: -3px; right: 12px; } .article_extend_area .hot_tag.icon_appmsg_tag { padding-left: 12px; padding-right: 24px; } .article_extend_area .hot_tag_inner { display: block; width: auto; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; overflow-wrap: normal; } .article_extend_area:empty { display: none; } .rich_tips { margin-top: 25px; margin-bottom: 0px; min-height: 24px; text-align: center; } .rich_tips .tips { display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; } .rich_tips .tips, .rich_tips .rich_icon { vertical-align: middle; } .rich_tips .rich_icon { } .rich_tips.with_line { border-top: 1px dotted rgb(225, 225, 225); } .rich_tips.with_line .tips { position: relative; top: -12px; padding-left: 16px; padding-right: 16px; background-color: rgb(243, 243, 243); } .rich_tips.with_line { line-height: 16px; } .rich_tips.with_line .tips { top: -11px; padding-left: 0.35em; padding-right: 0.35em; } .title_tips { margin-top: 35px; } .title_tips .tips { color: rgb(134, 134, 134); font-size: 16px; } .loading_tips { margin: 36px 0px 20px; } .title_bottom_tips { margin-top: -10px; } .icon_arrow_gray { width: 7px; } .icon_loading_white { width: 16px; } .icon_loading_white.icon_before { margin-right: 1em; } .icon_loading_white.icon_after { margin-left: 1em; } .btn { display: block; padding-left: 14px; padding-right: 14px; font-size: 14px; text-align: center; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 3px; box-sizing: border-box; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); line-height: 32px; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0); } .btn.btn_inline { display: inline-block; } .btn_primary { background-color: rgb(7, 193, 96); } .btn_primary:not(.btn_disabled):visited { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .btn_primary:not(.btn_disabled):active { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4); background-color: rgb(6, 173, 86); } .btn_disabled { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6); } .sougou_body .rich_media_area_primary { margin-top: 10px; } .sougou_body .rich_media_area_primary:first-child { margin-top: 0px; } .sougou_body .rich_media_area_title { font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 0.5em; } .sougou_body .relate_article_list { font-size: 15px; } .sougou_body .relate_article_link { display: block; padding: 0.35em 0px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); } .sougou_body .rich_tips.discuss_title_line { text-align: left; margin-top: 0px; padding: 20px 0px 0.5em; border-width: 0px; 255, 255); } .sougou_body .rich_split_tips, .sougou_body .rich_media_extra .loading_tips { margin: 0px; padding: 20px 0px; } .wx_tap_highlight_active.wx_tap_link { opacity: 0.5; } .wx_tap_highlight_active.wx_tap_card { background-color: rgb(235, 235, 235); } .wx_tap_highlight_active.wx_tap_cell { background-color: var(--weui-FG-5); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .wx_tap_highlight_active.wx_tap_card { background-color: rgb(43, 43, 43); } } .wx_css_active:active { opacity: 0.5; } .weui-dialog { position: fixed; z-index: 5000; top: 50%; left: 16px; right: 16px; transform: translateY(-50%); background-color: var(--weui-BG-2); text-align: center; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; display: flex; flex-direction: column; max-height: 90%; outline: 0px; overflow-wrap: break-word; hyphens: auto; } .weui-dialog__hd { padding: 32px 24px 16px; } .weui-dialog__title { font-weight: 500; font-size: 17px; line-height: 1.4; color: var(--weui-FG-0); } .weui-dialog__bd { overflow-y: auto; padding: 0px 24px; margin-bottom: 32px; font-size: 17px; line-height: 1.4; color: var(--weui-FG-1); } .weui-dialog__bd:first-child { min-height: 40px; padding: 32px 24px 0px; font-weight: 500; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); display: flex; flex-direction: column; -webkit-box-pack: center; justify-content: center; } .weui-dialog__ft { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; } .weui-dialog__ft::after { color: var(--weui-DIALOG-LINE-COLOR); content: " "; position: absolute; left: 0px; top: 0px; right: 0px; height: 1px; border-top: 1px solid var(--weui-DIALOG-LINE-COLOR); transform-origin: 0px 0px; transform: scaleY(0.3); } .weui-dialog__btn { flex: 1 1 0%; display: block; line-height: 1.41176; padding: 20px 8px; font-size: 17px; color: rgb(88, 108, 148); font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); user-select: none; position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .weui-dialog__btn:active { background-color: rgb(236, 236, 236); } .weui-dialog__btn::after { color: var(--weui-DIALOG-LINE-COLOR); content: " "; position: absolute; left: 0px; top: 0px; width: 1px; bottom: 0px; border-left: 1px solid var(--weui-DIALOG-LINE-COLOR); transform-origin: 0px 0px; transform: scaleX(0.5); } .weui-dialog__btn:first-child::after { display: none; } .weui-dialog__btn_default { color: var(--weui-FG-HALF); } .weui-dialog__btn_warn { color: var(--weui-RED); } .weui-dialog__btn_disabled { color: var(--weui-FG-2); } .weui-dialog_btn-wrap .weui-dialog__ft { flex-direction: column; align-items: initial; } .weui-dialog_btn-wrap .weui-dialog__btn::after { width: auto; bottom: auto; right: 0px; height: 1px; transform: scaleY(0.5); border-top: 1px solid var(--weui-DIALOG-LINE-COLOR); border-left: 0px; } .weui-dialog_btn-wrap .weui-dialog__btn:first-child::after { display: none; } .weui-skin_android .weui-dialog { text-align: left; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 0px 6px 30px; } .weui-skin_android .weui-dialog__title { font-size: 22px; line-height: 1.4; } .weui-skin_android .weui-dialog__hd { text-align: left; } .weui-skin_android .weui-dialog__bd { color: var(--weui-FG-1); text-align: left; } .weui-skin_android .weui-dialog__bd:first-child { color: rgb(0, 0, 0); } .weui-skin_android .weui-dialog__ft { display: block; text-align: right; line-height: 40px; min-height: 40px; padding: 0px 24px 16px; } .weui-skin_android .weui-dialog__ft::after { display: none; } .weui-skin_android .weui-dialog__btn { display: inline-block; vertical-align: top; padding: 0px 0.8em; } .weui-skin_android .weui-dialog__btn::after { display: none; } .weui-skin_android .weui-dialog__btn:last-child { margin-right: -0.8em; } .weui-skin_android .weui-dialog__btn_default { color: var(--weui-FG-HALF); } @media screen and (min-width: 352px) { .weui-dialog { width: 320px; margin: 0px auto; } } .weui-toast { position: fixed; z-index: 5500; min-width: 132px; max-width: 320px; padding: 28px 20px; top: 40%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); text-align: center; border-radius: 8px; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9); display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background-color: var(--weui-BG-4); filter: drop-shadow(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 0px 8px 25px); box-sizing: border-box; line-height: 1.4; } .weui-toast__wrp { z-index: 5500; position: fixed; inset: 0px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .weui-toast__wrp .weui-toast { position: static; transform: none; margin-top: -10%; } .weui-toast_text { padding: 12px 20px; min-width: 0px; min-height: 0px; } .weui-icon_toast { display: block; margin-bottom: 16px; flex-shrink: 0; } .weui-icon_toast.weui-icon_toast { width: 4em; height: 4em; } .weui-icon_toast.weui-icon-success-no-circle, .weui-icon_toast.weui-icon-warn { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9); } .weui-icon_toast.weui-loading { width: 1em; height: 1em; font-size: 40px; } .weui-icon_toast.weui-primary-loading { display: flex; width: 1em; height: 1em; font-size: 40px; color: rgb(237, 237, 237); } .weui-icon_toast.weui-primary-loading::before { border-width: 4px 0px 4px 4px; } .weui-icon_toast.weui-primary-loading::after { border-width: 4px 4px 4px 0px; } .weui-icon_toast.weui-primary-loading .weui-primary-loading__dot { width: 4px; height: 4px; border-top-right-radius: 4px; border-bottom-right-radius: 4px; } .weui-toast__content { font-size: 14px; overflow-wrap: break-word; hyphens: auto; max-width: 100%; } .weui-mask { position: fixed; z-index: 1000; inset: 0px; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); } .weui-mask_transparent { position: fixed; z-index: 1000; inset: 0px; } @keyframes weuiSlideUp { 0% { transform: translate3d(0px, 100%, 0px); } 100% { transform: translateZ(0px); } } .weui-animate_slide-up, .weui-animate-slide-up { animation: 0.3s ease 0s 1 normal forwards running weuiSlideUp; } @keyframes weuiSlideDown { 0% { transform: translateZ(0px); } 100% { transform: translate3d(0px, 100%, 0px); } } .weui-animate_slide-down, .weui-animate-slide-down { animation: 0.3s ease 0s 1 normal forwards running weuiSlideDown; } @keyframes weuiFadeIn { 0% { opacity: 0; } 100% { opacity: 1; } } .weui-animate_fade-in, .weui-animate-fade-in { animation: 0.3s ease 0s 1 normal forwards running weuiFadeIn; } @keyframes weuiFadeOut { 0% { opacity: 1; } 100% { opacity: 0; } } .weui-animate_fade-out, .weui-animate-fade-out { animation: 0.3s ease 0s 1 normal forwards running weuiFadeOut; } .weui-transition.weui-mask { transition: opacity 0.3s, visibility 0.3s; opacity: 0; visibility: hidden; } .weui-transition.weui-half-screen-dialog { transition: transform 0.3s; transform: translateY(100%); } .weui-transition_show.weui-mask { opacity: 1; visibility: visible; } .weui-transition_show.weui-half-screen-dialog { transform: translateY(0px); } .weui-loadmore { width: 65%; margin: 20px auto; text-align: center; font-size: 0px; } 0px 0px / 100% no-repeat transparent; animation: 1s steps(60) 0ms infinite normal none running weuiLoading; font-size: 0px; color: transparent; } body .weui-icon_toast.weui-primary-loading { display: inline-flex; } body .weui-toast_text .weui-icon_toast { display: none; } body .weui-toast_active:active::before { content: ""; position: absolute; left: 0px; top: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; background: var(--weui-FG-3); z-index: -1; } body .weui-toast_bottom { user-select: none; width: auto; height: auto; top: auto; left: calc(8px + env(safe-area-inset-left)); right: calc(8px + env(safe-area-inset-left)); bottom: calc(63px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom)); flex-direction: row; justify-content: space-between; padding: 12px 16px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 14px; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); transform: none; overflow: hidden; } body .weui-toast_bottom.weui-animate-slide-up { animation-name: bottomToastSlideUp; } body .weui-toast_bottom_new { user-select: none; width: auto; height: auto; max-width: none; top: auto; left: calc(16px + env(safe-area-inset-left)); right: calc(16px + env(safe-area-inset-left)); bottom: calc(63px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom)); flex-direction: row; justify-content: space-between; padding: 12px 16px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 14px; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); transform: none; overflow: hidden; } body .weui-toast_bottom_new.weui-animate-slide-up { animation-name: bottomToastSlideUp; } body .weui-toast_bottom__hd, body .weui-toast_bottom__ft { display: flex; align-items: center; word-break: break-all; } body .weui-toast_bottom__hd:not(.weui-flex__item), body .weui-toast_bottom__ft:not(.weui-flex__item) { max-width: 34%; } body .weui-toast_bottom__hd:first-child:last-child, body .weui-toast_bottom__ft:first-child:last-child { max-width: none; } body .weui-toast_bottom__new_hd { display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: flex-start; text-align: left; line-height: 1.4; } body .weui-toast_bottom__hd { text-align: left; } body .weui-toast_bottom__hd .weui-toast_bottom__icon { flex-shrink: 0; margin-right: 8px; } body .weui-toast_bottom__hd .weui-icon-success-no-circle { color: inherit; } body .weui-toast_bottom__ft { justify-content: flex-end; text-align: right; margin-left: 16px; } body .weui-toast_bottom__access-btn { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); display: inline-flex; align-items: center; text-align: right; } body .weui-toast_bottom__access-btn .weui-icon-arrow { flex-shrink: 0; color: currentcolor; margin-left: 4px; } @keyframes bottomToastSlideUp { 0% { transform: translate3d(0,calc(100% + 20px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom)),0); } 100% { transform: translateZ(0px); } } .weui-audio-btn { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 10px; width: 4em; height: 4em; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 50%; } .weui-audio-btn::before { 1 1.23 3 4.25 4.25 0 0 1-1.23 3L5 12l2.97-3z'/%3E%3C/svg%3E"); } } .topic_area { display: block; margin: 17px 1px 16px 0px; font-weight: 400; text-decoration: none; font-size: 0px; line-height: 0; text-align: left; text-size-adjust: none; } .topic_area .unsupport_tips { display: none; padding: 20px 20px 8px; line-height: 1.6; font-size: 16px; } .topic_area.unsupport .unsupport_tips { display: block; } .topic_wrp { border: 1px solid rgb(235, 235, 235); line-height: 1.6; background-color: rgb(252, 252, 252); border-radius: 3px; overflow: hidden; padding: 8px 10px; display: block; } .topic_thumb { float: left; width: 75px; height: 100px; margin-right: 20px; background-repeat: no-repeat; background-position: 50% 50%; background-size: cover; } .topic_content { position: relative; display: block; overflow: hidden; height: 100px; } .topic_title { font-weight: 400; font-size: 16px; color: rgb(34, 34, 34); } .topic_desc { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); font-size: 14px; } .topic_title, .topic_desc { overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-line-clamp: 1; } .topic_info { position: absolute; bottom: 0px; left: 0px; right: 0px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); } .topic_info_primary { float: left; margin-right: 0.5em; font-size: 14px; } .topic_info_extra { float: right; margin-left: 0.5em; font-size: 14px; } .icon_topic { background: url("/mmbizwap/zh_CN/htmledition/images/icon/appmsg/topic/icon_topic.2x.png") 0px 0px / 100% no-repeat transparent; width: 10px; height: 11px; vertical-align: middle; display: inline-block; margin: -2px 5px 0px 0px; } .iframe_full_video { inset: 0px; z-index: 1000; background-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); position: fixed !important; margin-top: 0px !important; } .video_iframe { display: block; } .video_iframe + .img_loading { display: block; } .video_ad_iframe { border: 0px; position: absolute; left: 0px; top: 0px; z-index: 100; width: 100%; height: 100%; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .article_modify_area_primary { margin-top: 16px; text-align: left; font-size: 15px; } .text_unselecet { user-select: none; } .pay_reading_area { padding: 60px 8px 30px; box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0px auto; } .pay_tit_tips_wrp { position: relative; } .pay_tit_tips_wrp::before { color: rgb(224, 224, 224); content: " "; position: absolute; left: 0px; top: 0px; right: 0px; height: 1px; border-top: 1px solid rgb(224, 224, 224); transform-origin: 0px 0px; transform: scaleY(0.3); } .pay_tit_tips { position: relative; top: -0.75em; padding: 0px 0.5em; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); } .pay_tit_sub_tips { overflow-wrap: break-word; hyphens: auto; margin: -12px 0px 10px; } .btn_pay_reading { width: 180px; height: 35px; line-height: 35px; text-align: center; border-radius: 3px; color: rgb(10, 186, 7); border: 1px solid rgb(10, 186, 7); margin: 5px 0px 14px; display: inline-block; } .btn_pay_reading.disabled { border-color: rgb(213, 214, 215); color: rgb(196, 194, 197); background-color: rgb(251, 251, 253); } .pay_tips { font-size: 14px; } .pop_tips .inner { width: 280px; box-sizing: border-box; border-radius: 5px; font-size: 14px; background-color: rgb(247, 247, 249); position: fixed; left: 50%; top: 28%; margin-left: -140px; z-index: 20; } .pop_tips .inner .tips_title { font-size: 16px; display: block; vertical-align: middle; max-width: 98%; padding: 15px 10px 0px; color: rgb(62, 62, 62); text-align: center; } .pop_tips .inner .tips_con { color: rgb(136, 136, 136); font-size: 14px; padding: 10px 15px; } .pop_tips .inner .tips_opr { line-height: 50px; font-size: 18px; } .pop_tips .inner .tips_opr .ft_btn { position: relative; width: 280px; display: block; text-align: center; color: rgb(10, 186, 7); } .pop_tips .inner .tips_opr .ft_btn::before { color: rgb(236, 236, 236); content: " "; position: absolute; top: 0px; right: 0px; height: 1px; border-top: 1px solid rgb(236, 236, 236); transform-origin: 0px 0px; transform: scaleY(0.3); left: 0px; } .pop_tips .mask { width: 100%; height: 100%; position: fixed; left: 0px; top: 0px; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4); z-index: 1; } .wx_poptips_wrp.pay_reading { top: 50%; margin-top: -60px; } .wx_poptips_wrp.pay_reading .toast_content { margin-top: 75px; } .weui_loading { width: 20px; height: 20px; display: 0% 0% / 100% no-repeat transparent; } @-webkit-keyframes weuiLoading { 0% { transform: rotate3d(0, 0, 1, 0deg); } 100% { transform: rotate3d(0, 0, 1, 360deg); } } @keyframes weuiLoading { 0% { transform: rotate3d(0, 0, 1, 0deg); } 100% { transform: rotate3d(0, 0, 1, 360deg); } } .gif_img_wrp { display: inline-block; font-size: 0px; position: relative; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; text-indent: 0px; } .gif_img_wrp img { vertical-align: top; } .gif_img_tips { border-radius: 1.2em / 50%; line-height: 2.3; font-size: 11px; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); text-align: center; position: absolute; bottom: 10px; left: 10px; min-width: 65px; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6) !important; } .gif_img_tips.loading { min-width: 75px; } .gif_img_tips i { vertical-align: middle; margin: -0.2em 0.73em 0px -2px; } .gif_img_play_arrow { display: inline-block; width: 0px; height: 0px; border-style: dashed dashed dashed solid; border-color: transparent transparent transparent rgb(255, 255, 255); border-width: 5px 0px 5px 8px; } .gif_img_loading { width: 14px; height: 14px; } i.gif_img_loading { margin-left: -4px; } .gif_bg_tips_wrp { position: relative; height: 0px; line-height: 0; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; } .gif_bg_tips_wrp .gif_img_tips_group { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; z-index: 9999; } .gif_bg_tips_wrp .gif_img_tips_group .gif_img_tips { top: 0px; left: 0px; bottom: auto; } .weapp_card .weapp_card_avatar { padding: 0px; } .weapp_card.flex_context { padding: 12px 15px; } .weapp_card.flex_context .weapp_card_hd { padding-right: 1em; } .weapp_card.flex_context .weapp_card_avatar { width: 50px; height: 50px; } .weapp_card.flex_context .weapp_card_nickname { font-size: 17px; font-weight: 400; display: block; width: auto; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; overflow-wrap: normal; } .weapp_card.app_context { overflow: visible; padding-top: 12px; } .weapp_card.app_context .weapp_card_bd { padding: 0px 12px 8px; } .weapp_card.app_context .weapp_card_profile { font-size: 14px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); } .weapp_card.app_context .weapp_card_avatar { font-size: 10px; width: 2em; height: 2em; margin-right: 6px; } .weapp_card.app_context .flex_bd { min-width: 0px; } .weapp_card.app_context .weapp_card_nickname_wrp { display: flex; align-items: center; } .weapp_card.app_context .weapp_card_nickname { width: overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; font-weight: 400; } .weapp_card.app_context .weapp_card_thumb_wrp { position: relative; display: block; padding-bottom: 80%; overflow: hidden; border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: none; border-radius: 2px; transform: scale(1); } .weapp_card.app_context .weapp_card_thumb_wrp .weapp_card_thumb_img { position: absolute; width: 100%; left: 50%; top: 50%; transform: translate3d(-50%, -50%, 0px); } .weapp_card.app_context .weapp_card_thumb { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100% !important; } .weapp_card.app_context .weapp_card_ft { padding: 0px 12px 8px; line-height: 1.3; } .weapp_card.app_context, .weapp_card .weapp_card_bd, .weapp_card .weapp_card_ft, .weapp_card .weapp_card_nickname, .weapp_card .weapp_card_info, .weapp_card .weapp_card_title { display: block; } .weapp_card_logo { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); font-size: 14px; } .weapp_card_logo::before { content: ""; display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; width: 18px; height: 18px; margin-top: -0.2em; } .cps_inner_info_adTag { width: 26px; height: 14px; line-height: 14px; text-align: center; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); border-radius: 1px; font-size: 9px; } .cps_inner { margin: 12px 0px; border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; } .cps_inner:active .cps_inner_content { position: relative; } .cps_inner:active .cps_inner_content::after { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; right: 0px; height: 100%; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); content: " "; border-radius: inherit; } .cps_inner_info_title { font-weight: 700; } .cps_inner_btn_cps_info { .mod_title_context .title_bottom_tips { font-size: 15px; } .mod_title_context_primary.weui-loadmore_line { font-size: 15px; margin-top: 0.5em; margin-bottom: -0.3em; width: 100%; } .wx_ad_placeholder { border-radius: 8px; margin: 0px auto; --width: 0px; --height: 0px; width: var(--width); height: var(--height); padding-bottom: var(--padding-bottom); background-image: !important; background-position-x: !important; background-position-y: !important; background-repeat: !important; background-attachment: !important; background-origin: !important; background-clip: !important; background-color: !important; background-size: 16px !important; } .short_play_ad.card { width: 65%; padding-bottom: calc(86.6667%); } .short_play_ad.list { width: 100%; padding-bottom: 122px; } -webkit-line-clamp: 2; overflow-wrap: break-word; hyphens: auto; } .audio_card_desc { display: block; font-size: 12px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); width: auto; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: 0.3); padding-top: 8px; line-height: 1.2; overflow: hidden; } .audio_card_tips em { font-style: normal; } .audio_card_length_current { float: left; } .audio_card_length_current::before { position: 1.2px; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); position: relative; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 2px; } .audio_card_progress_inner { height: 100%; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9); position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; z-index: 1; } .audio_card_progress_buffer { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; bottom: 0px; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.19); } .audio_card_progress_loading { position: absolute; width: 100%; height: 100%; border-radius: inherit; } .wx_border_avatar::after { content: ""; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; right: calc(100% * (1 - var(--wxBorderAvatarRatio))); bottom: .wx_follow_context .function_mod { height: 0px; overflow: hidden; transition: height 0.5s; } .wx_follow_context.wx_follow_hide .function_mod { margin: 0px; } .wx_follow_media { padding: 14px 16px var(--weui-FG-5); background-size: cover; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); } .wx_follow_avatar_pic { display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; } .wx_follow_info { padding-right: 16px; line-height: 1.4; } .wx_follow_nickname { width: auto; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; overflow-wrap: normal; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9); -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); } .wx_follow_nickname:not(:empty) + .wx_follow_tips { margin-top: 2px; } .wx_follow_tips { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); font-size: 14px; display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; } .wx_follow_tips_meta { margin-right: 8px; } .wx_follow_tips_meta:last-child { margin-right: 0px; } .wx_follow_opr { font-size: 10px; min-height: 4em; display: flex; align-items: center; } .wx_follow_opr .weui-btn.weui-btn_xmini { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-width: 68px; border-radius: 4px; font-family: "PingFang SC"; } .wx_follow_opr .weui-btn.weui-btn_xmini::before { border-radius: 4px; } .wx_follow_opr .weui-btn.weui-btn_xmini [class*=" weui-icon-"], .wx_follow_opr .weui-btn.weui-btn_xmini [class^="weui-icon-"] { font-size: 110px; width: 0.08em; height: 0.08em; margin-right: 2px; } .wx_follow_primary { padding: 0px; } .wx_follow_primary .function_mod { margin: 13px -20px 0px; transition: none; border-radius: 0px; height: auto !important; } .wx_follow_primary .wx_follow_media { padding: 16px 20px; position: relative; } .wx_follow_primary .wx_follow_media::before { color: var(--weui-FG-3); content: " "; position: absolute; top: 0px; height: 1px; border-top: 1px solid var(--weui-FG-3); transform-origin: 0px 0px; transform: scaleY(0.3); left: 20px; right: 20px; } .wx_follow_primary .wx_follow_avatar { width: 4.4em; height: 4.4em; min-width: 44px; min-height: 44px; margin-right: 10px; } .wx_follow_primary .wx_follow_nickname { font-size: 17px; line-height: calc(1.17647); } .wx_follow_primary .wx_follow_nickname:not(:empty) + .wx_follow_tips { margin-top: 4px; } .wx_follow_primary .wx_follow_tips_meta_friend { white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .wx_follow_primary .wx_follow_opr { min-height: 4.4em; } .wx_follow_primary .wx_follow_opr .weui-btn.weui-btn_xmini { min-width: 0px; } .wx_follow_smart { padding-right: 24px; } .wx_follow_smart .function_mod { margin: 0px; overflow: initial; } .wx_follow_smart .wx_follow_media { padding: 0px; } .wx_follow_smart .wx_follow_media::before { content: none; } .wx_follow_smart .wx_follow_avatar { width: 1em; height: 1em; margin-right: 6px; } .wx_follow_smart .wx_follow_info { padding-right: 6px; } .wx_follow_smart .wx_follow_nickname { font-size: 14px; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-line-clamp: 3; white-space: unset; overflow-wrap: unset; } .wx_follow_smart .wx_follow_tips { font-size: 12px; } .wx_follow_smart .wx_follow_opr { min-height: 3.2em; } .wx_follow_smart .wx_follow_opr .weui-btn.weui-btn_xmini { padding: 2.5px 6px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; line-height: calc(1.33333); } .wx_follow_smart .bar_friend_count { overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-line-clamp: 1; line-height: calc(1.41667); } .wx_follow_smart .bar_ai_btn { line-height: 1.5; color: var(--weui-FG-1); align-items: center; } .wx_follow_smart .bar_ai_btn .bar_ai_text { overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-line-clamp: 1; flex: 1 1 0%; } .wx_follow_smart .bar_ai_btn::after { content: ""; display: block; width: 5px; height: 5px; border-top: 1px solid var(--weui-FG-1); border-right: 1px solid var(--weui-FG-1); transform: rotate(45deg); } .wx_follow_large_font { padding-right: 24px; } .wx_follow_large_font .wx_follow_avatar { margin-right: 4px; } .wx_follow_large_font .wx_follow_info { padding-right: 8px; } .wx_follow_top { display: inline-block; vertical-align: top; } .wx_follow_top.wx_follow_smart { padding-right: 0px; } .wx_follow_top.wx_follow_smart .wx_follow_nickname { -webkit-line-clamp: 1; } .wx_follow_top.wx_follow_smart .wx_follow_hd { font-size: 10px; display: flex; align-items: center; flex-shrink: 0; } .wx_follow_top.wx_follow_smart .wx_follow_hd .wx_follow_avatar { width: 2.8em; height: 2.8em; min-width: 28px; min-height: 28px; margin-right: 4px; } .wx_follow_top.wx_follow_smart .wx_follow_bd { flex: unset; min-width: 0px; } .wx_follow_top.wx_follow_smart .wx_follow_bd .wx_follow_info { padding-right: 8px; } .wx_follow_top.wx_follow_smart .wx_follow_opr { min-height: 2.8em; } .mask_ellipsis_placeholder { width: 50%; height: 2.9em; } .mask_ellipsis { width: 200%; } .mask_ellipsis_text, .mask_ellipsis_placeholder, .mask_ellipsis_extra { float: left; } .mask_ellipsis_text { 255, 255, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255) 2.5em); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) .mask_ellipsis_extra { background: linear-gradient(to right, rgba(25, 25, 25, 0), .weui-media-box_placeholder::after { content: ""; display: block; font-size: 10px; width: 6.4em; height: 6.4em; background-color: currentcolor; border-radius: 1px; margin-left: 16px; } @keyframes flash { 0% { opacity: 0.3; } 100% { opacity: 1; } } .weui-flex__item { min-width: 0px; } .minishop_card { line-height: 1.4; overflow: hidden; margin: 16px 0px; text-align: left; } .minishop_card_bd { position: relative; display: flex; flex-direction: column; padding: 12px 12px 14px; } .minishop_card_thumb { width: 122px; height: 122px; background-size: cover; background-position: 50% 50%; background-repeat: no-repeat; display: block; } .minishop_main_context { flex: 1 1 0%; } .minishop_card_title { font-size: 17px; line-height: 1.2; font-weight: 500; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9); display: block; width: auto; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; overflow-wrap: normal; } .minishop_card_desc { color: var(--weui-FG-1); font-size: 15px; margin-top: 2px; width: auto; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; overflow-wrap: normal; } .minishop_card_profile { align-items: center; margin-top: 6px; line-height: 1.2; } .minishop_card_profile_avatar { font-size: 10px; width: 1.4em; height: 1.4em; background-size: cover; background-position: 50% 50%; background-repeat: no-repeat; display: block; border-radius: 100%; margin-right: 4px; } .minishop_card_profile_nickname { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 400; width: auto; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; overflow-wrap: normal; display: block; } .minishop_extra_context { align-items: flex-end; justify-content: space-between; margin-top: 2px; } .minishop_extra_context .weui-btn { margin: 0px 0px 0px format("truetype"); } em.minishop_card_price::before { content: "┬ź"; } .cps_card em.minishop_card_price { color: rgb(250, 157, 59); } .weui-btn_orange { background: rgb(250, 157, 59); } .minishop_card_buy_btn.minishop_card_buy_btn.minishop_card_buy_btn { background: rgb(255, 97, 70); padding-left: 9px; padding-right: 9px; } .icon_minishop_card_buy { display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; font-size: 10px; width: 1.3em; height: 1.2em; mask: url("data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf8,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='13' height='12' viewBox='0 0 13 12'%3E .minishop_card_small .minishop_card_thumb { margin: 1px 0px 0px 1px; border-top-left-radius: 8px; border-bottom-left-radius: 8px; } .minishop_card_small .minishop_card_bd { overflow: hidden; height: 124px; } .minishop_card_small .minishop_main_context { overflow: hidden; min-height: 0px; display: flex; flex-flow: column wrap; } .minishop_card_large { padding: 8px; } .minishop_card_large .minishop_card_thumb { width: 100%; height: auto; padding-bottom: 100%; } .minishop_card_large .minishop_card_profile { margin: 8px 0px 0px; } .minishop_card_large .minishop_card_bd { padding: 12px 4px 6px; } .minishop_card_large .cps_card_tag { left: 12px; top: 12px; } .cps_card_tag { position: absolute; z-index: 1; top: 6px; left: 6px; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); font-size: 10px; line-height: 1.6; padding: 0px 4px; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2); border-radius: 2px; } .icon_logo_weapp { background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf8,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='18' height='18' viewBox='0 0 18 18'%3E %3Cpath fill='%236467F0' fill-rule='evenodd' d='M12.753 9.743l-.177.003c-.535 0-.846-.393-.645-.845a1.16 1.16 0 0 1 2.322-1.963V6.353c0-1.899 1.698-3.428 3.788-3.428s3.788 1.53 3.788 3.428c0 1.674-1.283 3.079-3.072 3.39z'/%3E%3C/svg%3E"); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) .minishop_card_title { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); } body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) .minishop_card_profile_nickname { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); } body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) em.minishop_card_price { color: rgb(255, 97, 70); } .cps_card body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) em.minishop_card_price { color: rgb(200, 125, 47); } body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) .weui-btn_orange { background: rgb(200, 125, 47); } } .weui-transition_opacity-hide { display: none; } .page_no_scroll { height: 100%; overflow: hidden; } .page_no_scroll::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; } .comment_primary_area { padding: 32px var(--appmsgPageGap) 0; } .comment_primary_area img { margin: 0px; } .comment_primary_area .comment_input_profile { margin-bottom: 12px; } .comment_primary_area .comment_input_profile_avatar { font-size: 24px; } .comment_primary_area_pc { padding-top: 0px; } .comment_primary_area_pc .comment_primary_input_default { font-size: 14px; } .comment_primary_form { position: relative; } .comment_primary_form::after { content: "ŌĆŗ"; display: block; height: 0px; clear: both; } .comment_primary_form_hd { float: left; margin-top: 4px; margin-right: 8px; } .comment_primary_avatar { display: block; width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 2px; background-color: rgb(204, 204, 204); } .comment_primary_input_default { background-color: var(--weui-FG-6); padding: 0px 8px; line-height: 40px; color: var(--weui-FG-2); border-radius: 2px; font-size: 15px; cursor: text; } .comment_primary_input_placeholder { color: var(--weui-FG-2); font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.4; position: absolute; top: 6px; left: 12px; right: 12px; } .comment_primary_input_area { background-color: var(--weui-FG-6); font-size: 0px; border-radius: 4px; position: relative; color: var(--weui-FG-0); } .discuss_reply_form_area .comment_input_profile { position: relative; float: left; margin-top: 3px; margin-right: 14px; } .discuss_reply_form_area .comment_input_profile_avatar { margin-right: 0px; font-size: 34px; } .discuss_reply_form_area .comment_input_profile_avatar.private { transform: scale(calc(0.941176)); } .discuss_reply_form_area .comment_input_transfer_btn { position: absolute; bottom: 0px; right: 0px; transform: translate3d(50%, 25%, 0px); } .discuss_reply_form_area .weui-icon-channels.weui-icon-channels, .discuss_reply_form_area .comment_input_profile_nickname { display: none; } .discuss_reply_form_area .comment_primary_input_area_con { overflow: hidden; } .discuss_reply_form_area .comment_primary_input_area { margin-top: 4px; margin-bottom: 4px; } .discuss_reply_form_area .comment_primary_input_placeholder { display: flex; } .discuss_reply_form_area .comment_primary_input_placeholder > span:first-child { flex-shrink: 0; } .discuss_reply_form_area .comment_primary_input_placeholder_nickname { width: auto; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; overflow-wrap: normal; margin-left: 2px; } .comment_primary_input_multiline_con { display: flex; align-items: center; } .comment_primary_input_multiline { flex: 1 1 0%; position: relative; } .discuss_media .comment_primary_input_multiline .comment_primary_input_placeholder { display: none; } .comment_primary_input_multiline .comment_primary_input_area { display: block; } 0, 0); color: var(--weui-FG-O); outline: 0px; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.4; padding: 0px 10px; user-select: text; max-height: 125px; box-sizing: border-box; overflow-y: auto; position: relative; z-index: 1; caret-color: rgb(7, 193, 96); } .comment_primary_input_highlight .comment_primary_input_area, .comment_primary_input_editing .comment_primary_input_area { position: relative; } var(--weui-mask-elpsFontSize); color: var(--weui-mask-elpsColor); text-align: justify; overflow: hidden; position: relative; max-height: calc(var(--weui-mask-elpsLine) * var(--weui-mask-elpsLineHeight) * 1em); } .weui-mask-ellipsis__wrp > .weui-mask-ellipsis__text { width: 100%; visibility: hidden; } .weui-mask-ellipsis { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 200%; } .weui-mask-ellipsis__text, .weui-mask-ellipsis__placeholder, .weui-mask-ellipsis__extra { float: left; } .weui-mask-ellipsis__placeholder { width: 50%; } .weui-mask-ellipsis__placeholder::before { display: block; content: "11"; width: 0px; overflow-wrap: break-word; } .weui-mask-ellipsis__text { width: 50%; } .weui-mask-ellipsis__extra { transform: translate(-100%, -100%); } .weui-mask-ellipsis__extra { min-width: 5.6em; text-align: right; background: var(--weui-mask-gradient); } .weui-mask-ellipsis_unfold { max-height: unset; } .weui-mask-ellipsis_unfold .weui-mask-ellipsis__placeholder, .weui-mask-ellipsis_unfold .weui-mask-ellipsis__extra { display: none; } @media screen and (min-width: 1024px) { body:not(.pages_skin_pc) .discuss_message_content a:first-child, .discuss_message_content mp-common-product:first-child, .discuss_message_content a + a, .discuss_message_content mp-common-product + a, .discuss_message_content a + mp-common-product, .discuss_message_content mp-common-product + mp-common-product { margin-left: 0px; } .comment__push__input__faker a, .comment__push__input__rich_text a, .comment__push__input__fake__rich_text mp-common-product, .comment_textarea mp-common-product, .comment_reply_mod mp-common-product { margin-left: 0px; } .comment__push__input__faker a.wx_img_ref_highlight, .comment__push__input__rich_text a.wx_img_ref_highlight, .comment__push__input__fake__rich_text a.wx_img_ref_highlight, .comment_textarea a.wx_img_ref_highlight, .comment_reply_mod a.wx_img_ref_highlight { margin-left: 4px; pointer-events: auto !important; } .fold-show-more { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin: 15px 0px; font-size: 15px; line-height: 20px; color: var(--weui-FG-1); } .fold-show-more .weui-primary-loading { font-size: 14px; margin-left: 5px; } .fold-show-more .arrow-right-regular { display: 20px; margin-top: 8px; } .emotion_tool { position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .pic_emotion_switch_wrp { margin-bottom: 14px; display: inline-block; font-size: 0px; vertical-align: top; } .pic_emotion_switch_wrp img { width: 22px; display: block; } .pic_emotion_switch_wrp .pic_active, .pic_emotion_switch_wrp .pic_active_primary, .pic_emotion_switch_wrp .pic_default_primary, .pic_emotion_switch_wrp:active .pic_default { display: none; } .pic_emotion_switch_wrp:active .pic_active { display: block; } .emotion_switch { margin-left: 15px; margin-bottom: 6px; background: url("/mmbizwap/zh_CN/htmledition/images/icon/appmsg/emotion/icon_emotion_tool.2x.png") 0px 0px / 35px no-repeat transparent; width: 35px; height: 35px; vertical-align: middle; display: inline-block; } .emotion_switch:active { background-position: 0px -40px; } .emotion_panel_arrow_wrp { position: absolute; margin-top: -6px; margin-left: 26px; display: none !important; } .emotion_panel_arrow_wrp .emotion_panel_arrow { position: absolute; display: inline-block; width: 0px; height: 0px; border-width: 0px 6px 6px; border-style: dashed dashed solid; border-color: transparent transparent rgb(229, 229, 231); } .emotion_panel_arrow_wrp .arrow_in { border-bottom-color: rgb(246, 246, 248); top: 1px; } .emotion_panel { position: relative; margin: 0px -32px; overflow: hidden; } .emotion_list_wrp { overflow: hidden; position: relative; font-size: 0px; white-space: nowrap; } .emotion_list { padding: 10px 0px 0px; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; white-space: normal; display: inline-block; vertical-align: top; } .emotion_list:last-child .emotion_item.del { position: absolute; bottom: 0px; right: 18px; } .emotion_item { display: inline-block; width: 36px; height: 36px; margin-bottom: 5px; text-align: center; line-height: 36px; } .emotion_navs { text-align: center; padding-bottom: 10px; } .emotion_nav { display: inline-block; width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; overflow: hidden; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); margin: 0px 5px; vertical-align: middle; } .emotion_nav.current { background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); width: 8px; height: 8px; } .icon_emotion { width: vertical-align: middle; display: inline-block; } .icon_emotion.del:active { background-position: 2px -92px; } .icon_emotion_single { font-size: 22px; vertical-align: bottom; } .icon_emotion_single.we-emoji { font-size: 18px; } .emotion_panel { margin: 0px; } .discuss_container_hd { background: rgb(255, 255, 255); padding: 24px 0px 48px; } .discuss_container_bd { .comment_primary_input_area { display: block; } .dicuss_form_area .emotion_tool { margin: 0px 32px; } .discuss_textarea_box { position: relative; } .discuss_textarea_box::after { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); content: " "; position: absolute; bottom: 0px; height: 1px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); transform-origin: 0px 100%; transform: scaleY(0.5); left: 32px; right: 32px; } .discuss_textarea { width: 100%; padding: 16px 32px; height: 186px; box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px; resize: none; background: transparent; color: inherit; line-height: 1.6; outline: 0px; font-size: 17px; overflow-y: auto; } .discuss_btn_wrp { margin-top: 32px; } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .discuss_container_hd { background: rgb(25, 25, 25); } .discuss_rich_media_title::after { border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); } .discuss_textarea_box { position: relative; } .discuss_textarea_box::after { border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); } .dicuss_form_area .comment_primary_input_area { background: rgb(25, 25, 25); } .icon_discuss_emotion.icon_discuss_emotion { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8) !important; } } .feedback_dialog_wrp { opacity: 0; user-select: none; pointer-events: none; } .feedback_dialog_wrp.feedback_mask { transition: opacity 0.07s ease-out; } .feedback_dialog_wrp .weui-mask { background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2); } .feedback_dialog { position: absolute; z-index: 5000; font-size: 10px; right: calc(-6.4em - 16px); top: calc(100% + 10px); width: 288px; padding: 16px; box-sizing: border-box; background-color: var(--weui-BG-5); color: var(--weui-FG-0); line-height: 1.4; border-radius: 8px; transition: transform 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.1); transform: scale(0); transform-origin: 80% 0px; } .feedback_dialog::before { content: ""; display: inline-block; width: 0px; height: 0px; border-width: 0px 6px 6px; border-style: dashed dashed solid; border-top-color: transparent; border-right-color: transparent; border-left-color: transparent; border-bottom-color: var(--weui-BG-5); position: absolute; right: calc(7.4em + 10px); top: -6px; } .feedback_dialog_radius_tail .feedback_dialog::before { display: none; } .feedback_dialog_tail { pointer-events: none; position: absolute; margin-left: -4px; width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 1.5px; background: var(--weui-BG-5); transform: rotate(45deg); inset: auto calc(7.4em + 12px) -3px auto; } .feedback_dialog_tail::before, .feedback_dialog_tail::after { content: ""; position: absolute; width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; box-shadow: -6.5px 0 0 0 var(--weui-BG-5); } .feedback_dialog_tail::before { bottom: -7px; left: 6px; transform: rotate(74deg); transform-origin: 0px 0px; } .feedback_dialog_tail::after { top: -2px; right: -7px; transform: rotate(16deg); transform-origin: 0px 100%; } .feedback_dialog_tail_pos_up { bottom: auto; top: -3px; } .feedback_dialog_tail_pos_up::before, .feedback_dialog_tail_pos_up::after { box-shadow: 6.5px 0 0 0 var(--weui-BG-5); } .feedback_dialog_tail_pos_up::before { bottom: 1px; left: -6px; transform: rotate(16deg); } .feedback_dialog_tail_pos_up::after { top: -15px; right: 0px; transform: rotate(80deg); } .feedback_dialog_hd { align-items: center; } .feedback_dialog_title { padding-right: 16px; overflow-wrap: break-word; hyphens: auto; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--weui-FG-0); } .feedback_dialog_bd { padding-top: 4px; } .feedback_tag_list { font-size: 0px; } .feedback_tag_item { --weui-TAG-TEXT-GREEN: #07C160; --weui-TAG-BACKGROUND-GREEN: rgba(7, 193, 96, .1); margin-right: 8px; margin-top: 8px; display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; font-size: 14px; width: auto; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; overflow-wrap: normal; max-width: 100%; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 4px; box-sizing: border-box; color: var(--weui-FG-0); background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.03); -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); } .feedback_tag_item.feedback_tag_selected { color: var(--weui-TAG-TEXT-GREEN); background-color: var(--weui-TAG-BACKGROUND-GREEN); } .feedback_tag_item:active { position: relative; } .feedback_tag_item:active::before { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 0px; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } .feedback_dialog_pos_top { top: auto; bottom: calc(100% + 10px); } .feedback_dialog_pos_top::before { border-bottom: 0px; border-top: 6px solid var(--weui-BG-5); top: auto; bottom: -6px; } .feedback_dialog_show { opacity: 1; pointer-events: all; } .feedback_dialog_show.feedback_mask { transition: 0.05s ease-in; } .feedback_dialog_show .feedback_dialog { transform: scale(1); } @media screen and (min-width: 400px) { .feedback_dialog { left: auto; .sns_opr_btn.praise-animation::before { animation: 0.3s ease-in-out 0s 1 normal none running scaleUpDown; transform-origin: center center; } @keyframes scaleUpDown { 0% { transform: scale(1); } 50% { transform: scale(1.2); } 100% { transform: scale(1); } } .interaction_bar .sns_opr_btn::before { display: block; margin: 0px auto 1px; font-size: inherit; width: 24px; height: 24px; } .interaction_bar .sns_opr_btn .sns_opr_gap { vertical-align: top; margin-left: 0px; width: 39px; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-line-clamp: 1; } fill-opacity='0.9'/%3E%3C/svg%3E%0A") !important; } .interaction_bar .interaction_popover__outer { z-index: 9999; } .interaction_bar .interaction_popover__outer .interaction_popover__inner { width: fit-content; padding: 10px 12px; white-space: nowrap; color: var(--weui-FG-0); filter: unset; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 2px 2px 8px; } .interaction_bar .interaction_popover__outer .interaction_popover__inner .weui-pc-popover__tail { box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 5px 3px 10px; } .interaction_bar .share-btn-con { position: relative; } .interaction_bar .share-btn-con .share_guide_popover__outer { z-index: 9999; } .interaction_bar .share-btn-con .share_guide_popover__outer .share_guide_popover__inner { --weui-pc-popover-offset: 8px; width: fit-content; padding: 10px 12px; white-space: nowrap; color: var(--weui-FG-0); filter: unset; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 0px 8px 25px; } .interaction_bar .share-btn-con .share_guide_popover__outer .share_guide_popover__inner .weui-pc-popover__bd { font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.4; } .interaction_bar .share-btn-con .share_guide_popover__outer .share_guide_popover__inner .weui-pc-popover__tail { --weui-radiusTailSize: 10px; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 5px 3px 10px; } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .interaction_bar .sns_opr_btn.sns_like_btn.like_btn_liked { color: rgb(204, 156, 0); } } @media screen and (min-width: 717px) { .interaction_bar { max-width: 677px; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; } .stream_friends { max-width: 677px; margin: 0px auto; } } .wx_follow_context.wx_follow_primary:not(.large_font_like_profile_bar) { min-width: 0px; } .wx_follow_nickname_normal_font { flex-grow: 1; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; display: flex; align-items: center; word-break: break-all; } .wx-device-ios .wx_follow_context.in-topbar-max-scale .wx_follow_hd { margin-top: 0.1em; } .wx-device-ios .wx_follow_verify { margin-top: -0.1em; } .wx_follow_nickname_large_font { vertical-align: middle; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; word-break: break-all; } .wx_follow_nickname_large_font span:first-child { margin-right: 4px; } .wx_follow_nickname_large_font .nickNameSpan { vertical-align: middle; word-break: break-all; } .wx_follow_nickname_large_font > .wx_follow_verify { display: inline-block !important; } .wx_follow_nickname_large_font .wx_follow_ft { display: inline-block; } .body.windows-title-bold .wx_follow_nickname_normal_font, .body.windows-title-bold .wx_follow_nickname_large_font { font-weight: 600; } .wx_follow_nickname_follow_icon { width: 14px; height: 14px; display: none; vertical-align: middle; margin-right: 4px; background-size: cover; } .wx_follow_nickname_follow_icon inline-block; background-image: url("https://res.wx.qq.com/op_res/nLnAiLrrETuU96Aym1ZDNjhMga6Fe1hiYp332DlZsT_u4THJyu8XegVlG723G5FblhAwxLO31iFVMkzq62jS3w"); } .wx_follow_nickname_follow_icon.show-follow-verify-media { display: inline-block; background-image: max-width: 7em !important; overflow: hidden !important; text-overflow: ellipsis !important; white-space: nowrap !important; display: inline-block !important; vertical-align: middle !important; } .drawer_mask { position: fixed; inset: 0px; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.55); z-index: 501; } .drawer_main { position: fixed; top: 0px; bottom: 0px; right: 0px; transform: translate(100%); max-width: 390px; width: calc(-40px + 100vw); min-width: 320px; z-index: 502; transition: transform 0.3s; background: var(--weui-BG-2) !important; } .drawer_main.drawer_show { transform: translate(0px); } .drawer_main .drawer_topbar { height: 40px; position: relative; } .drawer_main .drawer_topbar .drawer_topbar_title { color: var(--weui-FG-2); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 40px; margin-left: 20px; } .drawer_main .drawer_topbar .drawer_topbar_close { position: absolute; right: 8px; top: 8px; display: inline-block; width: 24px; height: 24px; background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg width='24' height='24' viewBox='0 0 24 24' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cpath fill-rule='evenodd' clip-rule='evenodd' d='M11.9987 13.0606L5.55857 19.4995L4.49801 18.4387L10.9379 12L4.49707 5.56036L5.55763 4.4996L11.9987 10.9395L18.4423 4.49707L19.5029 5.55783L13.0594 12L19.5029 18.4424L18.4424 19.5031L11.9987 13.0606Z' fill='black' fill-opacity='0.55' /%3E%3C/svg%3E%0A"); background-repeat: no-repeat; background-size: cover; } .drawer_main .drawer_content { height: calc(100% - 40px); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .drawer_main .drawer_topbar .drawer_topbar_close { background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg width='24' height='24' viewBox='0 0 24 24' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cpath fill-rule='evenodd' clip-rule='evenodd' d='M11.9987 13.0606L5.55857 19.4995L4.49801 18.4387L10.9379 12L4.49707 5.56036L5.55763 4.4996L11.9987 10.9395L18.4423 4.49707L19.5029 5.55783L13.0594 12L19.5029 18.4424L18.4424 19.5031L11.9987 13.0606Z' fill='white' fill-opacity='0.5' /%3E%3C/svg%3E%0A"); } } :root { --immersive-safe-bottom: env(safe-area-inset-bottom); } .bottom_bar_wrp { position: fixed; bottom: var(--immersive-safe-bottom, 0px); left: 0px; right: 0px; display: flex; box-sizing: border-box; z-index: 500; user-select: none; background-color: var(--weui-BG-2); } .bottom_bar_wrp.hide { visibility: hidden; } .bottom_bar_wrp.ban_transition .stream_friends_container.block { transition: initial !important; } .bottom_bar_wrp::after { content: ""; user-select: none; position: fixed; z-index: 499; top: calc(100% - var(--immersive-safe-bottom, 0px) - 1px); left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%); display: flex; box-sizing: border-box; width: 100%; height: calc(10px + var(--immersive-safe-bottom, 0px)); background-color: var(--weui-BG-2); } .bottom_bar_wrp.preview_bottom_bar::after { top: calc(100% - 1px); } .bottom_bar_wrp.sticky { position: sticky; } .bottom_bar_wrp.sticky::after { position: absolute; z-index: -1; top: calc(100% - 1px); } .bottom_bar_wrp.relative { position: relative; bottom: 0px; } .bottom_bar_wrp.relative-style { z-index: initial; } .bottom_bar_wrp.relative-style .stream_friends_top_border { width: calc(100% - 40px); } .bottom_bar_wrp.relative-style .bottom_bar_interaction_border { margin: 0px 20px; } .bottom_bar_wrp.relative-style::after { display: none; } .bottom_bar_wrp.preview-hide { visibility: hidden; pointer-events: none; } .bottom_bar_wrp.bottom_bar_in_image .wx_follow_context { padding: 0px; } .bottom_bar_wrp .bottom_bar_interaction_wrp { width: 100%; } .bottom_bar_wrp .bottom_bar_interaction_wrp .bottom_bar_interaction_border { border-top: .5px solid var(--weui-FG-3); } .bottom_bar_wrp .hide_bottom_bar { visibility: hidden; position: fixed; z-index: -99; } .bottom_bar_wrp .bottom_bar_interaction, .bottom_bar_wrp .bottom_bar_placeholder { width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; padding: 8px 20px; } .bottom_bar_wrp .bottom_bar_interaction.has_profile_live, .bottom_bar_wrp .bottom_bar_placeholder.has_profile_live { padding-left: 17px; } .bottom_bar_wrp .bottom_bar_interaction.has_profile_live .bottom_bar_slide_into, .bottom_bar_wrp .bottom_bar_placeholder.has_profile_live .bottom_bar_slide_into { padding-left: 3px; } .bottom_bar_wrp .bottom_bar_placeholder { border-top: .5px solid var(--weui-FG-3); } .bottom_bar_wrp .bottom_bar_profile_interaction { display: flex; flex-shrink: 0; flex-direction: row; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } .bottom_bar_wrp .bottom_bar_slide_into { opacity: 0; max-height: 0px; overflow: hidden; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; will-change: max-height, opacity; transition: max-height 0.3s ease-out, opacity 0.3s ease-out; transform: translateZ(0px); backface-visibility: hidden; } .bottom_bar_wrp .bottom_bar_slide_into .slide-text { will-change: font-size, margin, opacity; transition: font-size 0.1s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94), margin 0.1s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94), opacity 0.1s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94); transform: translateZ(0px); backface-visibility: hidden; text-align: center; white-space: nowrap; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .bottom_bar_wrp .bottom_bar_slide_into .slide-text .slide-icon { display: inline-block; flex-shrink: 0; margin-right: 2px; background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%0A%3Csvg width='24' height='24' viewBox='0 0 24 .bottom_bar_slide_into .slide-text .slide-icon { filter: invert(1) brightness(0.55); } } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .bottom_bar_wrp .bottom_bar_slide_into .slide-text { color: rgba(255, .bar-footer__func-item { margin-left: 20px; } .preview_bottom_bar .simple-progress { position: relative; flex-shrink: 0; width: 32px; height: 32px; margin-right: 8px; } .preview_bottom_bar .progress-ring { width: 100%; height: 100%; border-radius: 50%; box-sizing: border-box; position: relative; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; } .preview_bottom_bar .progress-ring::before { position: absolute; content: ""; background: var(--weui-BRAND-100); width: 100%; height: 100%; border-radius: 50%; opacity: 0.1; } .preview_bottom_bar .progress-ring .progress-fill { position: absolute; width: 100%; height: 100%; background: var(--weui-BRAND-100); border-radius: 50%; clip-path: polygon(50% 50%, 50% 0%, 100% 0%, 50% 0%, 50% 0%, 50% 0%, 50% 0%); animation: progress-animation 18s cubic-bezier(.5,0,.5,1) forwards var(--progress-delay, 3s); } .preview_bottom_bar .progress-ring::after { position: absolute; content: ""; width: calc(100% - 5.6px); height: calc(100% - 5.6px); background: var(--weui-BG-2); border-radius: 50%; } @keyframes progress-animation { 0% { clip-path: polygon(50% 50%, 50% 0%, 100% 0%, 100% 0%, 100% 0%, 100% 0%, 50% 0%); } 4.16% { clip-path: polygon(50% 50%, 50% 0%, 100% 0%, 100% 0%, 100% 0%, 100% 0%, 100% 0%); } 8.3% { clip-path: polygon(50% 50%, 50% 0%, 100% 0%, 100% 50%, 100% 50%, 100% 50%, 100% 50%); } 10% { clip-path: polygon(50% 50%, 50% 0%, 100% 0%, 100% 62.94%, 100% 62.94%, 100% 62.94%, 100% 62.94%); } 50% { clip-path: polygon(50% 50%, 50% 0%, 100% 0%, 100% 95.24%, 100% 95.24%, 100% 95.24%, 100% 95.24%); } 50.35% { clip-path: polygon(50% 50%, 50% 0%, 100% 0%, 100% 100%, 100% 100%, 100% 100%, 100% 100%); } 53.35% { clip-path: polygon(50% 50%, 50% 0%, 100% 0%, 100% 100%, 50% 100%, 50% 100%, 50% 100%); } 56.34% { clip-path: polygon(50% 50%, 50% 0%, 100% 0%, 100% 100%, 0% 100%, 0% 100%, 0% 100%); } 59.33% { clip-path: polygon(50% 50%, 50% 0%, 100% 0%, 100% 100%, 0% 100%, 0% 50%, 0% 50%); } 60% { clip-path: polygon(50% 50%, 50% 0%, 100% 0%, 100% 100%, 0% 100%, 0% 45.64%, 0% 45.64%); } 78.32% { clip-path: polygon(50% 50%, 50% 0%, 100% 0%, 100% 100%, 0% 100%, 0% 0%, 0% 0%); } 100% { clip-path: polygon(50% 50%, 50% 0%, 100% 0%, 100% 100%, 0% 100%, 0% 0%, 48.43% 0%); } } .preview_bottom_bar .complete .progress-ring .progress-fill { animation: auto ease 0s 1 normal none running none; } .bar-data-analysis { width: fit-content; } .bar-data-analysis .analysis-link { padding-right: calc(0.67em + 2px); position: relative; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 21px; color: var(--weui-FG-0); } .bar-data-analysis .analysis-link::after { content: ""; display: block; position: absolute; top: 50%; right: 0px; transform: translateY(-50%); font-size: 10px; height: 2em; width: 1em; mask-image: url("https://res.wx.qq.com/t/components/icons/base/arrow_right_regular.svg"); background-color: currentcolor; mask-size: contain; mask-position: center center; mask-repeat: no-repeat; } .bar-data-analysis .read-num { margin-top: 2px; font-size: 12px; line-height: 17px; color: var(--weui-FG-1); } .jump-weixin-dialog .weui-dialog { border-radius: 8px; } .jump-weixin-dialog.is_moblie .weui-dialog__btn { padding: 20px 0px; } .jump_wx_qrcode_dialog .weui-dialog { width: 280px; background-color: var(--weui-BG-1); } .jump_wx_qrcode_dialog .weui-dialog__hd { position: relative; padding: 40px 0px 0px; } .jump_wx_qrcode_dialog .weui-dialog__hd .weui-icon-close-thin { cursor: pointer; position: absolute; top: 12px; right: 12px; height: 18px; width: 18px; } .jump_wx_qrcode_dialog .weui-dialog__bd { padding-top: 24px; margin-bottom: 32px; } .jump_wx_qrcode_dialog .qrcode-con { position: relative; display: flex; margin: 16px auto 0px; justify-content: center; } .jump_wx_qrcode_dialog .jump_wx_qrcode_img { height: 120px; width: 120px; border-radius: 4px; } .jump_wx_qrcode_dialog .jump_author_avatar_con { position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); height: 25px; width: 25px; background-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); border: 1px solid rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 4px; } .jump_wx_qrcode_dialog .jump_author_avatar { display: flex; height: 24px; width: 24px; } .jump_wx_qrcode_dialog .jump_wx_qrcode_desc { font-size: 16px; color: var(--weui-FG-0); } .rich_media_wrp .novel-card { box-sizing: border-box; width: 100%; padding: 12px 16px 12px 12px; margin-bottom: 18px; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.02); border-radius: 8px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; } .rich_media_wrp .novel-card .novel-card__old-only { display: none; } .rich_media_wrp .novel-card.novel-card--old { padding: 12px; } .rich_media_wrp .novel-card.novel-card--old .novel-card__new-only { display: none; } .rich_media_wrp .novel-card.novel-card--old .novel-card__old-only { display: block; } .rich_media_wrp .novel-card .novel-card__left { display: flex; align-items: center; flex: 1 1 0%; min-width: 0px; } .rich_media_wrp .novel-card .novel-card__cover { position: relative; width: 40px; height: 53px; border-radius: 2px; margin-right: 8px; flex-shrink: 0; background-color: rgb(240, 240, 240); overflow: hidden; } .rich_media_wrp .novel-card .novel-card__cover img { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; } .rich_media_wrp .novel-card .novel-card__text { display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; min-width: 0px; } .rich_media_wrp .novel-card .novel-card__main { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 21px; color: var(--weui-FG-0); margin: 0px; word-break: break-word; } .rich_media_wrp .novel-card .novel-card__subtitle { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 19.6px; color: var(--weui-FG-2); margin: 0px; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .rich_media_wrp .novel-card .novel-card__link { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 19.6px; color: var(--weui-LINK); white-space: nowrap; margin-left: 10px; flex-shrink: 0; } .rich_media_wrp .novel-card .novel-info .novel-cover-group { display: flex; align-items: center; } .rich_media_wrp .novel-card .novel-info .novel-cover-group .novel-cover { position: relative; width: 33px; height: 44px; border-radius: 2px; margin-right: 8px; background-color: rgb(240, 240, 240); overflow: hidden; } .rich_media_wrp .novel-card .novel-info .novel-cover-group .novel-cover img { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; } .rich_media_wrp .novel-card .novel-info .novel-cover-group .novel-meta { display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; } .rich_media_wrp .novel-card .novel-info .novel-cover-group .novel-meta .novel-title { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.4; color: var(--weui-FG-0); } .rich_media_wrp .novel-card .novel-info .novel-cover-group .novel-meta .novel-description { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.4; color: var(--weui-FG-2); } .rich_media_wrp .novel-card .arrow-jump-icon { width: 10px; height: 20px; background-color: var(--weui-FG-2); mask-size: contain; mask-position: center center; mask-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg width='10' height='20' viewBox='0 0 12 24' fill='none' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cpath fill-rule='evenodd' clip-rule='evenodd' d='M2.4541 6.58068L3.51476 5.52002L9.29366 11.2989C9.68378 11.689 9.68724 12.3181 9.29366 12.7117L3.51476 18.4906L2.4541 17.4299L7.87872 12.0053L2.4541 6.58068Z' fill='black'/%3E%3C/svg%3E"); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .rich_media_wrp .novel-card { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02); } } mp-sponsor-ad iframe { min-height: 24px; margin-top: -24px; } .data_color_scheme_dark .icon_appmsg_tag { background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); } .data_color_scheme_dark .icon_appmsg_tag.theme_tag { background: rgba(6, 174, 86, 0.1); color: rgb(37, 156, 92); } .data_color_scheme_dark .tips_global_primary.tips_global_primary { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); } .data_color_scheme_dark .appmsg_card_context { background-color: rgb(32, 32, 32); } .data_color_scheme_dark .appmsg_live_card { background-color: rgb(32, 32, 32) !important; } .data_color_scheme_dark .appmsg_live_card .card_seperator_line { background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05) !important; } .data_color_scheme_dark .appmsg_live_card .head_btn_offlive { background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08) !important; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) !important; } .data_color_scheme_dark .share_mod_context .share_mod_hd::before { border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); } .data_color_scheme_dark .share_mod_context .account_avatar { background: transparent; } .data_color_scheme_dark .account_nickname { color: rgb(125, 144, 169); } .data_color_scheme_dark .rich_media_tool > .weui-flex + .weui-flex::before { border-top-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); } .data_color_scheme_dark .share_btn[disabled]::before { opacity: 0.1; } .data_color_scheme_dark .appmsg_skin_default .rich_media_area_primary { background-color: rgb(25, 25, 25); } .data_color_scheme_dark .appmsg_skin_default .rich_media_area_primary .weui-loadmore_line { border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); } .data_color_scheme_dark .appmsg_skin_default .rich_media_area_primary .weui-loadmore_line .weui-loadmore__tips { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); background: rgb(25, 25, 25); } .data_color_scheme_dark body { background-color: rgb(17, 17, 17); } .data_color_scheme_dark body a, .data_color_scheme_dark .rich_media_meta_link { color: rgb(125, 144, 169); } .data_color_scheme_dark .rich_media_content { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6); } .data_color_scheme_dark .rich_media_meta_text, .data_color_scheme_dark .icon_appmsg_tag.default, .data_color_scheme_dark .reward_area_win .reward_user_tips .weui-loadmore__tips a, .data_color_scheme_dark .simple_pagination, .data_color_scheme_dark .sp_page_current, .data_color_scheme_dark blockquote, .data_color_scheme_dark .blockquote_info { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); } .data_color_scheme_dark blockquote { border-color: rgb(64, 64, 64); } .data_color_scheme_dark .img_loading { background-color: rgb(32, 32, 32) !important; border-color: rgb(32, 32, 32) !important; } .data_color_scheme_dark .original_primary_nickname, .data_color_scheme_dark .original_panel_content, .data_color_scheme_dark .original_panel_title { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); } .data_color_scheme_dark .original_primary_tips, .data_color_scheme_dark .original_primary_desc, .data_color_scheme_dark .original_panel .original_account_nickname { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); } .data_color_scheme_dark .original_primary_card, .data_color_scheme_dark .original_primary_card_tips { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); } .data_color_scheme_dark .original_primary_card .wx-root:not([data-weui-theme="light"]), body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) { --appmsgExtra-BG: #121212; } } .wx-root, body { --new-title-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, .9); } .wx-root[data-weui-theme="dark"], body[data-weui-theme="dark"] { --new-title-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, .8); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .wx-root:not([data-weui-theme="light"]), body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) { --new-title-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, .8); } } .wx-root, body { --new-content-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, .9); } .wx-root[data-weui-theme="dark"], body[data-weui-theme="dark"] { --new-content-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, .7); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .wx-root:not([data-weui-theme="light"]), body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) { --new-content-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, .7); } } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { body.appmsg_content_new_ui { --new-content-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, .55); } } .data_color_scheme_light .icon_appmsg_tag { background-color: rgb(195, 195, 195); color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .data_color_scheme_light .icon_appmsg_tag.appmsg_title_tag { background: rgb(237, 237, 237); color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); } .data_color_scheme_light .tips_global_primary.tips_global_primary { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); } .data_color_scheme_light .appmsg_card_context { background-color: rgb(247, 247, 247); } .data_color_scheme_light .appmsg_skin_default .rich_media_area_primary { background: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .data_color_scheme_light body:not(.my_comment_empty_data) { color: rgb(51, 51, 51); } .data_color_scheme_light body:not(.my_comment_empty_data) a:not(.reward_button) { color: rgb(87, 107, 149); } .data_color_scheme_light body:not(.my_comment_empty_data) .weui-audio-btn { background: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .data_color_scheme_light .rich_media_meta_link { color: rgb(87, 107, 149); } .data_color_scheme_light .rich_media_content { color: rgb(51, 51, 51); } .data_color_scheme_light .rich_media_meta_text, .data_color_scheme_light .icon_appmsg_tag.default, .data_color_scheme_light .reward_area_win .reward_user_tips .weui-loadmore__tips a, .data_color_scheme_light .simple_pagination, .data_color_scheme_light .sp_page_current, .data_color_scheme_light blockquote, .data_color_scheme_light .blockquote_info { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); } .data_color_scheme_light blockquote { border-color: rgb(219, 219, 219); } .data_color_scheme_light .img_loading { background-color: rgb(247, 247, 247) !important; border-color: rgb(247, 247, 247) !important; } .data_color_scheme_light .original_primary_nickname, .data_color_scheme_light .original_panel_content, .data_color_scheme_light .original_panel_title { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9); } .data_color_scheme_light .original_primary_tips, .data_color_scheme_light .original_primary_desc, .data_color_scheme_light .original_panel .original_account_nickname { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); } .data_color_scheme_light .original_primary_card, .data_color_scheme_light .original_primary_card_tips { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); } .data_color_scheme_light .original_primary_card .weui-flex__ft::after { background-image: https://res.wx.qq.com/mmbizappmsg/zh_CN/htmledition/js/assets/qqmail_tpl_vite_entry.mpfd2pou32083ee8.css @charset "utf-8"; .pay__notice_new { border-top-width: medium; border-top-style: none; border-top-color: currentcolor; } .pay__notice_new .pay__intro-content .pay__notice-desc { white-space: normal; } .pay__notice_hiden { display: none; } .fade-enter-active[data-v-41e3de8a], .fade-leave-active[data-v-41e3de8a] { transition: opacity 0.3s; } .fade-enter[data-v-41e3de8a], .fade-leave-to[data-v-41e3de8a] { opacity: 0; } .novel-tips-trans-leave-active, .novel-tips-trans-enter-active { transition: 0.5s; } .novel-tips-trans-enter, .novel-tips-trans-leave-to { transform: translate3d(100%, 0px, 0px); } .novel-tips-bar { position: fixed; right: 0px; z-index: 4999; bottom: calc(var(--bottom-bar-gap, 16px) + var(--bottom-bar-height, 59px)); } .novel-tips-bar:not(.is-pc) { transition: none !important; } .novel-tips-bar.is-pc { right: auto; bottom: calc(var(--bottom-bar-gap, 16px) + var(--bottom-bar-height, 59px) + var(--pc-page-bottom-gap, 0px)); transition: none !important; } .novel-tips-bar.is-pc .keyword-con { border-radius: 999px; padding-left: 8px; } .novel-tips-bar .keyword-con { --bg-color: #fff; --bottom-bar-gap: 16px; position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; background-color: var(--bg-color); padding: 5px 12px; border-radius: 999px 0px 0px 999px; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 0px 8px 25px; font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; color: var(--weui-LINK); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .novel-tips-bar .keyword-con { --bg-color: #2C2C2C; } } .novel-tips-bar .keyword-con .novel-keyword { font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px; font-weight: 500; } .novel-tips-bar .keyword-con.wx_tap_highlight_active { overflow: hidden; } .novel-tips-bar .keyword-con.wx_tap_highlight_active::after { content: ""; display: block; height: 100%; width: 100%; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .novel-tips-bar .keyword-con.wx_tap_highlight_active::after { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); } } .novel-tips-bar .keyword-con .icon-more { margin-left: 4px; width: 8px; height: 16px; background-color: currentcolor; mask-size: contain; mask-position: center center; mask-image:
