.audio-panel__header[data-v-249ec9a9] { position: relative; display: flex; width: 100%; height: 100%; } .audio-panel__header.border[data-v-249ec9a9]::after { position: absolute; content: ""; bottom: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; height: 1px; transform: scaleY(0.5); background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .audio-panel__header.border[data-v-249ec9a9]::after { background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); } } .audio-panel__header-close[data-v-249ec9a9] { position: absolute; font-size: 24px; width: 1em; height: 1em; top: 20px; left: 16px; } .audio-panel__header-close .icon-close[data-v-249ec9a9] { width: 100%; height: 100%; } .audio-panel__playing-bar-wrp[data-v-249ec9a9] { position: relative; display: flex; flex-direction: row; justify-content: center; align-items: center; width: 100%; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; background: transparent; color: var(--weui-FG-0); overflow: hidden; z-index: 50; } .audio-panel__playing-bar-wrp .audio-panel__playing-bar[data-v-249ec9a9] { position: relative; display: inline-block; width: 57%; word-break: break-all; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; } .audio-panel__playing-bar-wrp.mask .audio-panel__playing-bar[data-v-249ec9a9]::after { position: absolute; content: ""; top: 0px; right: 0px; height: 100%; width: 45px; background: linear-gradient(to left, rgb(255, 255, 255) 5%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0)); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .audio-panel__playing-bar-wrp.mask .audio-panel__playing-bar[data-v-249ec9a9]::after { background: linear-gradient(to left, rgb(25, 25, 25) 5%, rgba(25, 25, 25, 0)); } } .audio-panel__playing-bar-wrp.ghost[data-v-249ec9a9] { position: absolute; opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; } .card-item__progress-bar-wrp[data-v-de6e99d8] { position: relative; width: 100%; margin: 16px auto 0px; } .card-item__progress-bar-wrp .card-item__progress-bar[data-v-de6e99d8] { position: relative; width: 100%; background-color: var(--weui-FG-3); height: 2px; border-radius: 9999px; margin: 6px 0px; transition: height 0.1s linear, margin 0.1s linear, transform 0.1s linear; } .card-item__progress-bar-wrp .card-item__progress-bar[data-v-de6e99d8]::before { position: absolute; content: ""; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: var(--percent); height: 100%; background-color: rgb(23, 23, 23); border-radius: 9999px; transition: height 0.1s linear; } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .card-item__progress-bar-wrp .card-item__progress-bar[data-v-de6e99d8]::before { background-color: rgb(209, 209, 209); } } .card-item__progress-bar-wrp .card-item__progress-bar[data-v-de6e99d8]::after { position: absolute; content: ""; top: 50%; left: var(--percent); width: 8px; height: 8px; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); border-radius: 9999px; background-color: rgb(23, 23, 23); transition: width 0.1s linear, height 0.1s linear; } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .card-item__progress-bar-wrp .card-item__progress-bar[data-v-de6e99d8]::after { background-color: rgb(209, 209, 209); } } .card-item__progress-bar-wrp .card-item__progress-bar.active[data-v-de6e99d8] { height: 6px; margin: 2px 0px; transform: translateY(-2px); } .card-item__progress-bar-wrp .card-item__progress-bar.active[data-v-de6e99d8]::after { width: 16px; height: 16px; } .card-item__progress-bar-wrp .card-item__progress-active-area[data-v-de6e99d8] { position: absolute; top: -16px; left: 0px; height: 32px; width: 100%; background: transparent; z-index: 1; } .card-item__progress-bar-wrp .card-item__time-info[data-v-de6e99d8] { display: flex; flex-direction: row; justify-content: space-between; width: 100%; color: var(--weui-FG-2); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; transition: color 0.1s linear; } .card-item__progress-bar-wrp .card-item__time-info.active[data-v-de6e99d8] { color: var(--weui-FG-0); } .card-item__btn-wrp[data-v-de6e99d8] { position: relative; display: flex; flex-direction: row; justify-content: center; width: 100%; margin-top: 20px; } .card-item__btn-wrp .card-item__btn-group[data-v-de6e99d8] { display: flex; flex-direction: row; align-items: center; color: var(--weui-FG); } .card-item__btn-wrp .card-item__btn-group.rate-group[data-v-de6e99d8], .card-item__btn-wrp .card-item__btn-group.shutdown-group[data-v-de6e99d8], .card-item__btn-wrp .card-item__btn-group.listen-later-group[data-v-de6e99d8] { flex-shrink: 1; position: absolute; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); min-width: 0px; text-overflow: ellipsis; overflow: hidden; } .card-item__btn-wrp .card-item__btn-group.left[data-v-de6e99d8] { left: 0px; } .card-item__btn-wrp .card-item__btn-group.right[data-v-de6e99d8] { right: 0px; } .card-item__btn-wrp .card-item__btn-group.rate-group[data-v-de6e99d8] { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--weui-FG-0); } .card-item__btn-wrp .card-item__btn-group.rate-group .card-item__btn-playback-rate.wx_tap_highlight_active[data-v-de6e99d8] { color: var(--weui-FG-1); } .card-item__btn-wrp align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 400; color: var(--weui-FG-2); line-height: 1.4; text-align: center; } .audio-panel__info-area > [data-v-f7e10856]:not(:first-child) { margin-top: 4px; } .audio-panel__operate-area-wrp[data-v-f7e10856] { position: relative; width: 100%; } .card-item__operate-area[data-v-f7e10856] { margin-top: -14px; padding-bottom: 28px; } .audio-panel__operate-area[data-v-f7e10856] { display: flex; flex-direction: row; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; transition: max-height 0.3s ease-in-out, padding-bottom 0.3s ease-in-out, padding-top 0.3s ease-in-out; overflow: hidden; width: 100%; padding-top: 8px; padding-bottom: 48px; } .audio-panel__operate-area.fold[data-v-f7e10856] { max-height: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; } .audio-panel__operate-area .operate-btn[data-v-f7e10856] { flex-shrink: 1; flex-grow: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: row; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 100%; min-width: 0px; background: var(--weui-FG-5); color: var(--weui-FG-0); border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: none; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 0px; } .audio-panel__operate-area .operate-btn i[data-v-f7e10856] { flex-shrink: 0; flex-grow: 0; width: 1em; height: 1em; font-size: 20px; } .audio-panel__operate-area .operate-btn i.weui-loading[data-v-f7e10856] { background-size: contain; height: 0.8em; } .audio-panel__operate-area .operate-btn span[data-v-f7e10856] { flex-grow: 0; flex-shrink: 0; display: inline-block; white-space: nowrap; margin-left: 4px; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 500; } .audio-panel__operate-area .operate-btn[data-v-f7e10856]:not(:first-child) { margin-left: 16px; } .audio-panel__operate-area .operate-btn.wx_tap_highlight_active[data-v-f7e10856] { background: var(--weui-FG-4); } .audio-panel__operate-area.small .operate-btn[data-v-f7e10856] { padding: 10px 0px; border-radius: 6px; } .audio-panel__operate-area.small .operate-btn i[data-v-f7e10856] { font-size: 16px; } .audio-panel__operate-area.small .operate-btn span[data-v-f7e10856] { font-size: 14px; } .audio-panel__list-area[data-v-f7e10856] { width: 100%; margin-top: 8px; transition: max-height 0.3s ease-in-out; padding-bottom: 48px; } .audio-panel__list-area.version2[data-v-f7e10856] { margin-top: 0px; } .audio-panel__list-area.fold[data-v-f7e10856] { max-height: 0px; } .audio-panel__list-area .sub-title[data-v-f7e10856] { display: block; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; color: var(--weui-FG-2); margin-bottom: 8px; padding-left: 24px; padding-right: 24px; width: 100%; } .audio-panel__top-anime-area[data-v-f7e10856] { position: fixed; top: var(--top-anime-top); left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, 100%); padding: 12px 18px; background: var(--weui-BG-2); border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 0 25px var(--weui-SEPARATOR-0); z-index: 100; width: calc(100% - 24px); } .audio-panel__top-anime-area > [data-v-f7e10856] { display: block; width: 100%; line-height: 1.4; text-overflow: ellipsis; overflow: hidden; white-space: nowrap; } .audio-panel__top-anime-area .title[data-v-f7e10856] { color: var(--weui-FG-0); font-size: 12.75px; } .audio-panel__top-anime-area .desc[data-v-f7e10856] { margin-top: 2px; color: var(--weui-FG-2); font-size: 10.5px; } .audio-panel__modal-bottom-mask[data-v-f7e10856] { position: fixed; left: 0px; bottom: 0px; width: 100vw; height: env(safe-area-inset-bottom); z-index: 11; } .audio-list__item-slide-wrp[data-v-f7e10856]:not(.sortable-drag):not(.sortable-chosen):not(.disable-transition) { transition: opacity 0.2s ease-in, transform 0.3s ease-out, position 0.3s ease-out; } .audio-list-leave-active[data-v-f7e10856], .audio-list-leave-to[data-v-f7e10856] { margin-top: 0px; } .audio-list-leave-active[data-v-f7e10856] { position: absolute; width: 100%; } .audio-list-enter[data-v-f7e10856], .audio-list-leave-to[data-v-f7e10856] { opacity: 0; } .now-playing[data-v-f7e10856] { z-index: 10; } .operate-fade-enter[data-v-f7e10856], .operate-fade-leave-to[data-v-f7e10856] { opacity: 0; } .operate-fade-enter-to[data-v-f7e10856], .operate-fade-leave[data-v-f7e10856] { opacity: 1; } .operate-fade-enter-active[data-v-f7e10856] { transition: opacity 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.5, 0, 1, 0); position: absolute; top: 0px; } .operate-fade-leave-active[data-v-f7e10856] { transition: opacity 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.5, 1, 0, 1); } .top-anime-enter[data-v-f7e10856] { opacity: 0; } .top-anime-enter-active[data-v-f7e10856] { transition: transform 0.15s linear, opacity 0.15s linear; } .top-anime-leave-active[data-v-f7e10856] { transform-origin: center center; transition: transform 0.3s ease-in, top 0.3s ease-in; } .top-anime-leave-to[data-v-f7e10856] { top: var(--top-anime-top-end); transform: translate(-50%, 100%) scale(0.07); } .slide-in-enter[data-v-f7e10856], .slide-in-leave-to[data-v-f7e10856] { transform: translateY(-100%); } .slide-in-enter-active[data-v-f7e10856], .slide-in-leave-active[data-v-f7e10856] { transition: transform 0.15s linear; } .slide-in-enter-to[data-v-f7e10856], .slide-in-leave[data-v-f7e10856] { transform: translateY(0px); } .fade-enter[data-v-f7e10856], .fade-leave-to[data-v-f7e10856] { opacity: 0; } .fade-enter-active[data-v-f7e10856], .fade-leave-active[data-v-f7e10856] { transition: rotate(0deg); } } .card-item__progress-bar-wrp[data-v-03413efa] { position: relative; width: 100%; margin-top: 16px; } .card-item__progress-bar-wrp .card-item__progress-bar[data-v-03413efa] { position: relative; width: 100%; background-color: var(--weui-FG-3); height: 1px; border-radius: 9999px; margin: 4px 0px; } .card-item__progress-bar-wrp .card-item__progress-bar[data-v-03413efa]::before { position: absolute; content: ""; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: var(--percent); height: 100%; background-color: var(--weui-FG); } .card-item__progress-bar-wrp .card-item__progress-bar[data-v-03413efa]::after { position: absolute; content: ""; top: 0px; left: var(--percent); width: 8px; height: 8px; transform: translate(-50%, calc(-50% + 1px)); border-radius: 9999px; background-color: var(--weui-FG); transition: width 0.1s linear, height 0.1s linear; } .card-item__progress-bar-wrp .card-item__progress-bar.active[data-v-03413efa]::after { width: 16px; height: 16px; } .card-item__progress-bar-wrp .card-item__progress-active-area[data-v-03413efa] { position: absolute; top: -10px; left: 0px; height: 20px; width: 100%; background: transparent; z-index: 1; } .card-item__progress-bar-wrp .card-item__time-info[data-v-03413efa] { display: flex; flex-direction: row; justify-content: space-between; width: 100%; color: var(--weui-FG-2); font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.4; } .card-item__btn-wrp[data-v-03413efa] { position: relative; display: flex; flex-direction: row; justify-content: center; width: 100%; margin-top: 8px; } .card-item__btn-wrp .card-item__btn-group[data-v-03413efa] { display: flex; flex-direction: row; align-items: center; color: var(--weui-FG); } transform: translateY(-50%); min-width: 0px; text-overflow: ellipsis; overflow: hidden; } .card-item__btn-wrp .card-item__btn-group.rate-group[data-v-03413efa] { left: 0px; font-size: 14px; color: 8px 12px; font-size: 14px; line-height: calc(1.71429); border-radius: 4px; background-color: var(--weui-BG-1); color: var(--weui-FG-2); user-select: none; cursor: text; width: auto; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; overflow-wrap: normal; } .interaction .interaction__comment.inputing[data-v-8e92dc7e] { color: var(--weui-FG-0); } .interaction .sns_opr_btn[data-v-8e92dc7e] { white-space: normal; line-height: 1.4; max-width: 100%; margin-top: 0px; font-size: 12px; margin-left: 22px; color: var(--weui-FG-0); } .interaction .weui-toast_bottom[data-v-8e92dc7e] { position: absolute; bottom: calc(100% + 12px); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .interaction .sns_opr_btn.sns_like_btn.like_btn_liked[data-v-8e92dc7e] { 0.2s ease 0s 1 normal none running slide-out-bottom-ed6c8227; } .wx_interaction_bar_hiden[data-v-ed6c8227] { animation: 0.5s ease 0s 1 normal forwards running slide-out-ed6c8227; } txp_barrage { 0% { transform: translate(0px); opacity: 1; } 90% { opacity: 1; } 100% { transform: translate(-2800px); opacity: 0; } } @keyframes txp_barrage { 0% { transform: translate(0px); opacity: 1; } 90% { opacity: 1; } 100% { transform: translate(-2800px); opacity: 0; } } @-webkit-keyframes txp_barrage_plusone { 0% { transform: translateY(0px); opacity: 1; } 100% { transform: translateY(-40px); opacity: 0; } } @keyframes txp_barrage_plusone { 0% { transform: translateY(0px); opacity: 1; } 100% { transform: translateY(-40px); opacity: 0; } } @-webkit-keyframes txp_barrage_star { 0% { transform: rotate(0deg) scale(1); } 50% { transform: rotate(180deg) scale(1.1); } 100% { transform: rotate(1turn) scale(1); } } @keyframes txp_barrage_star { 0% { transform: rotate(0deg) scale(1); } 50% { transform: rotate(180deg) scale(1.1); } 100% { transform: rotate(1turn) scale(1); } } @-webkit-keyframes txp_barrage_item_star_show { 0% { opacity: 0; } 100% { opacity: 1; } } @keyframes txp_barrage_item_star_show { 0% { opacity: 0; } 100% { opacity: 1; } } @-webkit-keyframes txp_barrage_item_star { 0% { top: 200px; } 100% { top: 15px; } } @keyframes txp_barrage_item_star { 0% { top: 200px; } 100% { top: 15px; } } @keyframes txp_barrage_item_show { 0% { opacity: 0; } 5% { opacity: 1; } 95% { opacity: 1; } 100% { opacity: 0; } } @-webkit-keyframes txp_barrage_item_show { 0% { opacity: 0; } 5% { opacity: 1; } 95% { opacity: 1; } 100% { opacity: 0; } } .page_video .txp_barrage { z-index: 3; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; transform: translateZ(0px); text-overflow: ellipsis; pointer-events: none; } .page_video .txp_barrage_item { stroke-width: 1px; stroke: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; padding: 4px; background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.01); font-size: 18px; line-height: 24px; text-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3) 0px 0px 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3) 0px 1px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3) 0px 0px 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3) 0px 0px 1px; white-space: nowrap; pointer-events: auto; font-weight: 700; display: flex; align-items: center; width: fit-content; } .page_video .txp_barrage_item .txp_text { display: inline-block; max-width: 680px; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; vertical-align: top; } .page_video .txp_barrage_item .txp_img { display: inline-block; width: auto; height: 28px; vertical-align: top; } .page_video .txp_barrage_item .txp_barrage_content { display: inline-block; vertical-align: top; } .page_video .txp_barrage_item_bottom, .page_video .txp_barrage_item_top { stroke-width: 1px; stroke: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); position: absolute; top: 20px; left: 50%; width: auto; padding: 4px; transform: translate(-50%); backface-visibility: hidden; font-size: 18px; line-height: 24px; text-align: center; text-shadow: rgb(0, 0, 0) 0px 0px 1px; white-space: nowrap; opacity: 0; pointer-events: auto; } .page_video .txp_barrage_item_bottom.txp_animate, .page_video .txp_barrage_item_top.txp_animate { animation: 5s ease 0s 1 normal both running txp_barrage_item_show; } .page_video .txp_barrage_item_top { top: paused; } .page_video .txp_barrage_plusone { position: absolute; top: -20px; right: 10px; color: rgb(255, 66, 0); font-size: 20px; animation: 1s linear 0s 1 normal both running txp_barrage_plusone; } .page_video .txp_barrage_emotion { display: inline-block; width: 24px; height: 24px; margin-right: 2px; vertical-align: -3px; } .page_video .txp_barrage_report { z-index: 999; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 80px; height: 30px; border-radius: 15px; background-color: rgba(55, 55, 66, 0.95); color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-size: 14px; line-height: 30px; text-align: center; } .page_video .txp_barrage_report:hover { color: rgb(255, 146, 11); } .page_video .txp_barrage_report:hover .txp_svg_icon_report { fill: rgb(255, 146, 11); } .page_video .txp_svg_icon_report { fill: rgb(255, 255, 255); width: 20px; height: 20px; margin-top: 7px; vertical-align: top; pointer-events: none; } .page_video .txp_barrage_item_bubble { padding: 4px 50px 4px 4px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); border-radius: 20px; background-position: 100% center; background-repeat: no-repeat; background-size: contain !important; } .page_video .txp_player_live .txp_barrage_item_bubble { padding-right: 10px; } .page_video .txp_barrage_vipicon { position: absolute; top: 19px; left: 15px; height: 13px; } .page_video .txp_barrage_item_mine { z-index: 1; width: auto; padding: 4px 6px 4px 4px; border: 1px solid rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 20px; } .page_video .txp_barrage_avatar, .page_video .txp_barrage_emoji { display: inline-block; position: relative; width: 24px; height: 24px; margin-right: 6px; border-radius: 100%; vertical-align: top; pointer-events: auto; } .page_video .txp_barrage_emoji { margin: 0px 1px; } .page_video .txp_barrage_badge, .page_video .txp_barrage_text { display: inline-block; vertical-align: top; } .page_video .txp_barrage_badge { margin-left: 4px; } .page_video .txp_barrage_badge .txp_icon_text { display: inline-block; margin-left: 3px; } .page_video .txp_barrage_lv1 { color: rgb(255, 66, 0); } .page_video .txp_barrage_lv2 { color: rgb(255, 120, 0); } .page_video .txp_barrage_lv3 { color: rgb(237, 200, 141); } .page_video .txp_barrage_lv4 { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .page_video .txp_barrage_lv5 { color: rgb(55, 165, 228); } .page_video .txp_barrage_item_mine.txp_barrage_item_bubble { padding: 4px 50px 4px 4px; } .page_video .txp_barrage_item_star { z-index: 2; position: absolute; left: 50%; width: auto; transform: translate(-50%); animation: 0.2s ease 0s 1 normal both running txp_barrage_item_star_show, 0.4s linear 0.1s 1 normal both running txp_barrage_item_star; pointer-events: auto; } .page_video .txp_barrage_item_star .txp_barrage_avatar { z-index: 3; position: absolute; top: -1px; left: 0px; width: 36px; height: 36px; } .page_video .txp_barrage_item_star .txp_barrage_star { z-index: 2; position: absolute; top: -16px; left: -12px; width: 60px; height: 60px; transform-origin: 30px 32px; background: url("/tencentvideo/txp/style/img/avatar_star.svg") 0px 0px no-repeat; animation: 0.6s linear 0.4s 1 normal both running txp_barrage_star; } .page_video .txp_barrage_item_star .txp_barrage_content { display: inline-block; z-index: 1; position: relative; padding: 4px 15px 4px 50px; border: 1px solid rgb(255, 204, 2); border-radius: 20px; backface-visibility: hidden; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6); font-size: 20px; line-height: 24px; text-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5) 0px 0px 1px; white-space: nowrap; } .page_video .txp_barrage_item_img { display: none; z-index: -1; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; pointer-events: auto; } .page_video .txp_html_fullscreen .txp_barrage_item_star { margin-top: 40px; } .page_video .txp_html_fullscreen .txp_barrage { overflow: hidden; } .page_video .txp_barrage_item_prop { z-index: 1; width: auto; padding: 2px 58px 2px 2px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 92, 56, 0.6); border-radius: 20px; background-color: rgba(255, 92, 56, 0.4); } .page_video .txp_barrage_item_prop .txp_prop_img { position: absolute; top: 0px; right: 10px; width: auto; height: 30px; } .page_video .txp_barrage_animate { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; overflow: visible; background: 0px center / auto 100% repeat-x; pointer-events: none; } .page_video .txp_barrage_animate.animated { background-image: url("/tencentvideo/txp/style/img/apng/stars.png"); } .page_video .txp_barrage_animate_pendant { position: absolute; top: 0px; bottom: 0px; width: 10px; height: 10px; margin: auto; } .page_video .txp_barrage_animate_pendant .pic { display: block; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: contain; } .page_video .animated .txp_barrage_animate_pendant1 { animation: 10s linear 0s infinite normal none running txp_barrage_pendant1; } .page_video .animated .txp_barrage_animate_pendant2 { animation: 10s linear 0s infinite normal none running txp_barrage_pendant2; } .page_video .txp_barrage_item_v2 { padding: 6px 4px 6px 50px; } .page_video .txp_barrage_item_v2 .txp_barrage_avatar { position: absolute; top: -2px; left: 5px; width: 40px; height: 40px; } .page_video .txp_barrage_item_v2.txp_barrage_item_mine { padding-right: 6px; } .page_video .txp_barrage_item .txp_text.txp_gradation, .page_video .txp_barrage_item_bottom .txp_text.txp_gradation, .page_video .txp_barrage_item_top .txp_text.txp_gradation { font-weight: 700; } @media (max-width: 1269px) { .page_video .txp_mod_barrage .txp_barrage_input_box { width: calc(100% - 70px); } .page_video .txp_mod_barrage .stars_pendant_avatar, .page_video .txp_mod_barrage .stars_pendant_name { max-width: 34px; } } .mpad_more { display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; margin-left: 6px; position: relative; top: -1px; width: 16px; height: 12px; left: 0px; } .mpad_more::before { content: " "; display: block; width: 12px; height: z-index: 11; min-width: 74px; list-style-type: none; max-width: initial !important; } .mpad_more_list::before { content: " "; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; right: 0px; border: 1px solid rgb(225, 225, 225); width: 200%; height: 200%; box-sizing: border-box; transform: scale(0.5); transform-origin: 0px 0px; z-index: -1; } .mpad_more_list_ele { position: relative; } .mpad_more_list_ele:last-child .mpad_more_list_ele_container::after { display: none; } .mpad_more_list_ele:last-child::before { display: none; } .mpad_more_list_ele_container { cursor: auto; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); user-select: none; position: relative; display: block; height: 30px; line-height: 30px; width: 100%; text-align: center; z-index: 2; font-size: 14px; box-sizing: content-box; } .mpad_more_list_ele_container:active { background-color: rgb(236, 236, 236); } .mpad_more_list_ele_container::after { display: block; content: " "; position: absolute; .weui-icon-back-arrow, .weui-icon-back-arrow-thin, .weui-icon-back, .weui-icon-back-circle { color: var(--weui-FG-0); } .weui-icon_msg.weui-icon_msg { width: 6.4em; height: 6.4em; } .weui-icon_msg.weui-icon_msg.weui-icon-warn { color: var(--weui-RED); } .weui-icon_msg.weui-icon_msg.weui-icon-info-circle { color: var(--weui-BLUE); } .weui-icon_msg-primary.weui-icon_msg-primary { width: 6.4em; height: 6.4em; } .weui-icon_msg-primary.weui-icon_msg-primary.weui-icon-warn { color: var(--weui-YELLOW); } .weui-flex { display: flex; } .weui-flex__item { flex: 1 1 0%; min-width: 0px; } .weui-media-box { padding: 16px; position: relative; } .weui-media-box::before { content: " "; position: absolute; top: 0px; right: 0px; height: 1px; border-top: 1px solid var(--weui-FG-3); color: var(--weui-FG-3); transform-origin: 0px 0px; transform: scaleY(0.5); left: 16px; } .weui-media-box:first-child::before { display: none; } a.weui-media-box { color: rgb(0, 0, 0); -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); } a.weui-media-box:active { background-color: var(--weui-BG-COLOR-ACTIVE); } .weui-media-box__title { display: block; font-weight: 400; font-size: 17px; line-height: 1.4; color: var(--weui-FG-0); width: auto; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; overflow-wrap: break-word; hyphens: auto; } .weui-media-box__desc { color: var(--weui-FG-2); font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.4; padding-top: 4px; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; overflow-wrap: break-word; hyphens: auto; } .weui-media-box__info { display: block; margin-top: 16px; padding-bottom: 4px; font-size: 13px; color: var(--weui-FG-2); line-height: 1em; list-style: none; overflow: hidden; } .weui-media-box__info__meta { float: left; padding-right: 1em; } .weui-media-box__info__meta_extra { padding-left: 1em; border-left: 1px solid var(--weui-FG-2); } .weui-media-box_appmsg { display: flex; align-items: center; } .weui-media-box_appmsg .weui-media-box__hd { margin-right: 16px; width: 60px; height: 60px; line-height: 60px; text-align: center; } .weui-media-box_appmsg .weui-media-box__thumb { width: 100%; max-height: 100%; vertical-align: top; } .weui-media-box_appmsg .weui-media-box__bd { flex: 1 1 0%; min-width: 0px; } .weui-media-box_small-appmsg { padding: 0px; } .weui-media-box_small-appmsg .weui-cells { margin-top: 0px; } .weui-media-box_small-appmsg .weui-cells::before { display: none; } .weui-link { color: var(--weui-LINK); -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); } .weui-link:visited { color: var(--weui-LINK); } .weui-link:active { opacity: 0.5; } .weui-btn { position: relative; display: block; min-width: 184px; max-width: 280px; width: fit-content; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; padding: 12px 24px; box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: 500; font-size: 17px; text-align: center; text-decoration: none; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); line-height: 1.41176; border-radius: 8px; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); cursor: default; user-select: none; } .weui-btn:active::before { content: ""; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; background-color: var(--weui-BTN-ACTIVE-MASK); border-radius: 8px; } .weui-btn:active.weui-btn_loading::before, .weui-btn:active.weui-btn_disabled::before, .weui-btn:active[disabled]::before { display: none; } .weui-btn__inner { overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; overflow-wrap: break-word; hyphens: auto; } .weui-btn_block { width: auto; } .weui-btn_inline { display: inline-block; } .weui-btn_default { color: var(--weui-FG-0); background-color: var(--weui-FG-5); } .weui-btn_default:not(.weui-btn_disabled):visited { color: var(--weui-FG-0); } .weui-btn_primary { background-color: var(--weui-BRAND); } .weui-btn_primary:not(.weui-btn_disabled):visited { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .weui-btn_warn { background-color: var(--weui-RED-100); } .weui-btn_warn:not(.weui-btn_disabled):visited { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .weui-btn_overlay.weui-btn_primary { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9); background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .weui-btn_overlay.weui-btn_primary:not(.weui-btn_disabled):visited { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9); } .weui-btn_overlay.weui-btn_default { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); background-color: rgba(247, 247, 247, 0.3); } .weui-btn_overlay.weui-btn_default:not(.weui-btn_disabled):visited { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .weui-btn_overlay.weui-btn_warn { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); background-color: var(--weui-RED-100); } .weui-btn_overlay.weui-btn_warn:not(.weui-btn_disabled):visited { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .weui-btn_overlay.weui-btn_disabled, .weui-btn_overlay[disabled] { color: rgba(247, 247, 247, 0.3); background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); } .weui-btn_disabled, .weui-btn[disabled] { color: var(--weui-FG-4); background-color: var(--weui-FG-5); } .weui-btn_loading .weui-mask-loading { font-size: 20px; margin: -0.2em 4px 0px 0px; color: currentcolor; } .weui-btn_loading .weui-mask-loading.weui-mask-loading_only { margin-right: 0px; } .weui-btn_loading.weui-btn_default .weui-mask-loading { color: rgb(96, 96, 96); } .weui-btn_loading .weui-loading { font-size: 20px; margin: -0.2em 4px 0px 0px; } .weui-btn_loading .weui-primary-loading { font-size: 20px; margin: -0.2em 4px 0px 0px; vertical-align: middle; color: currentcolor; } .weui-btn_loading .weui-primary-loading::before { content: ""; } .weui-btn_cell { position: relative; display: block; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 17px; text-align: center; text-decoration: none; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); line-height: 1.41176; padding: 16px; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); overflow: hidden; background-color: var(--weui-BG-5); } .weui-btn_cell + .weui-btn_cell { margin-top: 16px; } .weui-btn_cell:active { background-color: var(--weui-BG-COLOR-ACTIVE); } .weui-btn_cell__icon { display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; width: 24px; height: 24px; margin: -0.2em 0.34em 0px 0px; } .weui-btn_cell-default { color: var(--weui-FG-0); } .weui-btn_cell-primary { color: var(--weui-LINK); } .weui-btn_cell-warn { color: var(--weui-RED); } .weui-bottom-fixed-opr-page { height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .weui-bottom-fixed-opr-page__content { min-height: 0px; flex: 1 1 0%; padding-bottom: 80px; box-sizing: border-box; overflow-y: auto; } .weui-bottom-fixed-opr-page__tool { padding: 16px calc(32px + env(safe-area-inset-right)) calc(24px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom)) calc(32px + env(safe-area-inset-left)); background: rgb(255, 255, 255); position: relative; z-index: 50; } .weui-bottom-fixed-opr-page__tool::before { content: ""; height: 80px; background: linear-gradient(to top, rgb(255, 255, 255), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0)); position: absolute; bottom: calc(100% - 1px); left: 0px; right: 0px; transform: translateZ(0px); pointer-events: none; } .wx-root[data-weui-theme="dark"] .weui-bottom-fixed-opr-page__tool, body[data-weui-theme="dark"] .weui-bottom-fixed-opr-page__tool { background: rgb(25, 25, 25); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .wx-root:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) .weui-bottom-fixed-opr-page__tool, body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) .weui-bottom-fixed-opr-page__tool { background: rgb(25, 25, 25); } } .wx-root[data-weui-theme="dark"] .weui-bottom-fixed-opr-page__tool::before, body[data-weui-theme="dark"] .weui-bottom-fixed-opr-page__tool::before { background: linear-gradient(to top, rgb(25, 25, 25), rgba(25, 25, 25, 0)); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .wx-root:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) .weui-bottom-fixed-opr-page__tool::before, body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) .weui-bottom-fixed-opr-page__tool::before { background: linear-gradient(to top, rgb(25, 25, 25), rgba(25, 25, 25, 0)); } } .weui-bottom-fixed-opr-page__tips { margin-bottom: 24px; padding: 0px 32px; text-align: center; } middle; color: rgb(96, 96, 96); animation: 1s steps(60) 0s infinite normal none running circleLoading; } .weui-primary-loading__dot { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 50%; margin-left: -0.04375em; .wx-root { --weui-BG-6: rgba(0, 0, 0, .05); --weui-ACTIVE-MASK: rgba(0, 0, 0, .05); } .wx-root[data-weui-theme="dark"], body[data-weui-theme="dark"] { --weui-BG-6: rgba(255, 255, 255, .1); --weui-ACTIVE-MASK: rgba(255, 255, 255, .1); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .wx-root:not([data-weui-theme="light"]), body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) { --weui-BG-6: rgba(255, 255, 255, .1); --weui-ACTIVE-MASK: rgba(255, 255, 255, .1); } } .weui-dialog { position: fixed; z-index: 5000; top: 50%; left: 16px; right: 16px; transform: translateY(-50%); background-color: var(--weui-BG-2); text-align: center; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; display: flex; flex-direction: column; max-height: 90%; outline: 0px; overflow-wrap: break-word; hyphens: auto; } .weui-dialog__hd { padding: 32px 24px 16px; } .weui-dialog__title { font-weight: 500; font-size: 17px; line-height: 1.4; color: var(--weui-FG-0); } .weui-dialog__bd { overflow-y: auto; padding: 0px 24px; margin-bottom: 32px; font-size: 17px; line-height: 1.4; color: var(--weui-FG-1); } .weui-dialog__bd:first-child { min-height: 40px; padding: 32px 24px 0px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--weui-FG-0); display: flex; flex-direction: column; -webkit-box-pack: center; justify-content: center; } .weui-dialog__ft { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; } .weui-dialog__ft::after { content: " "; position: absolute; left: 0px; top: 0px; right: 0px; height: 1px; border-top: 1px solid var(--weui-DIALOG-LINE-COLOR); color: var(--weui-DIALOG-LINE-COLOR); transform-origin: 0px 0px; transform: scaleY(0.5); } .weui-dialog__btn { flex: 1 1 0%; display: block; line-height: 1.41176; padding: 20px 8px; font-size: 17px; color: var(--weui-LINK); font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); user-select: none; position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .weui-dialog__btn:active { background-color: var(--weui-BG-COLOR-ACTIVE); } .weui-dialog__btn::after { content: " "; position: absolute; left: 0px; top: 0px; width: 1px; bottom: 0px; border-left: 1px solid var(--weui-DIALOG-LINE-COLOR); color: var(--weui-DIALOG-LINE-COLOR); transform-origin: 0px 0px; transform: scaleX(0.5); } .weui-dialog__btn:first-child::after { display: none; } .weui-dialog__btn_default { color: var(--weui-FG-HALF); } .weui-dialog__btn_warn { color: var(--weui-RED); } .weui-dialog__btn_disabled { color: var(--weui-FG-2); } .weui-dialog_btn-wrap .weui-dialog__ft { flex-direction: column; align-items: initial; } .weui-dialog_btn-wrap .weui-dialog__btn::after { width: auto; bottom: auto; right: 0px; height: 1px; transform: scaleY(0.5); border-top: 1px solid var(--weui-DIALOG-LINE-COLOR); border-left: 0px; } .weui-dialog_btn-wrap .weui-dialog__btn:first-child::after { display: none; } .weui-skin_android .weui-dialog { text-align: left; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 0px 6px 30px; } .weui-skin_android .weui-dialog__title { font-size: 22px; line-height: 1.4; } .weui-skin_android .weui-dialog__hd { text-align: left; } .weui-skin_android .weui-dialog__bd { color: var(--weui-FG-1); text-align: left; } .weui-skin_android .weui-dialog__bd:first-child { color: var(--weui-FG-0); } .weui-skin_android .weui-dialog__ft { display: block; text-align: right; line-height: 40px; min-height: 40px; padding: 0px 24px 16px; } .weui-skin_android .weui-dialog__ft::after { display: none; } .weui-skin_android .weui-dialog__btn { display: inline-block; vertical-align: top; padding: 0px 0.8em; } .weui-skin_android .weui-dialog__btn::after { display: none; } .weui-skin_android .weui-dialog__btn:last-child { margin-right: -0.8em; } .weui-skin_android .weui-dialog__btn_default { color: var(--weui-FG-HALF); } @media screen and (min-width: 352px) { .weui-dialog { width: 320px; margin: 0px auto; } } .weui-toast { position: fixed; z-index: 5500; min-width: 132px; max-width: 320px; padding: 28px 20px; top: 40%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); text-align: center; border-radius: 8px; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9); display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background-color: var(--weui-BG-4); filter: drop-shadow(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 0px 8px 25px); box-sizing: border-box; line-height: 1.4; } .weui-toast__wrp { z-index: 5500; position: fixed; inset: 0px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .weui-toast__wrp .weui-toast { position: static; transform: none; margin-top: -10%; } .weui-toast_text { padding: 12px 20px; min-width: 0px; min-height: 0px; } .weui-icon_toast { display: block; margin-bottom: 16px; flex-shrink: 0; } .weui-icon_toast.weui-icon_toast { width: 4em; height: 4em; } .weui-icon_toast.weui-icon-success-no-circle, .weui-icon_toast.weui-icon-warn { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9); } .weui-icon_toast.weui-loading { width: 1em; height: 1em; font-size: 40px; } .weui-icon_toast.weui-primary-loading { display: flex; width: 1em; height: 1em; font-size: 40px; color: rgb(237, 237, 237); } .weui-icon_toast.weui-primary-loading::before { border-width: 4px 0px 4px 4px; } .weui-icon_toast.weui-primary-loading::after { border-width: 4px 4px 4px 0px; } .weui-icon_toast.weui-primary-loading .weui-primary-loading__dot { width: 4px; height: 4px; border-top-right-radius: 4px; border-bottom-right-radius: 4px; } .weui-toast__content { font-size: 14px; overflow-wrap: break-word; hyphens: auto; max-width: 100%; } .weui-mask { position: fixed; z-index: 1000; inset: 0px; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); } .weui-mask_transparent { position: fixed; z-index: 1000; inset: 0px; } @keyframes weuiSlideUp { 0% { transform: translate3d(0px, 100%, 0px); } 100% { transform: translateZ(0px); } } .weui-animate_slide-up, .weui-animate-slide-up { animation: 0.3s ease 0s 1 normal forwards running weuiSlideUp; } @keyframes weuiSlideDown { 0% { transform: translateZ(0px); } 100% { transform: translate3d(0px, 100%, 0px); } } .weui-animate_slide-down, .weui-animate-slide-down { animation: 0.3s ease 0s 1 normal forwards running weuiSlideDown; } @keyframes weuiFadeIn { 0% { opacity: 0; } 100% { opacity: 1; } } .weui-animate_fade-in, .weui-animate-fade-in { animation: 0.3s ease 0s 1 normal forwards running weuiFadeIn; } @keyframes weuiFadeOut { 0% { opacity: 1; } 100% { opacity: 0; } } .weui-animate_fade-out, .weui-animate-fade-out { animation: 0.3s ease 0s 1 normal forwards running weuiFadeOut; } .weui-transition.weui-mask { transition: opacity 0.3s, visibility 0.3s; opacity: 0; visibility: hidden; } .weui-transition.weui-half-screen-dialog { transition: transform 0.3s; transform: translateY(100%); } .weui-transition_show.weui-mask { opacity: 1; visibility: visible; } .weui-transition_show.weui-half-screen-dialog { transform: translateY(0px); } .weui-loadmore { width: 65%; margin: 20px auto; text-align: center; font-size: 0px; } .weui-loadmore .weui-loading, .weui-loadmore .weui-primary-loading { margin-right: 8px; } .weui-loadmore__tips { display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6; color: var(--weui-FG-1); } .weui-loadmore_line { border-top: 1px solid var(--weui-FG-3); margin-top: 32px; } .weui-loadmore_line .weui-loadmore__tips { position: relative; top: -0.9em; padding: 0px 8px; background-color: var(--weui-BG-2); } .weui-loadmore_dot .weui-loadmore__tips::before { content: " "; width: 4px; height: 4px; border-radius: 50%; background-color: var(--weui-FG-3); display: inline-block; position: relative; vertical-align: 0px; top: -0.16em; } body .weui-loadmore .weui-loadmore__tips { color: var(--weui-FG-1); } body .weui-loadmore.weui-loadmore_line .weui-loadmore__tips { padding: 0px 8px; } body .weui-loadmore.weui-loadmore_dot { width: 68px; } body .weui-loadmore.weui-loadmore_dot .weui-loadmore__tips { padding: 0px 8px; } body .weui-loadmore_default.weui-loadmore { width: auto; line-height: 1.4; margin: 0px 56px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } body .weui-loadmore_default.weui-loadmore_line { margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; border: 0px; } body .weui-loadmore_default.weui-loadmore_line::before, body .weui-loadmore_default.weui-loadmore_line::after { content: ""; width: 24px; height: 1px; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } body .weui-loadmore_default.weui-loadmore_line .weui-loadmore__tips { top: auto; padding: 0px 8px; background: transparent; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); line-height: inherit; } body .weui-loadmore_default.weui-loadmore_dot { margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; } body .weui-loadmore_default.weui-loadmore_dot .weui-loadmore__tips { line-height: 0.5; } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) .weui-loadmore_default.weui-loadmore_line::before, body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) .weui-loadmore_default.weui-loadmore_line::after { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); } body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) .weui-loadmore_default.weui-loadmore_line .weui-loadmore__tips { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); } } .weui-pop-zindex-primary inline-flex; } body .weui-toast_text .weui-icon_toast { display: none; } body .weui-toast_active:active::before { content: ""; position: absolute; left: 0px; top: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; background: var(--weui-FG-3); z-index: -1; } body .weui-toast_bottom { user-select: none; width: auto; height: auto; top: auto; left: calc(8px + env(safe-area-inset-left)); right: calc(8px + env(safe-area-inset-left)); bottom: calc(63px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom)); flex-direction: row; justify-content: space-between; padding: 12px 16px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 14px; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); transform: none; overflow: hidden; } body .weui-toast_bottom.weui-animate-slide-up { animation-name: bottomToastSlideUp; } body .weui-toast_bottom_new { user-select: none; width: auto; height: auto; max-width: none; top: auto; left: calc(16px + env(safe-area-inset-left)); right: calc(16px + env(safe-area-inset-left)); bottom: calc(63px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom)); flex-direction: row; justify-content: space-between; padding: 12px 16px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 14px; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); transform: none; overflow: hidden; } body .weui-toast_bottom_new.weui-animate-slide-up { animation-name: bottomToastSlideUp; } body .weui-toast_bottom__hd, body .weui-toast_bottom__ft { display: flex; align-items: center; word-break: break-all; } body .weui-toast_bottom__hd:not(.weui-flex__item), body .weui-toast_bottom__ft:not(.weui-flex__item) { max-width: 34%; } body .weui-toast_bottom__hd:first-child:last-child, body .weui-toast_bottom__ft:first-child:last-child { max-width: none; } body .weui-toast_bottom__new_hd { display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: flex-start; text-align: left; line-height: 1.4; } body .weui-toast_bottom__hd { text-align: left; } body .weui-toast_bottom__hd .weui-toast_bottom__icon { flex-shrink: 0; margin-right: 8px; } body .weui-toast_bottom__hd .weui-icon-success-no-circle { color: inherit; } body .weui-toast_bottom__ft { justify-content: flex-end; text-align: right; margin-left: 16px; } body .weui-toast_bottom__access-btn { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); display: inline-flex; align-items: center; text-align: right; } body .weui-toast_bottom__access-btn .weui-icon-arrow { flex-shrink: 0; color: currentcolor; margin-left: 4px; } @keyframes bottomToastSlideUp { 0% { transform: translate3d(0,calc(100% + 20px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom)),0); } 100% { transform: translateZ(0px); } } .page_video ul, .page_video ol { padding-left: 0px; list-style-type: none; } .page_video fieldset, .page_video legend, .page_video textarea, .page_video input, .page_video button { padding: 0px; } .page_video button, .page_video input, .page_video select, .page_video textarea { font-family: inherit; font-size: 100%; margin: 0px; } .page_video a img, .page_video fieldset { border: 0px; } .page_video a { text-decoration: none; } .top_screen_opr { z-index: 12; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; height: 56px; right: 0px; background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5), rgba(0, none; } .video__relate.vertical_column .video__relate-info { position: relative; flex: 1 1 0%; } .video__relate.vertical_column .video__relate-info::after { content: " "; position: absolute; left: 0px; bottom: -6px; right: 0px; height: 1px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); transform-origin: 0px 100%; transform: scaleY(0.5); } .video__relate.vertical_column .video__relate-title { margin-bottom: 14px; } .video__relate.vertical_column .video__relate-list { margin-right: 0px; padding: 0px 4px; } .video__relate.vertical_column .video__relate-item { float: none; width: 100%; } .video__relate-info::after { display: none; } .video__relate.vertical_column .video__relate-duration { display: flex; font-size: 12px; align-items: center; right: 4px; bottom: 2px; } .video__relate.vertical_column .video__relate-duration::before { content: ""; position: relative; top: 1px; display: inline-block; width: 14px; height: 14px; margin-right: 2px; background-repeat: no-repeat; background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg width='16' height='16' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cg fill='none' fill-rule='evenodd'%3E%3Cpath d='M5.556 2.88l5.887 margin-bottom: 0px; width: 142px; padding-bottom: 80px; flex-shrink: 0; margin-right: 12px; } .video__relate.vertical_column .video__relate-item__right { display: flex; flex-direction: column; flex-grow: 1; position: relative; padding: 4px 0px; } .video__relate.vertical_column .video__relate-item__right::before { content: ""; position: absolute; bottom: -6px; left: 0px; right: 0px; display: block; height: 1px; transform: scaleY(0.5); background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } .video__relate.vertical_column .video__relate-view { font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.28; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); 255, 255, 0.8); margin-bottom: 16px; line-height: 1.4; font-size: 15px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; } .video__relate_right { display: flex; justify-content: float: left; width: 33.8%; flex-shrink: 0; } .video__relate-item:last-child { padding-right: 8px; } .video__relate-item-wrp { margin-right: 8px; overflow: hidden; } .video__relate-image { background-color: rgb(153, 153, 153); width: 100%; padding-bottom: 56%; border-radius: 4px; background-size: cover; background-position: center center; position: relative; margin-bottom: 8px; overflow: hidden; transform: scaleZ(1); } .video__relate-duration { position: absolute; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); right: 6px; bottom: 4px; font-size: 10px; text-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3) 0px 0px 2px; } .video__relate-desc { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); line-height: 17px; overflow: hidden; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; text-overflow: ellipsis; font-size: 12px; padding: 0px 1px; } .video__relate-image-invisible { position: absolute; width: 100%; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate3d(-50%, -50%, 0px); } .video__relate-img-mask { position: absolute; inset: 0px; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.02); } .video_tail_module { padding: 24px; } .video_tail_module .video__relate { background-color: transparent; padding: 20px 0px; } 66.04%; position: relative; left: -4px; margin-right: 0px; } .video__relate-more-wrp { width: 100%; position: absolute; left: 0px; right: 0px; bottom: 0px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: flex-end; align-items: center; } .video__relate-more { position: relative; width: 32%; padding-top: 32%; height: 0px; box-sizing: content-box; border-radius: 50%; background-color: .video_tail_module .video__relate-item:last-child { padding-right: 0px; } .video_tail_module .ad_area { display: none; } .video_tail_module.has_ad { padding-bottom: 0px; } .video_tail_module.has_ad .have_expand { display: none; } .video_tail_module.expand .video_tail_module__hd, .video_tail_module.has_ad .video_tail_module__hd { flex-flow: wrap; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; flex-grow: 0; } .video_tail_module.expand .opr_wrp, .video_tail_module.has_ad .opr_wrp { justify-content: flex-end; width: auto; flex-grow: 0; flex-shrink: 0; margin: 0px; position: relative; top: 4px; } .video_tail_module.expand .opr_item_wrp, .video_tail_module.has_ad .opr_item_wrp { flex-direction: row; } .video_tail_module.expand .opr_item_wrp:last-child, .video_tail_module.has_ad .opr_item_wrp:last-child { margin-left: 16px; } .video_tail_module.expand .opr_item, .video_tail_module.has_ad .opr_item { width: 28px; height: 28px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-right: 4px; } .video_tail_module.expand .account_info_wrp, .video_tail_module.has_ad .account_info_wrp { position: static; margin-bottom: 10px; } .video_tail_module.expand .ad_area, .video_tail_module.has_ad .ad_area { display: block; flex: 1 1 0%; position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .video_tail_plugin { position: absolute; left: 0px; right: 0px; z-index: 13; height: 100%; background-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); } .video_tail_plugin .video_tail_module { position: static; z-index: auto; } .video_tail_plugin .has_ad .iframe_ad_container { display: block; height: 100%; } .add_bg_color .video_tail_module { background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9); } .video_tail_module.has_ad .opr_wrp { align-items: flex-start; } .video_tail_module.has_ad .opr_item_wrp.recommend_item_wrp, .video_tail_module.has_ad .opr_item_wrp.like_item_wrp, .video_tail_module.has_ad .opr_item_wrp.share_item_wrp { display: none; } .video_tail_module.video_screen_half, .video_tail_module.video_screen_half.expand { padding: 12px 16px; } .video_tail_module.video_screen_half .account_avatar, .video_tail_module.video_screen_half.expand .account_avatar { width: 28px; height: 28px; } .video_tail_module.video_screen_half .account_name, .video_tail_module.video_screen_half.expand .account_name { font-size: 16px; } .video_tail_module.video_screen_half .have_expand, .video_tail_module.video_screen_half.expand .have_expand { display: none; } .video_tail_module.video_screen_half.has_ad { padding-bottom: 0px; } .video_tail_module.horizontal_full .video_tail_module .opr_item_wrp { margin-left: 68px; } .video_tail_module.horizontal_full .video_tail_module .recommend_item_wrp.opr_item_wrp:last-child { margin-left: 41.5px; padding-left: 36.5px; } .video_tail_module.expand .video-logo_icon::before { width: 14px; height: 11px; } .video_tail_module.expand .opr_item_wrp.recommend_item_wrp { margin-left: 20px; padding-left: 20px; position: relative; } .video_tail_module.expand .recommend_item_wrp .opr_item { margin-right: 8px; } .video_tail_module.expand .recommend_item_wrp .opr_item_text { display: flex; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: center; } .video_tail_module.expand .recommend_item_wrp .opr_item_text::after { position: static; margin-left: 3px; margin-top: initial; } .video_tail_module.vertical_full { padding: calc(64px + env(safe-area-inset-top)) calc(20px + env(safe-area-inset-right)) calc(30px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom)) calc(20px + env(safe-area-inset-left)); } .video_tail_module.vertical_full.expand .video_tail_module__hd { display: block; } .video_tail_module.vertical_full.expand .opr_wrp { justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 23px; margin-top: 50px; } .video_tail_module.vertical_full.expand .opr_item_wrp { flex-direction: column; margin-left: 47px; justify-content: center; } .video_tail_module.vertical_full.expand .opr_item_wrp.recommend_item_wrp { margin-left: 29.5px; padding-left: 23.5px; } .video_tail_module.vertical_full.expand .opr_item { margin-right: 0px; margin-bottom: 4px; } .video_tail_module.vertical_full.expand .recommend_item_wrp .opr_item { margin-right: 0px; } .video_tail_module.vertical_full.expand .have_expand { align-items: flex-start; margin-top: 30px; padding-top: 0px; } .video_tail_module.vertical_full.expand .have_expand .video__relate-item { width: 50%; margin-bottom: 20px; } .video_tail_module.vertical_full.expand .have_expand .video__relate { padding-top: 28px; } .video_tail_module.vertical_full .opr_wrp { top: 0px; } .video_tail_module.vertical_full .opr_item_wrp { margin-left: 35px; } .video_tail_module.vertical_full .opr_item_wrp:first-child { margin-left: 0px; } .video_tail_module.vertical_full .opr_item_wrp:last-child { margin-left: 35px; } .video_tail_module.vertical_full .opr_item_wrp.recommend_item_wrp { position: relative; margin-left: 29.5px; padding-left: 26.5px; } .video_tail_module.vertical_full .opr_item_wrp.recommend_item_wrp::before { content: " "; display: block; width: 1px; height: 20px; position: absolute; background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15); transform: scaleX(0.5); left: 0px; } .video_tail_module.vertical_full.expand.has_ad .video_tail_module__hd { align-items: flex-start; display: flex; } .video_tail_module.vertical_full.expand.has_ad .opr_wrp { margin-top: 0px; top: 4px; margin-bottom: 0px; } .video_tail_module.vertical_full.expand.has_ad .opr_item_wrp { flex-direction: row; } .video_tail_module.vertical_full.expand.has_ad .opr_item { margin-right: 4px; margin-bottom: 0px; } .appmsg_video .video_tail_module .account_info_wrp, .appmsg_video .video_tail_module .share_item_wrp { display: none; } .paster_store.paster_show .paster_store_container { right: 0px; } .paster_store .paster_store_container { position: relative; z-index: 1; right: -100%; transition: 0.25s; font-size: 32px; line-height: 1.5; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-right: 8px; padding: 2px; border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7); } .paster_store .paster_store_container::before { top: 0px; height: 100%; position: absolute; left: 0px; right: 0px; z-index: 0; content: " "; display: block; border-radius: 4px; backdrop-filter: saturate(180%) blur(20px); filter: saturate(180%) blur(20px); } .paster_store .paster_store_main { position: relative; z-index: 2; display: flex; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: center; } .paster_store .paster_store_avatar { display: block; width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 3px 1px 1px 3px; margin-right: 6px; } .paster_store .paster_store_content { box-sizing: border-box; display: flex; .content_paster_for_android .paster_store .paster_store_container.opera { background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2); } .paster_content { display: inline-block; overflow: hidden; position: absolute; transition: 0.25s; margin-left: env(safe-area-inset-left); margin-right: env(safe-area-inset-right); } .paster_content, .paster_container { background-color: transparent; } .page_video.page_video_skin-vertical.page_video_control .paster_content { margin-bottom: 238px; } .page_video.page_video_skin-horizontal.page_video_control .paster_content { margin-bottom: calc(32px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom)); } .wx_no_click { pointer-events: none; } .db { display: block; } .tips_global_primary { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); } .reset_btn { appearance: none; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); outline: 0px; background-color: transparent; border: 0px; font-family: inherit; color: inherit; display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; } .reset_icon_btn { appearance: none; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); outline: 0px; border: 0px; font-family: inherit; display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; font-size: 10px; } .weui-flex_align-center { align-items: center; } .weui-flex_justify-center { justify-content: center; } body { height: auto; } .page_video a { color: var(--weui-LINK); text-decoration: none; } .page_video .tips_global { color: var(--weui-FG-1); } .page_video .tc { text-align: center; } .page_video .tr { text-align: right; } .page_video .line_wrp { line-height: 58px; color: var(--weui-LINK); } .page_video .none.page_video .none.page_video .none { display: none; } .page_video .clearfix::after { content: " "; display: block; clear: both; height: 0px; } .page_video .clearfix { zoom: 1; } body, html { appearance: none; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); } .wrp_pop_tips { width: 100%; height: 100%; background-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); position: absolute; left: 0px; top: 0px; z-index: 20; line-height: 100%; text-align: center; } .wrp_pop_tips .pop_tips { position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 0px; margin-top: -36px; display: inline-block; padding: 15px 0px; text-align: center; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); width: 100%; } .wrp_pop_tips .pop_tips .error_code { display: block; font-style: normal; font-size: 12px; color: rgb(136, 136, 136); margin-top: 10px; } .wrp_load_failed { width: 100%; height: 100%; background-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); position: absolute; left: 0px; top: 0px; z-index: 20; line-height: 100%; text-align: center; } .wrp_load_failed .wrp_icon_info { width: 60px; height: 60px; border-radius: 100%; border: 1px solid rgb(255, 255, 255); position: absolute; left: 50%; top: 50%; display: block; margin-left: -30px; margin-top: -50px; } .wrp_load_failed .wrp_icon_info::after { content: ""; position: absolute; left: 50%; top: 50%; display: block; width: 50px; height: 50px; margin-left: -25px; margin-top: -25px; background: url("/mmbizwap/zh_CN/htmledition/images/icon/appmsg/video/icon_load_faild.png") 0px 0px / 100% no-repeat transparent; } .wrp_load_failed p { width: 100%; height: 60px; position: absolute; top: 50%; display: block; margin-top: 30px; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .page_video { position: relative; background-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); user-select: none; } .page_video.wx_video_status_initial .top_screen_opr { background: transparent; } .page_video .wrp_loading { width: 100%; height: 100%; position: absolute; left: 0px; top: 0px; z-index: 8; } .page_video .wrp_loading .svg_loader { position: absolute; left: 50%; top: 50%; margin-left: -30px; margin-top: -30px; } .page_video .wrp_loading .mid_opr { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .page_video .wrp_loading.start_loading .mid_opr { width: 100%; height: 100%; inset: 0px; margin: 0px; border-radius: 0px; } .page_video .wrp_loading.start_loading .wx_video_loading { width: 40px; height: 40px; } 0px 0px / 100% no-repeat transparent; animation: 1s steps(60) 0ms infinite normal none running loading; top: 0px; left: 0px; margin: 0px; position: relative; } .page_video .mid_opr { width: 56px; height: 56px; position: absolute; left: 50%; top: 50%; margin-left: -28px; margin-top: -28px; z-index: 10; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); text-align: center; border-radius: 5px; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .page_video .mid_opr .spinner { transform: scale(0.7); } .page_video .mid_opr .icon_mid_play { display: inline-block; width: 0px; height: 0px; margin-top: 25px; margin-left: 25px; border-width: 14px 25px; overflow: hidden; border-color: transparent transparent transparent rgb(255, 255, 255); border-style: dotted dotted dotted solid; } .page_video .mid_opr .icon_mid_speed_play { display: inline-block; width: 35px; height: 20px; margin-top: 27px; background: url("/mmbizwap/zh_CN/htmledition/images/icon/appmsg/video/icon_speed_play.png") 0px 0px / 100% no-repeat transparent; } .page_video .mid_opr .video_length { color: rgb(203, 203, 203); font-size: 12px; } .page_video .mid_opr .video_length .played_time { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-weight: 400; } .page_video .mid_opr .video_length em { margin: 0px 2px; } .page_video .mid_opr.fast_pre_next { width: 136px; height: 74px; border-radius: 4px; margin-left: -68px; margin-top: -37px; background: rgb(76, 76, 76); } .page_video .mid_opr.fast_pre_next .video_length { line-height: 1.4; font-weight: 400; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); } .page_video .mid_opr.fast_pre_next .video_length .played_time { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9); } .page_video .mid_opr .video_processor_bar { position: relative; margin: 18px auto 12px; width: 96px; height: 4px; border-radius: 4px; text-align: left; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); } .page_video .mid_opr .processor_bar_inner { position: absolute; height: 4px; border-radius: 4px; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); opacity: 0.9; } .page_video .mid_opr.next .icon_mid_speed_play { transform: rotate(180deg); } .page_video .full_screen_opr { z-index: 12; text-align: center; position: absolute; inset: 0px; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); .page_video .video_opr .play_mode .pop_mode_select .clarity .clarity_item.current { color: rgb(9, 187, 7); } .page_video .video_opr .play_mode .pop_mode_select .icon_arrow_down { width: 0px; height: 36); transform: rotate(90deg); } .wrp_play_bar { position: absolute; left: 6px; right: 6px; bottom: 0px; z-index: 9; } .wrp_play_bar .wrp_progress { position: relative; appearance: none; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); top: 0.1em; font-size: 12px; } .wrp_play_bar .wrp_progress .progress_bar { height: 2px; position: relative; background: none; } .wrp_play_bar .wrp_progress .progress_bar .played_bar { position: absolute; height: 2px; padding-left: 6px; left: -6px; top: 0px; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); z-index: 4; border-radius: 20px; } .wrp_play_bar .wrp_progress .progress_bar .background_bar { position: absolute; height: 2px; top: 0px; left: -6px; right: -6px; z-index: 2; border-radius: 20px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); } .wrp_play_bar .wrp_progress .progress_bar .buffer_bar { position: absolute; height: 2px; padding: 0px 6px; left: -6px; top: 0px; z-index: 3; border-radius: 1px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); } .wrp_play_bar .wrp_progress .progress_bar .bar_mark { position: absolute; height: 2px; padding: 0px; top: 0px; width: 4px; z-index: 4; border-radius: 1px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); } .wrp_play_bar .wrp_progress .progress_bar .wrp_speed_dot { z-index: 5; position: absolute; left: -1px; top: 50%; margin-top: -10px; width: 6px; height: 20px; line-height: 15px; } .wrp_play_bar .wrp_progress .progress_bar .wrp_speed_dot .speed_dot { font-size: 10px; width: 1.2em; height: 1.2em; margin-top: -0.6em; margin-left: -0.6em; position: absolute; top: 50%; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 100%; } .wrp_play_bar .wrp_progress__draging .progress_bar { height: 3px; } .wrp_play_bar .wrp_progress__draging .progress_bar .background_bar, .wrp_play_bar .wrp_progress__draging .progress_bar .played_bar, .wrp_play_bar .wrp_progress__draging .progress_bar .buffer_bar, .wrp_play_bar .wrp_progress__draging .progress_bar .bar_mark { height: 100%; } .wrp_play_bar .wrp_progress__draging .progress_bar .wrp_speed_dot .speed_dot { margin-left: -8px; margin-top: -8px; width: 16px; height: 16px; } .wrp_play_bar.wrp_play_bar_hide_speed-dot .wrp_progress .progress_bar .background_bar, .wrp_play_bar.wrp_play_bar_hide_speed-dot .wrp_progress .progress_bar .played_bar, .wrp_play_bar.wrp_play_bar_hide_speed-dot .wrp_progress .progress_bar .buffer_bar, .wrp_play_bar.wrp_play_bar_hide_speed-dot .wrp_progress .progress_bar .bar_mark { height: 1px; } .wrp_play_bar.wrp_play_bar_hide_speed-dot .wrp_progress .progress_bar .wrp_speed_dot { display: none; } .full_mask { position: fixed; inset: 0px; z-index: 1; background-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); display: none; } .full_screen_mv .page_video { position: absolute; left: 50%; top: 50%; margin-left: -150px; margin-top: -100px; background-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); z-index: 10; } .full_screen_mv .page_video .inner { overflow: visible; position: absolute; left: 0px; top: 0px; } .full_screen_mv .page_video .inner .video_poster video { background-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); max-height: 100%; max-width: 100%; display: inline-block; } .full_screen_mv .page_video .video_opr { position: fixed; bottom: 0px; } .full_screen_mv .page_video .video_opr .screenSize_control .icon_control { background: url("/mmbizwap/zh_CN/htmledition/images/icon/appmsg/video/icon_rebackplay@2x.png") 0px 0px / 100% no-repeat transparent; } .full_screen_mv .page_content { height: 100%; overflow: hidden; } .full_screen_mv .full_mask { display: block; } @media (orientation: portrait) { .full_screen_mv .opr_fade_out { pointer-events: none; animation: 0.1s ease-in-out 0s 1 normal none running opr_fade_out; } .full_screen_mv .opr_fade_in { animation: 0.1s ease-in-out 0s 1 normal none running opr_fade_in; } @-webkit-keyframes opr_fade_out { 0% { opacity: 1; } 100% { opacity: 0; } } @-webkit-keyframes opr_fade_in { 0% { opacity: 0; } 100% { bottom: 0px; opacity: 1; } } .full_screen_mv .flow_fade_out { animation: 0.5s ease-in-out 3s 1 normal forwards running opr_fade_out; } } @media (orientation: landscape) { .full_screen_mv .page_video .video_opr .opr_inner { padding: 0px 25px; } .full_screen_mv .page_video .video_opr .opr_inner .opr_inner_fl { left: 25px; } .full_screen_mv .page_video .video_opr .opr_inner .opr_inner_fr { right: 25px; } } .interact_video { text-align: right; background-color: rgb(247, 247, 247); line-height: 2.5; overflow: hidden; padding: 0px 10px; font-size: 14px; position: relative; border-bottom-left-radius: 2px; border-bottom-right-radius: 2px; } .interact_video::before { display: none; content: " "; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; border-width: 0px 1px 1px; border-style: none solid solid; border-color: currentcolor rgb(230, 230, 230) rgb(230, 230, 230); border-image: none; border-bottom-left-radius: 4px; border-bottom-right-radius: 4px; width: 200%; height: 200%; box-sizing: border-box; transform: scale(0.5); transform-origin: 0px 0px; } .interact_video .access_original { -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); color: rgb(149, 148, 148); position: absolute; inset: 0px; text-align: left; padding: 0px 10px; width: auto; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; overflow-wrap: normal; } .interact_video .access_original::after { content: " "; height: 7px; width: 7px; border-width: 1px 1px 0px 0px; border-color: rgb(200, 199, 205); border-style: solid; transform: matrix(0.71, 0.71, -0.71, 0.71, 0, 0); position: relative; top: -1px; margin-left: 0.3em; display: none; } .interact_video .video_original { text-align: left; padding-left: 15px; padding-right: 25px; width: auto; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; overflow-wrap: normal; } .interact_video .video_original::after { position: absolute; top: 50%; margin-top: -4px; right: 15px; } .interact_video .video_resource { float: left; color: rgb(149, 148, 148); } .interact_video .inter_opr { float: left; color: rgb(96, 127, 166); } .interact_video .inter_opr .praise_area { padding-left: 10px; float: right; } .interact_video .inter_opr .btn_detail { display: inline-block; text-align: center; position: relative; } .interact_video .inter_opr .love_num { font-size: 13px; line-height: 13px; } .interact_video .inter_opr .icon_love { width: 12px; height: 12px; display: inline-block; vertical-align: 0px; position: relative; top: 1px; background: url("/mmbizwap/zh_CN/htmledition/images/icon/appmsg/qqmusic/icon_love_mini_sprite.2x.png") 0px 0px / 12px no-repeat transparent; } .interact_video .inter_opr .loved .icon_love { background-image: url("/mmbizwap/zh_CN/htmledition/images/icon/appmsg/qqmusic/icon_love_mini_sprite.2x.png"); background-position: 0px -17px; } .pages_common_area { overflow: hidden; } .tc { text-align: center; } .tr { text-align: right; } .tips_global { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); } .video_info_area { margin-top: 1em; } .video_info_area.empty_data .praise_access_wrp { float: none; } .video_info_area.empty_data .praise_user_list { padding: 0px; } .video_info_area.empty_data .praise_access_wrp, .video_info_area.empty_data .comment_access_wrp { text-align: center; } .video_info_area.empty_data .discuss_container { margin-right: 15px; padding-right: 0px; } .video_info_hd { overflow: hidden; font-size: 14px; line-height: 2.2em; padding: 0px 15px; position: relative; } .video_info_hd::before { content: " "; position: absolute; left: 0px; bottom: 0px; right: 0px; height: 1px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(223, 223, 221); color: rgb(223, 223, 221); transform-origin: 0px 100%; transform: scaleY(0.5); } .video_info_bd { padding: 0px 0px 0px 15px; } .video_extend_inner { padding-right: 15px; } .no_in_mm { padding-top: 2em; } .video_abstract { position: relative; margin-top: 10px; font-size: 14px; padding: 15px; } .video_abstract .video_title { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; } .video_abstract .inner_abstract { padding-top: 10px; color: rgb(140, 140, 140); line-height: 1.6; max-height: 4.7em; overflow: hidden; margin-bottom: 0.5em; overflow-wrap: break-word; hyphens: auto; transition: max-height 0.3s ease-in; } .video_abstract .inner_abstract.hide { position: absolute; left: 15px; right: 15px; visibility: hidden; z-index: -1; max-height: none; } .opr_fade_out { pointer-events: none; animation: 0.1s ease-in 0s 1 normal forwards running opr_fade_out; } .opr_fade_in { pointer-events: auto; animation: 0.1s ease-in 0s 1 normal forwards running opr_fade_in; } .flow_fade_out { animation: 0.5s ease-in-out 3s 1 normal forwards running opr_fade_out; } .player_fade_in { pointer-events: auto; animation: 0.3s ease-in 0s 1 normal forwards running player_fade_in; } @-webkit-keyframes opr_fade_out { 0% { opacity: 1; } 100% { opacity: 0; } } @-webkit-keyframes opr_fade_in { 0% { opacity: 0; } 100% { opacity: 1; } } @-webkit-keyframes player_fade_in { 0% { opacity: 0; } 100% { opacity: 1; } } .video_pause_controll { position: absolute; z-index: 12; left: 0px; top: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; display: none; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); } .video_pause_controll .btn_pause { position: absolute; left: 50%; top: 50%; z-index: 10; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); text-align: center; border-radius: 0px; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .video_pause_controll .btn_pause .icon_pause { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 48px; height: 48px; background: rgba(237, 237, 237, 0.9); border-radius: 50%; } .video_pause_controll .btn_pause .icon_pause::before { content: ""; display: inline-block; width: 28px; height: 28px; vertical-align: middle; background-size: cover; background-image: 100%); } .video_ad_detail { position: absolute; z-index: 14; right: 0px; bottom: 0px; width: 100%; height: 30px; } .video_ad_detail .btn_ad_detail { position: absolute; right: 10px; bottom: 10px; .app_download_container { overflow: hidden; padding: 10px 12px; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.65); position: absolute; left: 0px; right: 0px; bottom: 0px; z-index: 13; } .app_download_container .app_thumb { float: left; width: 45px; height: 45px; } .app_download_container .btn_app_download_wrp { float: right; position: relative; border-radius: 5px; overflow: hidden; font-size: 0px; margin-top: 10px; } .app_download_container .btn_app_download { display: inline-block; border: 1px solid rgb(9, 186, 7); text-align: center; width: 3.2em; box-sizing: border-box; border-radius: 5px; font-size: 14px; color: rgb(9, 186, 7); line-height: 1.75; position: relative; z-index: 1; } .app_download_container .btn_app_download.progress_text { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .app_download_container .app_download_progress { position: absolute; top: 0px; bottom: 0px; left: 0px; background-color: rgba(9, 186, 7, 0.75); } .app_download_container .app_download_info { overflow: hidden; padding: 0px 10px; overflow-wrap: break-word; hyphens: auto; } .app_download_container .app_download_title { display: block; font-weight: 400; font-size: 17px; width: auto; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; overflow-wrap: normal; margin-bottom: -3px; } .app_download_container .app_download_desc { font-size: 15px; width: auto; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; overflow-wrap: normal; } .inner_app_download_container { position: absolute; left: 0px; right: 0px; bottom: 0px; z-index: 5; text-align: center; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .inner_app_download_container .inner_app_download_bd { background-color: rgb(69, 154, 234); display: table-cell; padding: 0px 20px; vertical-align: middle; overflow-wrap: break-word; word-break: break-all; width: 2000px; height: 45px; } .inner_app_download_container .inner_app_download_bd.success { background-color: rgb(9, 186, 7); } .inner_app_download_container .app_download_progress_wrp { background-color: rgb(57, 139, 215); height: 3px; position: relative; border-radius: 3px; overflow: hidden; margin-top: 5px; margin-bottom: 3px; } .inner_app_download_container .app_download_progress { position: absolute; left: 0px; top: 0px; bottom: 0px; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 3px; } .wx_video_msg_primary { text-align: center; font-size: 0px; background-color: var(--weui-BG-3); border-radius: 8px; position: relative; } .wx_video_msg_primary::after { content: " "; display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; width: 0px; height: 100%; overflow: hidden; } .wx_video_msg_primary .weui-icon_msg { color: rgb(204, 209, 213); width: 40px; height: 40px; } .wx_video_msg_primary_inner { display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; font-size: 12px; color: var(--weui-FG-4); } .wx_video_msg_primary_text { padding-top: 1em; } .wx_video_error_box { position: relative; z-index: 25; background-color: rgb(38, 38, 38); text-align: center; display: flex; -webkit-box-align: center; align-items: center; -webkit-box-pack: center; justify-content: center; } .wx_video_error_msg { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .wx_video_error_msg_btn { display: inline-block; padding: 0px 1.34em; line-height: 1.7; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); margin-top: 2em; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); } .wx_video_error_loading { width: 26px; margin-top: -0.2em; vertical-align: middle; animation: 1s steps(13) 0ms infinite normal none running loading; } .wx_video_error_refresh { width: 17px; margin: -0.2em 0.34em 0px 0px; vertical-align: middle; } .wx_video_error_code { display: block; font-style: normal; font-size: 12px; color: rgb(136, 136, 136); margin-top: 10px; } @-webkit-keyframes loading { 0% { transform: rotate3d(0, 0, 1, 0deg); } 100% { transform: rotate3d(0, 0, 1, 360deg); } } @keyframes loading { 0% { transform: rotate3d(0, 0, 1, 0deg); } 100% { transform: rotate3d(0, 0, 1, 360deg); } } .not_fullscreen .video_fill { object-fit: fill; } .not_fullscreen video::-webkit-media-controls-start-playback-button { display: none !important; appearance: none; } .not_fullscreen video::-webkit-media-controls { display: none !important; } .not_fullscreen .video_time, .video_time-wrp, .TL-page .page_video .full_screen_opr .icon_mid_play { display: none; } .TL-page .page_video .full_screen_opr .icon_mid_new_play { display: flex; } .TL-page .page_video { position: relative; } .TL-page .page_video .video_time-wrp { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; align-items: 0px; padding: 16px 12px; background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)); } .page_video .video_full-screen__head .video_full-screen__head__inner { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; } .page_video .video_full-screen__head .video_full-screen__head__item { display: block; } .page_video .video_full-screen__head .video_full-screen__article-title { display: flex; align-items: center; line-height: 26px; font-size: 17px; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-weight: 450; } .page_video .video_full-screen__head .video_full-screen__article-title .video_full-screen__article-title-text { white-space: nowrap; text-overflow: ellipsis; overflow: hidden; max-width: 75vw; } .page_video .video_full-screen__head width: 50px; height: 50px; } .page_video .video_full-screen__head .video_menu_more:active { opacity: 0.6; } .page_video .video_full-screen__head .video_menu_more::after { opacity: 0.8; content: " "; display: block; width: 24px; height: 24px; position: absolute; right: 7px; background: url("data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg width='24' height='24' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cpath fill='%23FFFFFF'/%3E%3C/svg%3E") no-repeat; } .page_video .video_full-screen__head .video_full-screen__account-info { display: flex; align-items: center; line-height: 24px; font-size: 15px; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .page_video .video_full-screen__head .video_full-screen__account-avatar { display: block; width: 24px; height: 24px; border-radius: 50%; margin: 0px 8px 0px 6px; } .page_video .video_full-screen__footer { position: absolute; right: 0px; bottom: 0px; z-index: 8; } .page_video .video_full-screen__footer__sub-setting { transition: right 0.5s, bottom 0.5s; } .page_video .video_full-screen__sub-setting { display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 450; } .page_video .video_full-screen__sub-setting .video_full-screen__sub-setting__item { line-height: 30px; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .page_video .video_full-screen__sub-setting .video_full-screen__sub-setting__item.current { color: var(--weui-BRAND); } .page_video .video_full-screen__sub-setting .video_full-screen__sub-setting__item:active { opacity: 0.5; } .page_video .video_full-screen__sub-setting .video_full-screen__sub-setting__item__desc { font-size: 12px; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); } .page_video .play_setting_mode { display: inline-block; line-height: 24px; margin-left: 24px; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 450; word-break: keep-all; } .page_video .play_setting_mode:active { opacity: 0.5; } .page_video .play_setting_mode .play_setting { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .page_video .play_setting_mode.play_setting_mode__rate { width: 40px; margin-left: 8px; white-space: nowrap; text-align: center; } .page_video .play_bullet-screen-full_mode, .page_video .play_bullet-screen_mode { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; pointer-events: auto; } .page_video .play_bullet-screen_mode:active { opacity: 0.5; } .page_video .play_bullet-screen_mode::before { content: " "; display: block; height: 19px; width: 1px; background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); position: absolute; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); left:
